label: 肆季鬼志 商店演员 Season of Ghosts Shop Actors

Recall Knowledge (Willowshore).name: 回忆知识（柳岸镇） Recall Knowledge (Willowshore)

The Seven-Colored Songbird.name: 七彩鸣雀剧场 The Seven-Colored Songbird
The Seven-Colored Songbird.tokenName: 七彩鸣雀剧场 The Seven-Colored Songbird
The Seven-Colored Songbird.prototypeToken: 七彩鸣雀剧场 The Seven-Colored Songbird

Chain Mail.name: 链甲 Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description:
一套链甲由数件护甲组成，这些护甲由彼此相连的小金属环编织成防护网。它通常包括一件链衫、护腿、一对护臂和一顶锁子头巾，共同保护身体的大部分部位。

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

Hide Armor.name: 皮甲 Hide Armor
Hide Armor.description:
这种护甲由毛皮、结实的皮革，有时还包括定型的煮制硬革混合制成。尽管其多层皮革提供了防护，但其笨重会拖慢穿戴者的速度并降低机动性。

A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

Scale Mail.name: 鳞甲 Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多缝在加固皮革衬底上的金属鳞片组成，通常呈长衫形式，保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与塑形的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保持了最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮甲用金属饰钉加固，有时还带有小型金属板，在保留皮甲大部分灵活性的同时，提供了更坚实的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Shield Boss.name: 护盾凸缘 Shield Boss
Shield Boss.description:
护盾凸缘通常是一块厚重的金属，呈圆形、凸形或圆锥形，安装在护盾中央，能提高护盾猛击造成的钝击伤害。

Typically a round, convex, or conical piece of thick metal attached to the center of a shield, a shield boss increases the bludgeoning damage of a shield bash.

Shield Spikes.name: 护盾尖刺 Shield Spikes
Shield Spikes.description:
这些金属尖刺被巧妙地安置在护盾的防御面上，使其能够在施展护盾猛击时造成穿刺伤害。

These metal spikes are strategically placed on the defensive side of the shield to deal piercing damage with a shield bash.

Spear.name: 矛 Spear
Spear.description:
一根长长的金属杆，末端带有金属尖刺，矛可以单手作为近战武器使用，也可以投掷。

A long metal shaft ending with a metal spike, a spear can be used one-handed as a melee weapon and can be thrown.

Katana.name: 武士刀 Katana
Katana.description:
武士刀是一种弧形单刃剑，以其锋利无比的刀刃而闻名。

A katana is a curved, single-edged sword known for its wickedly sharped blade.

Kama.name: 镰刃 Kama
Kama.description:
镰刃与镰刀相似，并在一些地区中用于收割谷物，拥有短而略微弯曲的刃部和木制手柄。

Similar to a sickle and used in some regions to reap grain, a kama has a short, slightly curved blade and a wooden handle.

Javelin.name: 标枪 Javelin
Javelin.description:
这根细长的矛在投掷时平衡性良好，但并非为近战使用而设计。

This thin spear is well balanced for throwing but is not designed for melee use.

Battle Axe.name: 战斧 Battle Axe
Battle Axe.description:
这些斧头被明确设计为武器，而非工具。它们通常更轻，斧柄以金属箍或螺栓加固，并且刃部更锋利，使其更适合砍断肢体，而不是劈木头。

These axes are designed explicitly as weapons, rather than tools. They typically weigh less, with a shaft reinforced with metal bands or bolts, and have a sharper blade, making them ideal for chopping limbs rather than wood.

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这种小型刃状武器可单手持用，在近身战斗中用来刺击生物。它也可以投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Club.name: 短棒 Club
Club.description:
这是一段结实的木头，被制成或改造成用来猛击敌人的武器。短棒既可以是雕刻精美的武术作品，也可以像树上的分支或一块木头那样简单。

This is a piece of stout wood shaped or repurposed to bludgeon an enemy. Clubs can be intricately carved pieces of martial art or as simple as a tree branch or piece of wood.

Crossbow.name: 弩 Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这种远程武器有一个类似弓的部件，安装在一个称为“槊柄”的带柄框架上。槊柄上有一个机构，可以将弓弦锁定在适当位置，并连接到一个触发机构，释放张力并发射一支弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Sap.name: 重钝棒 Sap
Sap.description:
重钝棒有一层包裹在致密核心外的柔软外层，通常是包着铅棒的皮套。它的头比握柄更宽，以分散打击的力道，因为这种武器的用途是击昏受害者，而不是让其流血。

A sap has a soft wrapping around a dense core, typically a leather sheath around a lead rod. Its head is wider than its grip to disperse the force of a blow, as the weapon's purpose is to knock out its victim rather than to draw blood.

Shortsword.name: 短剑 Shortsword
Shortsword.description:
这些刀刃有各种各样的形状和样式，但通常长 2 英尺。

These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
虽然被称为胸甲，但这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用于保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时还包括髋部和小腿。它巧妙地提供了部分板甲的防护，同时允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Chain Shirt.name: 链衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这种长衫有时也被称为锁子甲衫，由与锁子甲相同的金属环制成。不过，它比锁子甲轻得多，只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chain mail. However, it is much lighter than chain mail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Half Plate.name: 半身板甲 Half Plate
Half Plate.description:
半身板甲由全身板甲所用的大部分上半身板片组成，手臂和腿部则使用较轻或较少的钢板防护。它在提供全身板甲部分防护的同时，拥有更好的灵活性和速度。一套这种护甲包含一件内衬的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲}和一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{铁手套}。

Half plate consists of most of the upper body plates used in full plate, with lighter or sparser steel plate protection for the arms and legs. This provides some of the protection of full plate with greater flexibility and speed. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Padded Armor.name: 软甲 Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这种护甲只是一层厚实的绗缝布料，但有时仍会因其极其便宜而被使用。软甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受损和被毁。重甲自带一件软甲内衬，其价格已包含在重甲的价格中，不过当它穿在重甲里面时，会失去舒适特征。如果你的重甲被毁，或者在其他未穿完整重甲的时候，你也可以只穿那件软甲内衬睡觉。这样你就能继续维持魔法护甲的灌注，并从关联重甲上的任何符文之力中受益，但其他人若没有这件软甲内衬，就无法穿戴你的重甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep magic armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Splint Mail.name: 板条甲 Splint Mail
Splint Mail.description:
这种护甲是以锁子甲为基础，并用柔韧、互相咬合的金属板加固而成，这些金属板通常位于穿戴者的躯干、上臂和腿部。一套这种护甲附带一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲}和一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{铁手套}。

This type of armor is chain mail reinforced with flexible, interlocking metal plates, typically located on the wearer's torso, upper arms, and legs. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Repair Toolkit.name: 修理工具包让你能够在旅途中进行简单修理。它包含便携式铁砧、夹钳、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于养护皮革和木材的油料。你可以使用修理工具包，以手艺（技能）来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作的一部分中取出并收起一套穿戴中的修理工具包。 Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
修理工具包让你在旅途中进行简单修理。它包含便携式铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于养护皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理工具包，运用手艺（技能）来修理物品。卓越修理工具包会为该检定提供 +1 物品加值。你可以在使用它的动作中，作为其中的一部分，抽出并收好一套穿戴中的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Repair Toolkit (Superb).name: 修理工具包（卓越）
Repair Toolkit (Superb).description:
修理包让你在旅途中进行简单维修。它包含便携式铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于养护皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理包，运用手艺（技能）来修理物品。精良修理包会为该检定提供 +1 物品加值。你可以在使用它的动作中，作为其中的一部分，抽出并收好一套穿戴中的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. A superb repair kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Buckler.name: 圆盾 Buckler
Buckler.description:
这种非常小的护盾深受决斗家和敏捷、轻甲战士的喜爱。它通常由钢制成，并绑在你的前臂上。只要你的那只手是空着的，或者那只手拿着一个非武器的轻型物体，你就可以用你的圆盾 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{举起护盾}。

硬度HPBT
363

This very small shield is a favorite of duelists and quick, lightly armored warriors. It's typically made of steel and strapped to your forearm. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield} with your buckler as long as you have that hand free or are holding a light object that's not a weapon in that hand.

HardnessHPBT
363

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和大小。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Tower Shield.name: 塔盾 Tower Shield
Tower Shield.description:
这些巨大的盾牌可用于为几乎整个身体提供掩蔽。由于其体型，它们通常由木材制成，并以金属加固。如果你正在使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{寻找掩蔽} 动作，AC 加值提高至 +4。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

These massive shields can be used to provide cover to nearly the entire body. Due to their size, they are typically made of wood reinforced with metal. AC increases to +4 if you are using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} action.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Wooden Shield.name: 木制护盾 Wooden Shield
Wooden Shield.description:
尽管木制盾牌有各种各样的形状和体型，但它们所提供的防护来自其材料的坚固耐用。与钢盾相比，木制盾牌价格更低，但也更容易损坏。

硬度HPBT
3126

Though they come in a variety of shapes and sizes, the protection offered by wooden shields comes from the stoutness of their materials. While wooden shields are less expensive than steel shields, they break more easily.

HardnessHPBT
3126

The Ceiba-Duyue Exchange.name: 木棉河-杜月江瓦市 The Ceiba-Duyue Exchange
The Ceiba-Duyue Exchange.tokenName: 木棉河-杜月江瓦市 The Ceiba-Duyue Exchange

Animal-Turning Fulu.name: 驱兽符 Animal-Turning Fulu
Animal-Turning Fulu.description:
启动 R（专注）

触发 具有动物特征的生物成功对你进行打击。

这张符箓上描绘着惊惧的动物从一个中心人物身边向四面八方逃散（传统上这一形象表现为一名人类猎人，但有时也会被描绘成一具骷髅般的不死生物，甚至是一个手臂细长且破损的邪魔）。你启动这张符箓，获得对抗触发此次打击的 AC +2 物品加值。若这使该次打击未命中，则直到你下个回合开始前，你对触发该效果的生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

Activate R (concentrate)

Trigger A creature with the animal trait successfully Strikes you.

Frightened animals depicted on this fulu flee in all directions from a central figure (traditionally represented by a human hunter, but sometimes depicted as a skeletal undead creature or even a fiend with long, broken arms). You activate this fulu, gaining a +2 item bonus to AC against the triggering Strike. If this causes the Strike to miss, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from the triggering creature until the start of your next turn.

Firecracker Fulu.name: 鞭炮符箓 Firecracker Fulu
Firecracker Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你以所贴附的武器进行攻击掷骰并大成功。

该符箓爆炸，并向区域洒下明亮的火花。被击中的生物额外受到 @Damage[1d4[sonic]] 伤害，且必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:15] 强韧豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮（若大失败则目眩1分钟）。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon.

The fulu explodes and showers the area with bright sparks. The struck creature takes an additional @Damage[1d4[sonic]] damage and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (or dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure).

Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).name: 隐私结界符（走廊）
Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).description:
这张符箓旨在让盗贼、间谍和不受欢迎的关注远离房间。符箓中央绘有一把锁，四周环绕着一圈圈破损的钥匙。将其贴在房间内侧的墙上后，房间内的所有生物在对抗房间外生物的隐秘检定中获得物品加值。

隐私结界符可以护住一个最多 10 平方英尺的房间，提供 +1 物品加值，持续时间为 1 小时。

This fulu seeks to keep thieves, spies, and unwanted attention away from a room. A depiction of a lock appears in the center of this fulu, which is in turn surrounded by circles of broken keys. When applied to a wall inside a room, all creatures within the room gain an item bonus to Stealth checks against creatures outside the room.

The privacy ward fulu can shield a room of up to 10 square feet, grants a +1 item bonus, and has a duration of 1 hour.

Traveler's Fulu.name: 行旅符 Traveler's Fulu
Traveler's Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你尝试辨别方向

需求 你受训于求生。

这张符箓上描绘着一系列星座与箭矢，展现出夜晚天空中天体的移动轨迹。当你启动旅者符箓时，魔法将似曾相识的感觉注入你的思绪，仿佛你以前曾来过这片区域。你此次辨别方向视同持有指南针，而你使用的结果视为比你为辨别方向所进行的求生检定结果高一个成功等级；如果你在求生上是大师，则高两个成功度。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You attempt to Sense Direction

Requirements You're trained in Survival.

This fulu shows a series of constellations and arrows depicting astronomical movements through the night sky. When you activate a traveler's fulu, the magic infuses your mind with sensations of deja vu, as if you'd been in this region before. Your attempt to Sense Direction functions as if you have a compass, and you use the outcome one degree of success better than the result of your Survival check to Sense Direction, or by two degrees of success if you're a master in Survival.

Scroll of Heal (Level 1).name: 治疗术卷轴（1环）
Scroll of Heal (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}

从卷轴施放法术需要你用一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数，使用一次施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已提供任何实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以一个姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Runic Weapon (Level 1).name: 符文武器卷轴（1级）
Scroll of Runic Weapon (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TFitdEOpQC4SzKQQ]{符文武器}

从卷轴施放法术需要你一只手握持卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数，通过施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为施放法术的是你，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时就已提供任何实体材料成分与费用，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。若该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TFitdEOpQC4SzKQQ]{Runic Weapon}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Deafness (Level 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fZPCv2VHuM2yPbC8]{耳聋术}

从卷轴中施放法术需要你用一只手持握卷轴，并使用该法术通常所需动作数的施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴中施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已提供所有实体材料成分与花费，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要制作记载特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴中施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了任何实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

卷轴制作时已提供任何实体材料成分及其花费，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供它们。你必须以一个姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

卷轴制作时就已提供所有实体材料成分和花费，因此从卷轴施放法术时，你不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.N1Z1oLPdBxaSgrEE]{Vampiric Touch}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Alcohol.name: 酒精 Alcohol
Alcohol.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，种类繁多，令人眼花缭乱。一剂酒精的价格取决于具体的饮品种类。处于酒精影响期间，你无法从恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免骰中失败，且该次并非初始豁免，则该苦难的阶段不会提高；提高酒精苦难阶段的唯一方法是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，对抗恐惧效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}、措手不及、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 笨拙2、恶心2和呆滞2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Cold Iron Chunk.name: 寒铁块 Cold Iron Chunk
Cold Iron Chunk.description:
由冷铁制成的武器对恶魔和妖精生物都同样致命。冷铁看起来像普通的铁，但它开采自特别纯净的矿源，并且在几乎不加热或完全不加热的情况下塑形。这个过程极其困难，尤其是对于高品级的冷铁物品而言。

冷铁物品

冷铁物品硬度HPBT
薄型物品

标准品级72814
高品级104020

高品级145628

高品级2811256

Weapons made from cold iron are deadly to demons and fey alike. Cold iron looks like normal iron but is mined from particularly pure sources and shaped with little or no heat. This process is extremely difficult, especially for high-grade cold iron items.

Quartz, rock crystal.name: 石英，岩石 Quartz, rock crystal

Quartz, milky, rose, or smoky.name: 石英（乳白、玫瑰或烟色） Quartz, milky, rose, or smoky

Clothing (Fine).name: 服装（精美） Clothing (Fine)
Clothing (Fine).description:
适合贵族或皇室成员穿着的华美服装，采用昂贵的织物、贵金属和精致复杂的纹样制成。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns.

Clothing (Ordinary).name: 衣物（普通） Clothing (Ordinary)
Clothing (Ordinary).description:
普通服装具有基本裁剪、注重实用性，例如农民的衣服、僧袍或工作服。

Ordinary clothing is functional with basic tailoring, such as peasant garb, monk's robes, or work clothes.

Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).name: 服装（高级时尚精制） Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).description:
适合贵族或王室成员的华丽服装以昂贵的布料、贵金属和精致复杂的纹样制成。穿着这种高级时尚的华丽服装时，你对贵族或其他上流阶层人士进行留下印象检定会获得+1物品加值。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Make an Impression on nobility or other upper-class folk while wearing high-fashion fine clothing.

Silk ceremonial armor.name: 丝绸礼仪护甲 Silk ceremonial armor

Silk fan decorated with turquoise.name: 饰有绿松石的丝绸扇子 Silk fan decorated with turquoise

Silk mask decorated with citrines.name: 饰有黄水晶的丝绸面具 Silk mask decorated with citrines

Explorer's Clothing.name: 探索者服装 Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物旅行。尽管它不是护甲，并且使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然有敏捷上限，并且如果蚀刻了强效符文，仍可为 AC 提供物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Bravo's Brew (Lesser).name: 勇士酿液（次级） Bravo's Brew (Lesser)
Bravo's Brew (Lesser).description:
启动 A (操作)

这瓶泡沫啤酒赋予勇气。饮用这瓶灵药后的接下来1小时内，你的意志豁免获得+1物品加值；若是尝试对抗恐惧进行意志豁免，则改为获得+2加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{效果：喝彩者佳酿}

Activate A (manipulate)

This flask of foaming beer grants courage. For the next hour after drinking this elixir, you gain a +1 item bonus to Will saves, or +2 when attempting Will saves against fear.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{Effect: Bravo's Brew}

Religious Text.name: 宗教文本 Religious Text
Religious Text.description:
这份手稿包含某一宗教的经文。一些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用宗教文本来使用某些能力。宗教文本必须单手持握才能使用。

This manuscript contains scripture of a particular religion. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious text to use certain abilities. A religious text must be held in one hand to use it.

Silver Chunk.name: 银块 Silver Chunk
Silver Chunk.description:
银武器对从魔鬼到狼人等各类生物来说都是一种灾祸术。银制物品不如钢制物品耐用，而低阶银制物品通常仅仅是镀银的。

Staff.name: 法杖 Staff
Staff.description:
这根长木棍可以帮助行走，也能给予强力一击。

This long piece of wood can aid in walking and deliver a mighty blow.

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）启动它，所需动作数与该法术平常所需的动作数相同。

要从卷轴中施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

任何实体材料成分与费用都会在卷轴被制作时提供，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时不需要再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。若该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

卷轴制作时已提供所有实体材料成分与花费，因此你在从卷轴中施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Breathe Fire}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj]{召唤元素生物}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴中施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源相对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了任何实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj]{Summon Elemental}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

卷轴制作时已提供所有实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时不需要再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnaLVgxZ9ryUFmUr]{Restoration}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

任何实体材料成分与花费都已在卷轴制作时提供，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为一个姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]{Laughing Fit}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

卷轴制作时已提供所有实体材料成分和花费，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Item Facade (Level 1).name: 物品伪装卷轴（1级）
Scroll of Item Facade (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4ZGte0i9YbLh4dRi]{物品伪装}

从卷轴施放法术需要单手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）启动它，所需动作数与该法术正常施放时相同。

要从卷轴施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已提供所有实体材料成分与花费，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4ZGte0i9YbLh4dRi]{Item Facade}

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.UirEIHILQgip87qv]{慷慨冲动}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手握持卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的施法（行动）来启动它，所需动作数与该法术相同。

要从卷轴中施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了所有实体材料成分及其花费，因此你在从卷轴中施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为一个姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.UirEIHILQgip87qv]{Charitable Urge}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

卷轴制作时就已提供任何实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴中施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须以一个姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]{Enfeeble}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Tailwind (Level 2).name: 顺风卷轴（2级） Scroll of Tailwind (Level 2)
Scroll of Tailwind (Level 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{尾流术}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启用它。

要从卷轴中施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时就已提供任何实体材料成分和花费，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为一个姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Mother's Coil.prototypeToken: 主母之绾 The Mother's Coil

The Leshy's Salon.name: 莱西茶铺 The Leshy's Salon
The Leshy's Salon.tokenName: 莱西茶铺 The Leshy's Salon
The Leshy's Salon.prototypeToken: 莱西茶铺 The Leshy's Salon

Alchemist's Lab.name: 炼金实验室 Alchemist's Lab
Alchemist's Lab.description:
你需要一间炼金实验室，才能在休整模式中制作炼金物品。

You need an alchemist's lab to Craft alchemical items during downtime.

Alchemist's Lab (Expanded).name: 专家级炼金实验室
Alchemist's Lab (Expanded).description:
你需要一间炼金实验室，才能在休整模式中制作炼金物品。

专家级炼金实验室在制作炼金物品时，对制作检定提供 +1 物品加值。

You need an alchemist's lab to Craft alchemical items during downtime.

An expanded alchemist's lab gives a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to create alchemical items.

Alchemist Goggles.name: 炼金术师护目镜 Alchemist Goggles
Alchemist Goggles.description:
这副黄铜护目镜刻有火焰纹样，并配有厚重的镜片。

佩戴时，它给予你对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作}炼金物品进行制作检定时的+1物品加值。使用炼金炸弹进行打击时，你无视轻度掩蔽。

如果你使用炼金炸弹进行的打击失败（但并非大失败），则此次打击的目标所承受的溅射伤害获得+1物品加值。

These brass goggles are engraved with flame patterns and have thick, heavy lenses.

While worn, they give you a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} alchemical items. When making Strikes with alchemical bombs, you ignore lesser cover.

If your Strike with an alchemical bomb fails (but doesn't critically fail), you gain a +1 item bonus to the splash damage the target of the Strike takes.

Alchemical Chart (Lesser).name: 炼金图表（初级） Alchemical Chart (Lesser)
Alchemical Chart (Lesser).description:
这张坚固而硬挺的炼金图表包含了关于如何快速混合试剂以获得最大效果的速记参考。若你在持有这张图表时使用中 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{快速炼金}，你制造出的4级或以下物品会额外保持效力1轮。

This sturdy, rigid alchemical chart contains shorthand references on quickly mixing reagents for maximum effect. If you hold this chart while using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{Quick Alchemy}, the items you create of 4th level or lower remain potent for 1 additional round.

Flayleaf.name: 剥皮叶 Flayleaf
Flayleaf.description:
剥叶草植物相当常见，不过将其干叶吸食后产生的轻微欣快效果，若来自专门栽培以产生此类效果的植物，则会更强。

启动 A 交互（摄入，吸入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

最大持续时间 4小时

阶段 1 对抗精神效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（1小时）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}，且对抗精神效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（1小时）

阶段 3 疲乏，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}（1小时）

阶段 4 疲乏，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}（1小时）

The flayleaf plant is relatively common, though the mildly euphoric effects of smoking its dried leaves increase when it's sourced from plants specifically grown to produce such effects.

Activate A Interact (Ingested, Inhaled)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 4 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects (1 hour)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects (1 hour)

Stage 3 fatigued and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 4 fatigued, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 hour)

Leaper's Elixir (Lesser).name: 跃者灵药（次级） Leaper's Elixir (Lesser)
Leaper's Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 1 交互

这种令人刺痛的溶液会提高你腿部肌肉的弹性与收缩能力。饮用这瓶灵药后的1分钟内，你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}作为一个单动作来进行，而不是2个动作。如果你这么做，你不需要先进行初始的移动（并且如果你没有移动10尺，也不会失败）。

Activate 1 Interact

This tingly solution increases the elasticity and contraction of your leg muscles. For 1 minute after drinking this elixir, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} as a single action instead of 2 actions. If you do, you don't perform the initial Stride (nor do you fail if you don't Stride 10 feet).

Bottled Catharsis (Lesser).name: 瓶装宣泄（次等） Bottled Catharsis (Lesser)
Bottled Catharsis (Lesser).description:
启动 1 （操作）

这种饮品会释放出汹涌的情绪，帮助重置你的心灵状态。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，该灵药会以2环尝试反制你身上的每个具有情绪（特征）或正对你施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}状态的效果，使用所列的反制环级和调整值，其反制调整值为[[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 2nd-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8} counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.

Infiltrator's Elixir.name: 渗透者灵药 Infiltrator's Elixir
Infiltrator's Elixir.description:
启动 A 交互

渗透者灵药深受间谍和骗子青睐，用于改变你的外观。饮下后，你会变成一个与你体型相同的人形生物，但差异足够明显，以至于别人可能认不出你。如果你不是人形生物，则在游戏主持的裁定下，你可能会呈现出一种更接近自身的形态。灵药的制作者决定你饮下灵药后所变化成的外观的基本特征，包括眼睛颜色、肤色和发色。该灵药无法将你的形态变成某个特定人物。

在形态生效后，你会在接下来的10分钟内保持它。饮用这瓶灵药视为为乔装进行伪装准备。你获得+4状态加值至你的欺瞒DC，以防他人识破你的伪装，即使未受训，你也将自己的等级加入该DC。

Activate A Interact

Favored by spies and tricksters, an infiltrator's elixir is used to alter your appearance. When imbibed, you take the shape of a humanoid creature of your size, but different enough so you might be unrecognizable. If you aren't a humanoid, you might take on a form more similar to your own, at the GM's discretion. The creator of the elixir decides the basics of the appearance you transform into when you imbibe the elixir, including eye color, skin tone, and hair color. The elixir can't change your form into that of a specific person.

After the form takes hold, you retain it for the next 10 minutes. Drinking this elixir counts as setting up a disguise to Impersonate. You gain a +4 status bonus to your Deception DC to avoid others seeing through your disguise, and you add your level to this DC even if untrained.

Surging Serum (Lesser).name: 激涌血清（次等） Surging Serum (Lesser)
Surging Serum (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

非自愿的抽搐与能量激涌会穿过饮用者的身体，帮助恢复正常的肌肉控制。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，它会尝试反制每个正在对你施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态）}状态的效果，使用2环反制，并具有[[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8反制调整值}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control. When you drink this elixir, it attempts to counteract each effect that's inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled} condition on you, using a 2nd-rank counteract and a [[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8 counteract modifier}.

Comprehension Elixir (Lesser).name: 理解灵药（次等） Comprehension Elixir (Lesser)
Comprehension Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

这剂愤懑饮剂开启你对文字力量的心智感知。在饮下这瓶灵药后的所列持续时间内，你可以理解你所阅读的任何词语，只要它们是以一种通用语书写的。该灵药不会自动让你理解密码或极其深奥的段落——你仍然需要尝试一次技能检定来解读文字。持续时间为1分钟。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This bitter draught opens your mind to the potential of the written word. For the listed duration after drinking this elixir, you can understand any words you read, so long as they are written in a common language. This elixir doesn't automatically allow you to understand codes or extremely esoteric passages-you still need to attempt a skill check to Decipher Writing. The duration is 1 minute.

Witchwarg Elixir (Lesser).name: 巫毒座狼灵药（次级） Witchwarg Elixir (Lesser)
Witchwarg Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

这瓶灵药会温暖你的身体核心并改善你的血液循环。24小时内，你受到保护，免受严寒的效果影响。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This elixir warms your core and improves your circulation. For 24 hours, you are protected from the effects of severe cold.

Antidote (Lesser).name: 解毒剂（次级） Antidote (Lesser)
Antidote (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂能保护你对抗毒素。饮用解毒剂后，你在 6 小时内对抗毒素的强韧豁免骰获得 +2 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Antiplague (Lesser).name: 抗疫剂（次级）
Antiplague (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

抗疫剂能够强化身体对疾病的防御。饮用抗疫剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免骰获得+2物品加值；这也适用于你对疾病进展进行的每日豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Arsenic.name: 砒霜 Arsenic
Arsenic.description:
这种毒素是由砷和其他物质构成的混合物。受其影响时，你无法降低你的恶心（状态）。

启动 A （操作）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

潜伏期 10分钟

最长持续时间 5分钟

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1分钟）

This toxin is a compound of arsenic and other substances. You can't reduce your sickened condition while affected.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 5 minutes

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 minute)

Blood Sap.name: 血树液 Blood Sap
Blood Sap.description:
这种强效药物由某种热带藤蔓蒸馏而成，呈深红色糖浆，随着时间推移，会将使用者的嘴唇和牙齿染成鲜艳的红色。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

潜伏期 10分钟

最大持续时间 3小时

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}，武器和徒手攻击掷骰、特技检定以及运动检定获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速1}（1小时）

This potent drug is distilled from a certain tropical vine into a deep-red syrup that, over time, stains the user's lips and teeth a vivid shade of red.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 3 hours

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, +1 item bonus to weapon and unarmed attack rolls, Acrobatics checks, and Athletics checks (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 hour)

Bravo's Brew (Lesser).name: 布拉沃的酿饮（次等） Bravo's Brew (Lesser)
Bravo's Brew (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

这瓶起泡啤酒能赋予勇气。在饮用这瓶灵药后的接下来1小时内，你的意志豁免骰获得+1物品加值；当你尝试对抗恐惧进行意志豁免骰时，则改为获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{效果：喝彩者佳酿}

Activate A (manipulate)

This flask of foaming beer grants courage. For the next hour after drinking this elixir, you gain a +1 item bonus to Will saves, or +2 when attempting Will saves against fear.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{Effect: Bravo's Brew}

Cat's Eye Elixir.name: 猫眼灵药 Cat's Eye Elixir
Cat's Eye Elixir.description:
启动 A（操作）

在你饮用这瓶灵药后，你的视觉变得更加敏锐，并且连最细微的移动都能察觉。

在接下来1分钟内，你以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{藏匿}生物为目标所需的纯骰检定降低为@Check[flat|showDC:all|dc:5]，而且你以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}生物为目标时不需要尝试纯骰检定。此增益仅对与你相距30尺内的生物生效。

Activate A (manipulate)

After you consume this elixir, your vision sharpens and you become sensitive to even the most minute movements.

For the next minute, you reduce the flat check to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures to @Check[flat|showDC:all|dc:5], and you don't need to attempt a flat check to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} creatures. These benefits apply only against creatures within 30 feet of you.

Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser).name: 猎豹灵药（次级） Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)
Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 A （操作）

这种灵药中的酶化合物会强化并刺激你腿部的肌肉。你获得 +5 足的状态加值，施加于你的速度，持续 1 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lNWACCNe9RYgaFxb]{效果：猎豹灵药（次等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs. You gain a +5 foot status bonus to your Speed for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lNWACCNe9RYgaFxb]{Effect: Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)}

Darkvision Elixir (Lesser).name: 黑暗视觉灵药（次级） Darkvision Elixir (Lesser)
Darkvision Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

饮用这瓶灵药后，你在黑暗中的视力会变得更加敏锐。你获得黑暗视觉，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7UL8belWmo7U5YGM]{效果：黑暗视觉灵药（次级）}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

After you drink this elixir, your sight becomes sharper in darkness. You gain darkvision for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7UL8belWmo7U5YGM]{Effect: Darkvision Elixir (Lesser)}

Eagle Eye Elixir (Lesser).name: 鹰眼灵药（次级） Eagle Eye Elixir (Lesser)
Eagle Eye Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

在你喝下这瓶灵药后，你会注意到细微的视觉细节。在接下来1小时内，你的察觉检定获得+1物品加值；当尝试寻找暗门和陷阱时，则改为获得+2。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VOSQ77DV4BnAkP7m]{效果：鹰眼灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details. For the next hour, you gain a +1 item bonus to Perception checks, or +2 when attempting to find secret doors and traps.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VOSQ77DV4BnAkP7m]{Effect: Eagle Eye Elixir}

Elixir of Life (Minor).name: 生命灵药（下等） Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对疾病与毒素的豁免骰获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Alchemist's Toolkit.name: 炼金术师工具包 Alchemist's Toolkit
Alchemist's Toolkit.description:
这套可携带的小瓶与化学品可用于简单的炼金任务。如果你穿戴着炼金术师工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分拔出并收回。

This mobile collection of vials and chemicals can be used for simple alchemical tasks. If you wear your alchemist's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Expanded Alchemist's Lab (Per Day).name: 专家级炼金实验室（每日） Expanded Alchemist's Lab (Per Day)

Spellbook (Blank).name: 法术书（空白） Spellbook (Blank)
Spellbook (Blank).description:
法术书包含学习和准备各种法术所需的书面知识，是法师的必需品（他们通常会免费获得一本），对于想要学习额外法术的其他施法者来说也是一种有用的奢侈品。每本法术书最多可容纳100个法术。所列价格为空白法术书的价格。

A spellbook holds the written knowledge necessary to learn and prepare various spells, a necessity for wizards (who typically get one for free) and a useful luxury for other spellcasters looking to learn additional spells. Each spellbook can hold up to 100 spells. The Price listed is for a blank spellbook.

Basic Crafter's Book.name: 基础工匠之书 Basic Crafter's Book
Basic Crafter's Book.description:
本书包含用于制作《探路者玩家核心》第6章中0级通用物品的配方。

This book contains the formulas for Crafting the 0-level common items in Chapter 6 of the Pathfinder Player Core.

Formula Book (Blank).name: 配方簿（空白） Formula Book (Blank)
Formula Book (Blank).description:
配方簿保存着制作《探路者玩家核心》中通用装备以外物品所需的配方；炼金术士（职业）的角色通常会免费获得一本。每本配方簿最多可收录 100 种不同物品的配方。配方也可以记载在羊皮纸、石板以及几乎任何其他载体上；只要你能随身保存以供查阅，就不需要把它们誊写进某一本特定的书中。

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from Pathfinder Player Core; characters of the alchemist class typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

Religious Text.name: 宗教典籍 Religious Text
Religious Text.description:
这份手稿包含某一特定宗教的经文。一些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用宗教典籍来使用某些能力。宗教典籍必须持于单手中才能使用。

This manuscript contains scripture of a particular religion. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious text to use certain abilities. A religious text must be held in one hand to use it.

Writing Set.name: 书写套装 Writing Set
Writing Set.description:
使用书写套装，你可以起草信件并抄写卷轴。一套套装包括文具，其中有各种纸张和羊皮纸，以及墨水、羽毛笔或蘸水笔、封蜡和一个简单的印章。如果你写了大量内容，你可以用额外的墨水和纸张补充你的套装。

Using a writing set, you can draft correspondence and scribe scrolls. A set includes stationery, including a variety of paper and parchment, as well as ink, a quill or inkpen, sealing wax, and a simple seal. If you've written a large amount, you can refill your kit with extra ink and paper.

Writing Set (Extra Ink and Paper).name: 书写套装（额外墨水和纸张） Writing Set (Extra Ink and Paper)
Writing Set (Extra Ink and Paper).description:
用于补充你的书写套装的额外墨水和纸张。

Extra ink and paper to refill your writing set.

Hide Armor.name: 皮甲 Hide Armor
Hide Armor.description:
这种护甲由毛皮、坚韧的兽皮，有时还有定型的硬化皮革混合制成，凭借其多层皮革提供防护；不过，其厚重笨拙会拖慢穿戴者并降低机动性。

A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时，保有最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Leather Lamellar.name: 皮革札甲 Leather Lamellar
Leather Lamellar.description:
皮札甲是一种由上漆皮革制成的小型长方形甲片，以高品质绳索编缀而成的复合护甲。通常会搭配内衬衣穿着。

Leather lamellar is a composite armor made of small rectangular pieces of lacquered leather laced together with high-quality cord. It's typically worn with an undershirt.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮甲用金属饰钉加固，有时还会配有小型金属板，在保留皮甲大部分灵活性的同时，提供更坚实的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Hide Shield.name: 兽皮盾牌 Hide Shield
Hide Shield.description:
兽皮盾牌有着各种各样的形状和体型。将特殊的鞣制工艺与来自枭熊等生物的坚韧兽皮结合起来，造就了这些格外坚固的盾牌。盾牌经硬化的兽皮仍保有足够的柔韧性，能够减轻重击与捶打攻击的冲击。

Hide shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Specialized tanning techniques combined with tough hides from creatures such as owlbears result in these particularly tough shields. The hardened hide of the shield still has enough flexibility to diminish the impact of battering and pummeling attacks.

Her Fluvial Lady of Souls.name: 魂流圣母堂 Her Fluvial Lady of Souls
Her Fluvial Lady of Souls.tokenName: 司魂娘娘 Lady of Souls

Scroll of Heal (Level 1).name: 治疗术卷轴（1环） Scroll of Heal (Level 1)
Scroll of Heal (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴中施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时就已经提供了所有实体材料成分及其花费，因此你在从卷轴中施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从合集中或合集浏览器中拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并使用该法术通常所需动作数的施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴中施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了所有实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所要求的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2iQKhCQBijhj5Rf3]{Infuse Vitality}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

从卷轴施放法术需要你一手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

要从卷轴施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了任何实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。
