Weapon Potency (+1).name: 武器强效（+1） Weapon Potency (+1)
Weapon Potency (+1).description:
魔法强化使这把武器的打击更加精准。使用这把武器进行攻击检定时获得+1物品加值，且该武器可以蚀刻一枚属性符文。

你可以将武器上已经蚀刻的武器强效符文升级为更强的版本，将现有符文的数值提高为新符文的数值。为此，你必须拥有该更强符文的配方，而此次升级的价格为两种符文价格之间的差额。

制作需求 你在制作方面必须拥有专家熟练度。

Magical enhancements make this weapon strike true. Attack rolls with this weapon gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon can be etched with one property rune.

You can upgrade the weapon potency rune already etched on a weapon to a stronger version, increasing the values of the existing rune to those of the new rune. You must have the formula of the stronger rune to do so, and the Price of the upgrade is the difference between the two runes' Prices.

Craft Requirements You are an expert in Crafting.

Striking.name: 强击 Striking
Striking.description:
强击符文将破坏性的魔法储存在武器中，使该武器造成的伤害骰从一个增加为两个。例如，一把+1强击匕首造成的是2d4伤害，而不是1d4伤害。

你可以将武器上已蚀刻的强击符文升级为更强的版本，使现有符文的数值提升为新符文的数值。你必须拥有更强符文的配方才能这样做，而此次升级的价格是两种符文价格之间的差额。

A striking rune stores destructive magic in the weapon, increasing the weapon damage dice it deals to two instead of one. For instance, a +1 striking dagger would deal 2d4 damage instead of 1d4 damage.

You can upgrade the striking rune already etched on a weapon to a stronger version, increasing the values of the existing rune to those of the new rune. You must have the formula of the stronger rune to do so, and the Price of the upgrade is the difference between the two runes' Prices.

Crying Angel Pendant.name: 泪天使垂饰 Crying Angel Pendant
Crying Angel Pendant.description:
启动 2（专注）

当你启动这枚雪花石膏吊坠时，尝试以医药进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施行急救}，并在此次检定中获得 +1 物品加值。如果你成功，且你当时正试图稳定伤势，则目标恢复 1 生命值，失去濒死（状态）并如常恢复意识。如果你成功，且你当时正试图止血，则流血结束。

Activate 2 (concentrate)

When you activate this alabaster pendant, attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid} using Medicine with a +1 item bonus to the check. If you succeed, and you were trying to stabilize, the target regains 1 Hit Point, losing the dying condition and becoming conscious as normal. If you succeed, and you were trying to stop bleeding, the bleeding ends.

Healing Potion (Lesser).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Lesser)
Healing Potion (Lesser).description:
启动 A (操作)

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时，会感到一阵刺痛般的酥麻感。当你饮用治疗药水时，你恢复 @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] 生命值。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] Hit Points.

Healing Potion (Minor).name: 治疗药水（下等） Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时，会感到一阵刺痛般的麻感。 当你饮用治疗药水时，你恢复 @Damage[1d8[healing]] 生命值。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain @Damage[1d8[healing]] Hit Points.

Vitalizing.name: 活化 Vitalizing
Vitalizing.description:
一把活化武器会随着生命能量脉动，对亡灵额外造成1d6点持续活力伤害。若大成功命中，该亡灵还会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}，直到你下个回合结束。

A vitalizing weapon pulses with vital energy, dealing an extra 1d6 persistent vitality damage to undead. On a critical hit, the undead is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn.

Ghost Touch.name: 幽冥 Ghost Touch
Ghost Touch.description:
刻有此符文的武器能够伤害没有实体形态的生物。幽冥武器对虚体生物尤其有效，因为虚体生物几乎总是对幽冥武器具有特定弱点。

虚体生物可以接触、持握和挥舞幽冥武器（不同于大多数实体物体）。

A weapon etched with this rune can harm creatures without physical form. A ghost touch weapon is particularly effective against incorporeal creatures, which almost always have a specific vulnerability to ghost touch weapons.

Incorporeal creatures can touch, hold, and wield ghost touch weapons (unlike most physical objects).

Religious Symbol (Wooden).name: 宗教圣徽（木制）
Religious Symbol (Wooden).description:
这块木制或银制物品上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。某些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教符号来使用某些能力并施放一些法术。宗教符号可以用链子或别针佩戴在身体上，也可以手持。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Ghost Charge (Lesser).name: 幽灵充能瓶（次级）
Ghost Charge (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这些弹簧装金属罐中装有化学物质与盐类的混合物，能够汲取并瓦解附近的亡灵。

一瓶幽灵充能瓶造成1d8点活力伤害和1点活力溅射伤害，不过和活力伤害通常的规则一样，这种伤害只会伤害亡灵和具有虚空治疗的生物。受到幽灵充能瓶伤害的主要目标会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}，直到你的下一回合开始。

幽灵充能瓶被设计为即使接触到灵体物质也会爆炸，因此特别适合对虚体亡灵造成伤害。

Activate A Strike

These spring-loaded metal canisters contain a mixture of chemicals and salts that drain and disintegrate nearby undead creatures.

A ghost charge deals 1d8 vitality damage and 1 vitality splash damage, though as usual for vitality damage, this damage harms only undead and creatures with void healing. A primary target that takes damage from a ghost charge becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Ghost charges are designed to explode even on contact with a spiritual substance, making them ideal for damaging incorporeal undead.

Ghost Charge (Moderate).name: 幽灵充能瓶（中等）
Ghost Charge (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这些弹簧驱动的金属罐中装有化学物质与盐类的混合物，能够汲取并瓦解附近的亡灵。

一瓶幽灵充能瓶使攻击掷骰获得+1物品加值，造成2d8活力伤害和2点活力溅射伤害，不过如同活力伤害的通常规则一样，这种伤害只会伤害亡灵和具有虚空治疗的生物。受到幽灵充能瓶伤害的主要目标会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}，直到你的下一回合开始。

幽灵充能瓶被设计成即使接触到灵体物质也会爆炸，因此特别适合对虚体亡灵造成伤害。

Activate A Strike

These spring-loaded metal canisters contain a mixture of chemicals and salts that drain and disintegrate nearby undead creatures.

A ghost charge gives a +1 item bonus to attack rolls, deals 2d8 vitality damage and 2 vitality splash damage, though as usual for vitality damage, this damage harms only undead and creatures with void healing. A primary target that takes damage from a ghost charge becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Ghost charges are designed to explode even on contact with a spiritual substance, making them ideal for damaging incorporeal undead.

Her Fluvial Lady of Souls.prototypeToken: 司魂娘娘 Lady of Souls

Alcohol.name: 酒精 Alcohol
Alcohol.description:
酒精是一种通用的物质，种类繁多，令人惊叹。一剂酒精的价格取决于具体的饮品。在受到酒精影响期间，你无法从恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免骰中失败，且不是初始豁免，则该苦难的阶段不会提升；提升酒精苦难阶段的唯一方式是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，对抗恐惧效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}、措手不及、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 笨拙2、恶心2和呆滞2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Flayleaf.name: 剥皮叶 Flayleaf
Flayleaf.description:
剥皮叶植株相对常见，不过吸食其干叶所产生的轻微欣快效果，若来源于专门培育以产生此类效果的植株，则会更强。

启动 A 交互（摄入、吸入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

最长持续时间 4小时

阶段 1 对抗心灵效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（1小时）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，且对抗心灵效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（1小时）

阶段 3 疲乏，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞1}（1小时）

阶段 4 疲乏、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧2}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞2}（1小时）

The flayleaf plant is relatively common, though the mildly euphoric effects of smoking its dried leaves increase when it's sourced from plants specifically grown to produce such effects.

Activate A Interact (Ingested, Inhaled)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 4 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects (1 hour)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects (1 hour)

Stage 3 fatigued and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 4 fatigued, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 hour)

Bloodeye Coffee.name: 血眼咖啡 Bloodeye Coffee
Bloodeye Coffee.description:
一种浓烈的混合饮品，加入了数种在珂莱士的帕迪莎帝国常见的香料，血眼咖啡是整个内海地区广受喜爱的晨间饮料。血眼咖啡的成瘾最大阶段永远不会推进到超过阶段 1。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:14]

潜伏期 10 分钟

最长持续时间 8 小时

阶段 1 当你因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏（状态）} 而在 AC 和豁免上承受减值时，获得对此类 AC 和豁免的 +1 物品加值（10 分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 1}（1 小时）

阶段 3 无法从疲乏中恢复（1 天，之后该药物结束）

A strong blend including several spices common in the Padishah Empire of Kelesh, bloodeye coffee is a favorite morning drink across the Inner Sea region. The maximum addiction stage of bloodeye coffee never progresses beyond stage 1.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:14]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to AC and saves to which you are taking penalties caused by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 3 can't recover from fatigued (1 day, after which the drug ends)

Blood Sap.name: 血树液 Blood Sap
Blood Sap.description:
这种强效药物由某种热带藤蔓蒸馏而成，制成深红色糖浆；随着时间推移，它会把使用者的嘴唇和牙齿染成鲜艳的红色。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

潜伏期 10分钟

最大持续时间 3小时

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{精疲力竭1}，武器和徒手攻击掷骰、特技检定和运动检定获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢1}（1小时）

This potent drug is distilled from a certain tropical vine into a deep-red syrup that, over time, stains the user's lips and teeth a vivid shade of red.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 3 hours

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, +1 item bonus to weapon and unarmed attack rolls, Acrobatics checks, and Athletics checks (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 hour)

Shiver.name: 颤栗 Shiver
Shiver.description:
一种由某些蜘蛛的致幻毒液制成的混合物，颤栗在黑市中很常见。对颤栗的成瘾具有恶性（特征）。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

最长持续时间 4小时

阶段 1 每当你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧} 时，将该状态的值降低1（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}（1小时）

阶段 3 睡着（1小时）

A compound produced from the hallucinogenic venom of certain spiders, shiver is common in black markets. The addiction to shiver has the virulent trait.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 4 hours

Stage 1 whenever you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, reduce that condition's value by 1 (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 hour)

Stage 3 asleep (1 hour)

Arsenic.name: 砒霜 Arsenic
Arsenic.description:
这种毒素是由砒霜和其他物质混合而成的化合物。受其影响时，你不能降低你的恶心（状态）。

启动 A（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

潜伏期 10 分钟

最长持续时间 5 分钟

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1 分钟）

This toxin is a compound of arsenic and other substances. You can't reduce your sickened condition while affected.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 5 minutes

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 minute)

Blight Bomb (Lesser).name: 枯萎炸弹（次等） Blight Bomb (Lesser)
Blight Bomb (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

枯萎炸弹含有会腐蚀血肉的挥发性有毒化学物质。枯萎炸弹造成1d4点毒素伤害、1d4点持续性毒素伤害，以及1点毒素溅射伤害。

Activate A Strike

Blight bombs contain volatile toxic chemicals that rot flesh. A blight bomb deals 1d4 poison damage, 1d4 persistent poison damage, and 1 poison splash damage.

Giant Centipede Venom.name: 巨蜈蚣毒液 Giant Centipede Venom
Giant Centipede Venom.description:
巨蜈蚣毒液会导致严重的肌肉僵硬。

启动 2（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}（1轮）

Giant centipede venom causes severe muscle stiffness.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 round)

Skunk Bomb (Lesser).name: 臭鼬炸弹（次等） Skunk Bomb (Lesser)
Skunk Bomb (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

臭鼬炸弹由地蜥人（特征）、赫兹罗斯，以及其他具有天然或超自然恶臭的生物的浓缩气味制成。该炸弹造成1d4点毒素伤害和1点毒素溅射伤害。任何被炸弹击中或处于其溅射区域内的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:15] 豁免。处于溅射区域内的生物将其豁免结果视为提升一级。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}。

失败 目标陷入恶心1，且在恶心期间 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速1}。

大失败 目标在1轮内 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}，且在恶心期间减速1。

被该炸弹施加恶心的生物会散发一种气味，在恶心（状态）结束后持续10分钟（若其同时也目盲，则持续1小时）。该气味可以通过使用魔法伎俩或类似魔法移除或中和，也可以通过花费10分钟用充足的肥皂和清水擦洗来去除。在气味持续期间，30英尺内的生物都能闻到目标的气味，使得即使嗅觉较弱者也能侦测其存在，并且所有生物在对受影响生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪} 时，都会在其仍带有该气味期间获得+1物品加值。具有不精确或精确嗅觉的生物，使用这种嗅觉侦测目标时的射程加倍。

Activate 1 Strike

Skunk bombs are made from the concentrated odors of xulgaths, hezrous, and other creatures with natural or supernatural stench. The bomb deals 1d4 poison damage and 1 poison splash damage. Any creature hit by the bomb or in its splash area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] saving throw. Creatures in the splash area treat the results of their saving throw as one step better.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target is sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while sickened.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and slowed 1 while sickened.

Creatures sickened by the bomb emit an odor that lasts 10 minutes after the sickened condition ends (or 1 hour if they were also blinded). The odor can be removed or neutralized by using prestidigitation or similar magic or by spending 10 minutes scrubbing with ample soap and water. While the odor lasts, creatures within 30 feet can smell the target, enabling even those with a weak sense of smell to detect its presence, and all creatures gain a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the affected creature for as long as it has the odor. A creature that has imprecise or precise scent doubles the range at which it can detect the target using this scent.

Spear Frog Poison.name: 矛蛙毒素 Spear Frog Poison
Spear Frog Poison.description:
启动 2（操作）

从毒矛蛙的皮肤上小心提取而来的这种毒素，会导致灼烧般的皮疹和四肢无力。每只青蛙产出的毒素足以用于制作一剂矛蛙毒素。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}（1轮）

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Carefully harvested from the skin of the poisonous spear frog, this toxin causes a burning rash and weakness in the limbs. Each frog yields enough toxin to Craft one dose of spear frog poison.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Belladonna.name: 颠茄 Belladonna
Belladonna.description:
启动 1（操作）

颠茄有时被称为“致命龙葵”，是一种广泛可得的毒素，由一种类似番茄的植物制成。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

潜伏期 10分钟

最长持续时间 30分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}（10分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}（10分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}，并且恶心1（1分钟）

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Sometimes called "deadly nightshade," belladonna is a widely available toxin produced from a plant similar to a tomato.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 30 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, and sickened 1 (1 minute)

Black Adder Venom.name: 黑蝰蛇毒液 Black Adder Venom
Black Adder Venom.description:
蝰蛇毒液是一种简单但有效的方式，可用于强化武器。

启动 2（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最长持续时间 3轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]]伤害（1轮）

Adder venom is a simple but effective way to enhance a weapon.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 3 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Blight Bomb (Moderate).name: 枯萎炸弹（中级）
Blight Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

枯萎炸弹装有会腐蚀血肉的不稳定有毒化学物质。枯萎炸弹造成 2d4 毒素伤害、2d4 持续性毒素伤害，以及 2 点毒素溅射伤害。你获得攻击掷骰的 +1 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Blight bombs contain volatile toxic chemicals that rot flesh. A blight bomb deals 2d4 poison damage, 2d4 persistent poison damage, and 2 poison splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Cytillesh Oil.name: 西提莱什油 Cytillesh Oil
Cytillesh Oil.description:
启动 2（操作）

这种浓稠物质是从能够掠夺心智的赛提雷什真菌中蒸馏而来，不过它不具备改变记忆的能力。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

最长持续时间 4轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d10[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d8[poison]]伤害（1轮）

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This thick substance is distilled from the mind-robbing cytillesh fungus, though it lacks memory-altering capabilities.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d10[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Dread Ampoule (Moderate).name: 恐惧安瓿（中级）
Dread Ampoule (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这个烧瓶中装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰大脑的正常活动。恐惧安瓿造成 2d6 心灵伤害和 2 点心灵溅射伤害。

命中时，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 1}；若大成功命中，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 2}。许多类型还会给予攻击掷骰的物品加值。

你获得攻击掷骰的 +1 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 2d6 mental damage and 2 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Graveroot.name: 墓根 Graveroot
Graveroot.description:
掘墓根灌木产出的不透明白色树液会使心智混乱。

启动 2（操作）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

最大持续时间 4轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d10[poison]]伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 1}（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]]伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 2}（1轮）

The opaque white sap from the graveroot shrub clouds the mind.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d10[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Skunk Bomb (Moderate).name: 臭鼬炸弹（中级）
Skunk Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

臭鼬炸弹由地蜥人（特征）、赫兹罗斯，以及其他拥有天然或超自然恶臭的生物的浓缩气味制成。该炸弹使攻击掷骰获得+1物品加值，并造成2d4毒素伤害和2点毒素溅射伤害。任何被炸弹击中或位于其溅射区域内的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:17] 豁免。处于溅射区域内的生物将其豁免结果视为提升一级。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

失败 目标陷入恶心1，并且在恶心期间 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速1}。

大失败 目标 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1轮，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，并且在恶心期间减速1。

因该炸弹而恶心的生物会散发一种气味，该气味会在恶心（状态）结束后持续10分钟（若其同时目盲，则持续1小时）。该气味可以通过使用魔法伎俩或类似魔法，或花费10分钟用充足的肥皂和清水擦洗来去除或中和。在气味持续期间，30尺内的生物都能闻到目标，使得即使嗅觉微弱者也能侦测到其存在，并且所有生物在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪} 受影响生物时，只要它仍带有这种气味，都会获得+1物品加值。拥有模糊或精准嗅觉的生物，使用这种嗅觉侦测目标时，其侦测距离加倍。

Activate 1 Strike

Skunk bombs are made from the concentrated odors of xulgaths, hezrous, and other creatures with natural or supernatural stench. The bomb grants a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 2d4 poison damage and 2 poison splash damage. Any creature hit by the bomb or in its splash area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] saving throw. Creatures in the splash area treat the results of their saving throw as one step better.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target is sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while sickened.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and slowed 1 while sickened.

Creatures sickened by the bomb emit an odor that lasts 10 minutes after the sickened condition ends (or 1 hour if they were also blinded). The odor can be removed or neutralized by using prestidigitation or similar magic or by spending 10 minutes scrubbing with ample soap and water. While the odor lasts, creatures within 30 feet can smell the target, enabling even those with a weak sense of smell to detect its presence, and all creatures gain a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the affected creature for as long as it has the odor. A creature that has imprecise or precise scent doubles the range at which it can detect the target using this scent.

Familiar Tattoo.name: 魔宠刺青 Familiar Tattoo
Familiar Tattoo.description:
这种刺青通常由一只小动物的图像，或以符文写成的魔宠名字组成。你的魔宠可以融入你的魔宠刺青中，以附着在你的皮肤上被携带。魔宠必须花费一个单动作——该动作具有魔法、移动和变化系特征——才能融入或离开你的刺青。它必须与你相邻才能融入你的刺青，并且会从你相邻的一个开放空间离开刺青。魔宠的任何伙伴物品都会保留在它身上，但它不能一同携带任何其他物品。如果你没有魔宠，或你的魔宠在整个刺青过程中没有始终在场，这个刺青便是非魔法的。如果你的魔宠死亡，这个刺青会失去其魔法，变成普通刺青。

This tattoo typically consists of an image of a small animal or of a familiar's name written in runes. Your familiar can meld into your familiar tattoo to be carried in your skin. The familiar must spend a single action, which has the magical, move, and transmutation traits, to meld into or exit your tattoo. It must be adjacent to you to meld into your tattoo, and it exits your tattoo in an open space adjacent to you. Any of the familiar's companion items remain on it, but it can't carry any other items with it. This tattoo is non-magical if you don't have a familiar or if your familiar doesn't remain present for the entire tattooing process. If your familiar dies, this tattoo loses its magic and becomes a mundane tattoo.

Spider Lily Tattoo.name: 彼岸花刺青 Spider Lily Tattoo
Spider Lily Tattoo.description:
彼岸花刺青将你标记为胡婆婆网络中一名受信任的成员。这个绯红色的刺青会在施加后的一天内褪去并变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，只有在你启动它、获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭（状态）}状态，或死亡时才会再次显现。毁灭值越高，颜色就越鲜艳。

如果你的刺青清晰可见，你对所有能看见该刺青的生物进行威吓检定时获得+1物品加值；但对于那些理解彼岸花刺青真实含义的人（包括柳岸镇的所有居民），你进行交涉检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}时，会承受–1物品减值。

启动 1 想象（专注）

需求 你的刺青当前不可见

效果 你使刺青变得可见。你可以再次使用此次启动使刺青变为不可见，除非你具有毁灭状态。

启动 f 想象（专注）

频率 每天一次

触发 一名不死生物首次侦测到你

效果 彼岸花刺青操作你的生命力，使你在短时间内看起来像是不死生物。对触发的那名不死生物的察觉DC尝试一次@Check[deception|defense:perception]检定。若成功，触发的那名不死生物会相信你同样是不死生物——无心智的不死生物很可能会忽视你，而有智能的不死生物则可能会以好奇或困惑作出反应。你可以在之后每一轮以一个单动作继续尝试欺瞒检定来维持该效果，持续最多1分钟。

The spider lily tattoo marks you as a trusted member of Granny Hu's network. This crimson tattoo fades and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} within a day of being applied, reappearing only when you Activate it, when you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} condition, or when you die. The higher the doomed value, the more vivid the color.

If your tattoo is plainly visible, you gain a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks against all creatures that can see the tattoo, but you take a –1 item penalty to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on those who understand the actual meaning of the spider lily tattoo (including all of Willowshore's citizens).

Activate 1 envision (concentrate)

Requirements Your tattoo isn't currently visible

Effect You make the tattoo visible. You can use this activation again to make the tattoo not visible, unless you have the doomed condition.

Activate f envision (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger An undead creature detects you for the first time

Effect The spider lily tattoo manipulates your life force to make you appear to be undead for a short time. Attempt a @Check[deception|defense:perception] check against the triggering undead creature's Perception DC. On a success, the triggering undead believes you're undead as well—a mindless undead is likely to ignore you, while a sapient undead might react with curiosity or confusion. You can continue attempting Deception checks each round as a single action to Sustain the effect for up to 1 minute.

Thieves' Tools (Concealable).name: 盗贼工具（可隐藏） Thieves' Tools (Concealable)
Thieves' Tools (Concealable).description:
你需要盗贼工具，才能使用贼活（技能）进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。渗透者盗贼工具为撬锁和停用装置的检定提供 +1 物品加值。

这套工具比大多数盗贼工具更小巧，且以更坚固的材料制成，因此其中的物品更容易隐藏。你在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{藏匿} 这些工具的隐秘检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

如果你的盗贼工具已破损，你可以用适用于你的工具的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TxMFNfkoccirCitP]{替换撬锁器} 更换锁匠工具，从而将其修好；这不需要使用“修理”动作。

You need thieves' tools to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. Infiltrator thieves' tools add a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks and Disable Devices.

Smaller and made of stronger materials than most sets of thieves' tools, the items in this kit are much easier to conceal. You gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{Conceal} these tools.

If your thieves' tools are broken, you can repair them by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TxMFNfkoccirCitP]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your tools; this doesn't require using the Repair action.

Thieves' Tools (Concealable Picks).name: 盗贼工具（便于隐藏的撬锁工具）
Thieves' Tools (Concealable Picks).description:
这些是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ejmv9IHGp9Ad9dgu]{盗贼工具（便于隐藏的撬锁工具）} 的替换用撬锁工具。

These are replacement picks for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ejmv9IHGp9Ad9dgu]{Thieves' Tools (Concealable)}.

Yellow Musk Poison.name: 黄麝香毒素 Yellow Musk Poison
Yellow Musk Poison.description:
黄麝香藤蔓的花粉会扰乱心智。

启动 A 交互（吸入）

豁免检定 @Check[will|dc:16]

最大持续时间 2 轮

阶段 1 因毒云而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}（1 轮）

阶段 2 因毒云而着迷，且除了向毒云源头更靠近地移动外，不能使用任何动作（1 轮）

The powdered pollen from a yellow musk creeper addles the mind.

Activate A Interact (Inhaled)

Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 2 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the poison cloud (1 round)

Stage 2 fascinated by the poison cloud, and can use no actions but to move closer to the cloud's point of origin (1 round)

Looter's Lethargy.name: 掠夺者的倦怠 Looter's Lethargy
Looter's Lethargy.description:
启动 3（操作）

被称为“掠夺者迟滞”的毒素能确保窃贼没有足够的力量带着偷来的宝藏逃走。它通常被涂抹在锁、箱子，甚至贵重物品本身上；这种毒素会缓慢削弱接触者的力量。附近的守护者随后只需沿着沿途丢弃贵重物品形成的小路前进，就能找到虚弱的入侵者。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 1小时

阶段 1 负载上限减少 3（1分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，负载上限减少 4（10分钟）

阶段 3 措手不及，负载上限减少 5（10分钟）

Activate 3 (manipulate)

The poison known as looter's lethargy ensures no thieves are strong enough to walk off with pilfered treasures. Commonly smeared on locks, chests, and even valuable items themselves, the poison slowly saps the strength of those who touch it. Nearby guardians can then simply follow the resulting trail of discarded valuables to find the weakened trespasser.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 1 hour

Stage 1 reduce Bulk limit by 3 (1 minute)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, reduce Bulk limit by 4 (10 minutes)

Stage 3 off-guard, reduce Bulk limit by 5 (10 minutes)

Black Smear Poison.name: 黑色涂抹毒素 Black Smear Poison
Black Smear Poison.description:
许多凯利格尼斯人会使用一种由地下真菌制成的衰弱性毒素。

启动 3 交互（损伤）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}（1轮）

阶段 2 同阶段1

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱2}（1轮）

Many calignis use a debilitating poison crafted from subterranean fungi.

Activate 3 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 As stage 1

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Vexing Vapor (Lesser).name: 恼人蒸汽（次级）
Vexing Vapor (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

这个烧瓶中装有由有毒浆果制成的细红色粉末。次级烦扰蒸汽炸弹造成 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 伤害，并造成 @Damage[(1[splash])[mental]]{1点精神溅射伤害}。命中时，目标在进行具有专注（特征）的动作前，必须先成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 检定。该效果持续至其下个回合结束（若为大成功则持续1分钟）。

Activate 1 Strike

This flask contains a fine red powder made from toxic berries. A lesser vexing vapor bomb deals @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage and @Damage[(1[splash])[mental]]{1 mental splash damage}. On a hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] check before taking actions with the concentrate trait. This lasts until the end of its next turn (1 minute on a critical hit).

Pernicious Spore Bomb (Lesser).name: 恶性孢子炸弹（次级）
Pernicious Spore Bomb (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

这个烧瓶内含快速生长的霉菌孢子，它们会迅速扎根，但也会很快腐烂消失。该炸弹造成1点毒素伤害、1d4点持续穿刺伤害，以及1点毒素溅射伤害。除非大失败，否则目标生物空间中的1个方格会被植被覆盖，成为困难地形，持续1轮。

Activate 1 Strike

This flask contains fast-growing mold spores, which quickly take root but just as quickly rot away. The bomb deals 1 poison damage, 1d4 persistent piercing damage, and 1 poison splash damage. Except on a critical failure, one square of the target creature's space is coated in vegetation, becoming difficult terrain for 1 round.

Grolna.name: 格罗尔娜 Grolna
Grolna.description:
启动 A 交互

这种由卡利格尼制作的暗绿色药物会以令心智迟钝为代价，极大强化生物的嗅觉感官。格罗尔纳因能将原本平淡的气味与味道转变为强烈而令人欣快的体验，而在幽暗地域广受欢迎；它也能成为追踪者的绝佳协助，让想循着气味小路追猎目标的人把普通类人生物变成高效的猎犬。

若在先前一剂格罗尔纳的第1阶段效果影响期间再次服用额外剂量，则会重置第1阶段的持续时间，并推迟第2阶段效果的潜伏期。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:13]

潜伏期 1分钟

最长持续时间 8小时

阶段 1 获得嗅觉（模糊）30尺，获得求生检定追踪踪迹时的+3物品加值，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 1}（1小时）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 2}（6小时）

Activate A Interact

This caligni-made, murky-green drug supercharges a creature's olfactory senses at the expense of dulling their mind. Popular throughout the Darklands for its ability to transform normally dull scents and flavors into intense, euphoric experiences, grolna can also be a great aid to trackers who want to follow scent trails, turning ordinary humanoids into effective bloodhounds.

Taking an additional dose of grolna while affected by the effects of stage 1 of a previous dose resets the duration of stage 1 and postpones the onset of stage 2 effects.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:13]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 gain scent (imprecise) 30 feet, gain a +3 item bonus to Survival checks to follow tracks, and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (6 hours)

Pernicious Spore Bomb (Moderate).name: 恶性孢子炸弹（中等）
Pernicious Spore Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

这个烧瓶装有快速生长的霉菌孢子，它们会迅速扎根，但也会同样迅速腐烂消散。你获得攻击掷骰的+1物品加值。该炸弹造成2点毒素伤害、2d4持续穿刺伤害，以及2点毒素溅射伤害。除非大失败，否则该炸弹的溅射区域会覆满植被，变为困难地形，持续1轮。

Activate 1 Strike

This flask contains fast-growing mold spores, which quickly take root but just as quickly rot away. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls. The bomb deals 2 poison damage, 2d4 persistent piercing damage, and 2 poison splash damage. Except on a critical failure, the bomb's splash area is coated in vegetation, becoming difficult terrain for 1 round.

Toad Tears.name: 蟾蜍之泪 Toad Tears
Toad Tears.description:
蟾蜍之泪可以与任何其他食物或饮品混合，但这种毒素也可以直接摄入。精炼巨蟾蜍毒素的过程会减弱其致命特性，因此蟾蜍之泪很少会直接致死。然而，接触蟾蜍之泪的人往往会失去对自己动作的控制，使其仍然是一种危险的毒素。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

潜伏期 5分钟

最大持续时间 30分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 1}（10分钟）

阶段 2 呆滞 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}（1分钟）

Toad tears can be mixed with any other foodstuff or drink, but the poison can also be ingested as is. The process of refining giant toad poison lessens its deadly qualities, and as a result, toad tears are rarely directly fatal. Yet those who are exposed to toad tears often lose control of their actions, making it a dangerous poison nevertheless.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Onset 5 minutes

Maximum Duration 30 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (10 minutes)

Stage 2 stupefied 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} (1 minute)

Lethargy Poison.name: 昏睡毒素 Lethargy Poison
Lethargy Poison.description:
昏睡毒素常被袭击者用于打了就跑的战术，因为他们想让受害者活着；伏击者会撤退，直到毒素发作，受害者失去意识。再次接触昏睡毒素不会要求目标进行额外的豁免骰；只有在对持续中的接触进行豁免检定时失败，才会使其中毒阶段推进。

启动 2（操作）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 4小时

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速1}（1分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，且不能通过察觉检定醒来（1轮）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，且不能通过察觉检定醒来（[[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4小时}）。

Lethargy poison is commonly used in hit-and-run tactics by attackers who want their victims alive; the ambusher retreats until the poison sets in and the victim falls unconscious. Further exposure to lethargy poison does not require the target to attempt additional saving throws; only failing an saving throw against an ongoing exposure can progress its stage.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 4 hours

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} with no Perception check to wake up (1 round)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} with no Perception check to wake up ([[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}).

Bewitching Bloom (Cherry Blossom).name: 妖艳绽放（樱花）
Bewitching Bloom (Cherry Blossom).description:
处于休眠状态时，这个纹身看起来像一朵简单的花苞，但在启动后，花朵会迅速绽放，并保持该状态直到你下一次进行每日准备。这些花朵是色彩鲜艳、优雅的樱花象征。

启动 2 想象

频率 每天一次

效果 选择一个你在30尺内能看见的自愿盟友。该盟友理解生命的短暂本质并接受命运。在1分钟内，该盟友进行的任何复苏检定的难度等级为10，而非10 + 该盟友的濒死值。樱花的启动可以以一名@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}或濒死的盟友为目标。

While dormant, this tattoo appears to be a simple flower bud, but when activated the flower swiftly blossoms, remaining that way until the next time you make your daily preparations. These blooms are colorful, elegant representations of cherry blossoms.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect Choose a willing ally you can see within 30 feet. The ally understands the fleeting nature of life and accepts fate. For 1 minute, any recovery checks the ally attempts have a DC of 10 instead of 10 + the ally's dying value. The cherry blossom's activation can target an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or dying ally.

Bewitching Bloom (Lilac).name: 妖艳绽放（丁香）
Bewitching Bloom (Lilac).description:
当处于休眠状态时，这个纹身看起来像一个简单的花蕾，但在启动后，花朵会迅速绽放，并保持这种状态，直到你下一次进行每日准备。这些花朵是色彩鲜艳、优雅的丁香花形象。

启动 2 想象

频率 每天一次

效果 选择一个你在30尺内看得见且自愿的盟友。记忆浮现在该盟友的脑海表层。该盟友尝试进行回忆知识，且由于这些鲜活的记忆，在此次检定中获得+2状态加值。

While dormant, this tattoo appears to be a simple flower bud, but when activated the flower swiftly blossoms, remaining that way until the next time you make your daily preparations. These blooms are colorful, elegant representations of lilac flowers.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect Choose a willing ally you can see within 30 feet. Memories bubble to the surface of your ally's mind. The ally attempts to Recall Knowledge with a +2 status bonus to the check from these vibrant memories.

Frostwalker Pattern.name: 霜行者纹样 Frostwalker Pattern
Frostwalker Pattern.description:
北方民族设计这种纹身以抵御寒冷天气，通常采用由直线与旋涡组合而成的几何图案。该纹身使你免受严寒环境寒冷对你造成的任何伤害，并将极寒对你造成的伤害降低为等同于严寒的程度。

启动 1（专注）

频率 每天一次

效果 直到你的下个回合结束，你无视冰雪造成的困难地形和高等困难地形，并且在穿越冰面时不会有坠落风险。

Northern peoples design these tattoos to protect against cold weather, typically in geometric patterns with a combination of straight lines and whorls. This tattoo negates any damage you take from severe environmental cold and reduces damage you take from extreme cold to equal that of severe cold.

Activate 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect Until the end of your next turn, you ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and don't risk falling when crossing ice.

Memoir Map.name: 回忆地图 Memoir Map
Memoir Map.description:
你在获得这道纹身之后的人生旅程与重大事件都会显现在其上，你的人生故事被描绘在你的皮肤上。每当你前往某个新的地方，或完成某件对你而言值得铭记的事时，就会出现一个图案或符号来代表该事件。这些图像的位置在地点对应上是相对准确的，但距离并不精确。回忆地图起始于一个代表你接受纹身时所在位置的图标，通常位于心口上方，并从那里不断延伸。前往其他位面会使一块新的部分出现在你身体的另一处，以代表那个位面。如果你想记录自己在获得回忆地图之前的人生经历，你可以让纹身师为地图添加装饰，以表现过去的事件。

Your journeys and the major events in your life that occur after you obtain this tattoo appear on it, your life story traced upon your skin. Each time you journey somewhere new or accomplish something noteworthy to you, a design or symbol appears, representing the event. The positions of these images are relative in location, but measurements aren't exact. A memoir map starts with an icon representing your location when you receive the tattoo, usually over the heart, and grows from there. Traveling to another plane causes a new portion to appear on a different part of your body to represent that plane. If you want a record of your life before you receive your memoir map, you can have the tattoo artist embellish the map to represent past events.

Mortal Chronicle.name: 凡人编年史 Mortal Chronicle
Mortal Chronicle.description:
在宿命论者和能获得复活魔法许可的冒险者中，凡人纪事通常看起来像墓碑、葬礼铭牌，或是写有佩戴者姓名或绰号的简单卷轴。如果你死亡，你的死亡日期和死因就会出现在这枚纹身上。死因会以字面且不精确的方式显示，无法指出具体细节；它可能写着“无头亡灵”或“被烧死”，但不会写成“被阿米里斩首”或“被火谋杀”。如果你被复活，纹身上的一个记号会标明你逆转死亡的日期。之后，这枚纹身会进一步扩展，以便在你的下一次死亡到来时将其列出。

Common among fatalists and adventurers with access to resurrection magic, mortal chronicles look like tombstones, funeral plaques, or simple scrolls bearing the wearer's name or nickname. If you die, the date and cause of your death appear on the tattoo. The cause is literal and inexact, failing to identify specifics; it could read "beheaded" or "immolated" but not "beheaded by Amiri" or "murdered with fire." If you're raised from the dead, a mark on the tattoo indicates the date you reversed your death. The tattoo then expands enough to list your next death when it comes.

Thieves' Toolkit.name: 盗贼工具包 Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包，才能以贼活（技能）进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包破损，你可以用适合你的工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器}修复它；这不需要使用修理动作。如果你穿戴着盗贼工具包，你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分将其取出并收回。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Triangular Teeth.name: 三角牙齿 Triangular Teeth
Triangular Teeth.description:
象征鲨鱼牙齿的一排排三角形保护你免于危险，并让你能够对那些试图伤害你的人进行猛烈反击。航海者，尤其是米纳塔海域上的人，会将这些纹身刺成带有多排规则三角形的图案。你在水域中导航时的求生检定获得+1物品加值。

启动 R（专注）

频率 每天一次

触发 你将会被一次针对你AC的攻击命中

效果 你对该次攻击的AC获得+1环境加值；若攻击者位于水中，或具有两栖、水栖或水（特征），则此环境加值改为+2。无论该次攻击命中还是未命中，在你的下个回合结束前，你对该攻击者进行的下一次打击的伤害获得+2状态加值。

Rows of triangles symbolizing shark teeth protect you from danger and enable you to take fierce retaliation against those who try to harm you. Seafarers, especially those on the seas of Minata, wear these tattoos in patterns, with multiple rows of regular triangles. You gain a +1 item bonus to Survival checks to navigate bodies of water.

Activate R (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You would be hit by an attack against your AC

Effect You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the attack, or a +2 circumstance bonus if the attacker is in water or has the amphibious, aquatic, or water trait. Whether the attack hits or misses, you gain a +2 status bonus to damage with the next Strike you make against the attacker before the end of your next turn.

Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator Picks).name: 盗贼工具包（潜入者撬锁工具） Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator Picks)
Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator Picks).description:
这些是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6nrCxNQFycUVFOV2]{盗贼工具包（渗透者）} 的替换撬锁器。

These are replacement picks for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6nrCxNQFycUVFOV2]{Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator)}.

Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator).name: 盗贼工具包（渗透者） Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator)
Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator).description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包，才能以贼活（技能）进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。渗透者盗贼工具包会为撬锁和停用装置的检定提供+1物品加值。

如果你的盗贼工具包破损，你可以用适用于你的工具的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.BznmPaRjI4Orb0IH]{替换撬锁器}修复它；这不需要使用修理动作。如果你穿戴着盗贼工具包，你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分将其取出并收回。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. An infiltrator thieves' toolkit add a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks and Disable Devices.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.BznmPaRjI4Orb0IH]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your tools; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).name: 盗贼工具包（替换撬锁器） Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).description:
这些是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{盗贼工具包}的替换撬锁器。

These are replacement picks for a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{Thieves' Toolkit}.

Unbreakable Heart.name: 不屈之心 Unbreakable Heart
Unbreakable Heart.description:
你所爱之人的名字装饰着这幅风格化的心形图像。不屈之心纹身只能在成功完成@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dZV8nZUKRhGIr6g9]{Heartbond}仪式后获得，并作为你的信物。另一名参与者如果愿意，也可以拥有纹身以外的其他信物。如果你拥有不止一个heartbond，你持有的每一个不屈之心都只能作为其中一个的信物。自你身上流露出的爱情使你在交涉检定上获得+1物品加值。当你使用heartbond的行动来知晓你所爱之人当前的状态时，你还可以给予他们一份小小的赋礼，每次从以下选项中选择一项。在知晓他们的状态后再作出选择。

  • 你所爱之人获得5点临时生命值，持续10分钟。
  • 该纹身对你所爱之人施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{神导术}。
  • 该纹身对你所爱之人施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{稳定伤势}。
  • 该纹身对你所爱之人的heartbond信物施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光}

The name of your beloved adorns this stylized image of a heart. An unbreakable heart tattoo can be received only at the end of a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dZV8nZUKRhGIr6g9]{Heartbond} ritual, serving as your token. The other participant can have a token other than a tattoo if they wish. If you have more than one heartbond, each unbreakable heart you have serves as a token for only one of them. The love exuding from you grants you a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks. When you use heartbond's activity to learn your beloved's present state, you can also grant them a small gift, choosing from the following options each time. Make your choice after learning their state.

  • Your beloved gains 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 10 minutes.
  • The tattoo casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} on your beloved.
  • The tattoo casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize} on your beloved.
  • The tattoo casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} on your beloved's token from heartbond

Dread Ampoule (Lesser).name: 恐惧安瓿（次等） Dread Ampoule (Lesser)
Dread Ampoule (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这个烧瓶中装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰正常的大脑活动。恐惧安瓿造成1d6心灵伤害和1点心灵溅射伤害。

命中时，目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧1}，若为大成功则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧2}。许多种类还会给予攻击检定物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 1d6 mental damage and 1 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

Navigator's Star.name: 领航者之星 Navigator's Star
Navigator's Star.description:
一个纹在手背上的星星，通常位于拇指和食指之间，能让你不偏离正确的道路。

启动 2（专注，操作）

效果 当你举起手并让那颗星进入视野时，你会知道自己面朝哪个方向。

A star inked on the back of the hand, usually between the thumb and forefinger, keeps you on the right path.

Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect As you hold up your hand and align the star in view, you learn which direction you're facing.

The Happy Kappa.name: 乐天河童 The Happy Kappa
The Happy Kappa.tokenName: 乐天河童 The Happy Kappa

1 Hour Bathhouse Soak.name: 1小时澡堂浸泡 1 Hour Bathhouse Soak

The Happy Kappa.prototypeToken: 乐天河童 The Happy Kappa

Nine Ear Shrine.name: 九耳神龛 Nine Ear Shrine
Nine Ear Shrine.tokenName: 九耳神龛 Nine Ear Shrine

Animal-Turning Fulu.name: 驱兽符 Animal-Turning Fulu
Animal-Turning Fulu.description:
启动 R（专注）

触发 一个具有动物特征的生物成功对你进行打击。

这张符箓上描绘着惊惧的动物，它们从一个中心人物身边向四面八方逃散（传统上这一形象表现为一名人类猎人，但有时也会描绘成一只骷髅般的不死生物，甚至是一个双臂修长且破损的邪魔）。你启动这张符箓，获得对抗此次触发打击的 AC +2 物品加值。如果这使得该打击未命中，则直到你的下个回合开始前，你对该触发生物变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Activate R (concentrate)

Trigger A creature with the animal trait successfully Strikes you.

Frightened animals depicted on this fulu flee in all directions from a central figure (traditionally represented by a human hunter, but sometimes depicted as a skeletal undead creature or even a fiend with long, broken arms). You activate this fulu, gaining a +2 item bonus to AC against the triggering Strike. If this causes the Strike to miss, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from the triggering creature until the start of your next turn.

Firecracker Fulu.name: 鞭炮符箓 Firecracker Fulu
Firecracker Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你使用所贴附的武器进行攻击掷骰时获得大成功。

符箓爆炸，向区域洒下明亮的火花。被击中的生物额外受到 @Damage[1d4[sonic]] 伤害，并且必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:15] 强韧豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮（若为大失败，则目眩1分钟）。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon.

The fulu explodes and showers the area with bright sparks. The struck creature takes an additional @Damage[1d4[sonic]] damage and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (or dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure).

Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).name: 隐私结界符（走廊） Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway)
Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).description:
这张符箓旨在让盗贼、间谍和不受欢迎的关注远离一个房间。符箓中央绘有一把锁，周围环绕着一圈圈破损的钥匙。当它被贴在房间内的一面墙上时，房间内的所有生物在对抗房间外生物的隐秘检定上获得物品加值。

隐私结界符可以护卫一个最多10平方英尺的房间，提供+1物品加值，且持续时间为1小时。

This fulu seeks to keep thieves, spies, and unwanted attention away from a room. A depiction of a lock appears in the center of this fulu, which is in turn surrounded by circles of broken keys. When applied to a wall inside a room, all creatures within the room gain an item bonus to Stealth checks against creatures outside the room.

The privacy ward fulu can shield a room of up to 10 square feet, grants a +1 item bonus, and has a duration of 1 hour.

Traveler's Fulu.name: 行旅符 Traveler's Fulu
Traveler's Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你尝试辨别方向

需求 你已受训于求生。

这张符箓上绘有一系列星座与箭矢，描绘出夜晚天空中天体的移动轨迹。当你启动行旅符时，魔法会将似曾相识的感觉注入你的心灵，仿佛你以前曾到过这片区域。你尝试辨别方向时，效果如同拥有一个指南针，并且你使用的结果视为比你进行辨别方向的求生检定结果高一个成功等级；若你在求生上达到大师，则高两个成功等级。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You attempt to Sense Direction

Requirements You're trained in Survival.

This fulu shows a series of constellations and arrows depicting astronomical movements through the night sky. When you activate a traveler's fulu, the magic infuses your mind with sensations of deja vu, as if you'd been in this region before. Your attempt to Sense Direction functions as if you have a compass, and you use the outcome one degree of success better than the result of your Survival check to Sense Direction, or by two degrees of success if you're a master in Survival.

Hunter's Bane.name: 猎人克星 Hunter's Bane
Hunter's Bane.description:
使用方式 贴附于护甲

启动 F（专注）

触发 一个处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{藏匿}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪}状态的敌人以一次攻击命中你

需求 你受训于求生

这件护符是一枚由干燥稻草碎片交织而成的圆环。当你启动猎人克星时，你会感知到攻击者的确切位置。若它原本对你处于藏匿状态，则它对你变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{被察觉}；若它原本对你处于无踪状态，则它对你变为藏匿。若攻击者位于铅之后，猎人克星没有效果。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} enemy hits you with an attack

Requirements You are trained in Survival

This talisman is a ring of dried, interwoven pieces of straw. When you activate the hunter's bane, you sense the exact location of the attacker. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} by you if it was hidden from you or becomes hidden from you if it was undetected. If the attacker is behind lead, the hunter's bane has no effect.

Scroll of Heal (Level 1).name: 治疗术卷轴（1环） Scroll of Heal (Level 1)
Scroll of Heal (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）来启动它，使用该法术通常所需的动作数。

要从卷轴中施法（行动），该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时就已提供所有实体材料成分与花费，因此你在从卷轴中施法（行动）时不需要再提供它们。你必须以姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。若该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Tailwind (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}

从卷轴施放法术需要你一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启用它。

要从卷轴施放法术，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作完成时，任何实体材料成分和代价都已提供，因此你在从卷轴施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须以一个姿势成分替代该法术所需的任何材料成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）启用它，使用该法术通常所需的动作数。

要从卷轴施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已经提供了任何实体材料成分及其费用，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

卷轴制作时已经提供了所有实体材料成分和费用，因此你在从卷轴中施放法术时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为一个姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴中施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0fKHBh5goe2eiFYL]{Negate Aroma}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Create Water (Level 1).description:

从卷轴中施放法术需要一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WzLKjSw6hsBhuklC]{Create Water}

Flail.name: 链枷 Flail
Flail.description:
这种武器由一根木制手柄构成，手柄通过链条、绳索或皮革带连接着一个带刺的球体或圆柱体。

This weapon consists of a wooden handle attached to a spiked ball or cylinder by a chain, rope, or strap of leather.

Bronze Bull Pendant.name: 青铜牛垂饰 Bronze Bull Pendant
Bronze Bull Pendant.description:
启动 1（专注）

这枚垂饰由带有粗糙颗粒感的钢锻造而成，描绘的是一张喷着鼻息的公牛面孔。该垂饰必须佩戴在胸前区域或肩部护甲上。当你启动该垂饰时，尝试进行一次带有 +1 物品加值的运动检定，以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。在成功时，将你推撞目标的距离提高至 10 尺；在大成功时，提高至 20 尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Cxa7MdgMCUoMqbKm]{效果：青铜牛垂饰}

Activate 1 (concentrate)

This pendant is forged from grainy steel and depicts a snorting bull's face. The pendant must be attached to the chest area or on a shoulder guard. When you activate the pendant, attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} with a +1 item bonus to check. Increase the distance you Shove your target to 10 feet on a success or 20 feet on a critical success.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Cxa7MdgMCUoMqbKm]{Effect: Bronze Bull Pendant}

Wolf Fang.name: 狼之牙 Wolf Fang
Wolf Fang.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你成功对一个敌人使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}

这枚狼之牙被皮条捆住，并系在一套护甲的搭扣或带子上。

当你启动这枚狼之牙时，你对你的绊摔目标造成等同于你的力量调整值的 @Damage[(@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]{钝击伤害}。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} a foe

This wolf canine is bound in a strip of leather and tied to a buckle or strap of a suit of armor.

When you activate the fang, you deal @Damage[(@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]{bludgeoning} damage equal to your Strength modifier to the target of your Trip.

Scroll of Shocking Grasp (Rank 1).name: 电爪术卷轴（1环） Scroll of Shocking Grasp (Rank 1)
Scroll of Shocking Grasp (Rank 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r3NeUnsgt9mS03Sn]{电爪}

从卷轴施放法术需要单手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启动它。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

任何实体材料消耗都会在卷轴被制作时提供，因此你在从卷轴施放时不需要再提供。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入玩家角色、非玩家角色或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r3NeUnsgt9mS03Sn]{Shocking Grasp}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Nine Ear Shrine.prototypeToken: 九耳神龛 Nine Ear Shrine

Alchemist's Lab.name: 炼金术师实验室 Alchemist's Lab
Alchemist's Lab.description:
你需要一间炼金术师的实验室，才能在休整模式中制作炼金物品。

You need an alchemist's lab to Craft alchemical items during downtime.

Alchemist Goggles.name: 炼金术师护目镜 Alchemist Goggles
Alchemist Goggles.description:
这副黄铜护目镜刻有火焰纹样，并配有厚重的镜片。

佩戴时，它给予你对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作}炼金物品的制作检定+1物品加值。使用炼金炸弹进行打击时，你无视较低掩蔽。

如果你以炼金炸弹进行的打击失败（但并未严重失败），则此次打击的目标所受到的溅射伤害获得+1物品加值。

These brass goggles are engraved with flame patterns and have thick, heavy lenses.

While worn, they give you a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} alchemical items. When making Strikes with alchemical bombs, you ignore lesser cover.

If your Strike with an alchemical bomb fails (but doesn't critically fail), you gain a +1 item bonus to the splash damage the target of the Strike takes.

Spring-Loaded Net Launcher.name: 弹簧装填网发射器 Spring-Loaded Net Launcher
Spring-Loaded Net Launcher.description:
启动 1 交互

这个小型青铜圆筒约有药水瓶大小。当你启动这具发射器时，它会发射一张未系附的网，只需单手即可使用，且射程更远。照常，你对一个中型或更小的生物进行一次远程攻击掷骰，但你可以将目标设为最远60尺外的生物，而非仅限20尺外。除此之外，这个网陷阱的运作方式与一张未系附的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T8EopYZLT137CsdW]{网}相同。

Activate 1 Interact

This small bronze cylinder is about the size of a potion bottle. When you activate the launcher, it fires an unattached net requiring only a single hand, and at a greater distance. As normal, you make a ranged attack roll against a Medium or smaller creature, but you can target a creature up to 60 feet away, instead of only 20 feet away. The net trap otherwise functions as an unattached @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T8EopYZLT137CsdW]{Net}.

Fire Box.name: 火匣 Fire Box
Fire Box.description:
任何打开这个盒子的人都会触发一个发条机械装置，释放出一个@Template[type:cone|distance:15]的火焰。锥形区域会朝由游戏主持决定的随机方向喷发，但始终会包括打开盒子的生物。锥形区域内的生物受到 @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免。

Anyone who opens the box triggers a clockwork mechanism that unleashes a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of fire. The cone issues forth in a random direction determined by the GM but always including the creature who opened the box. Those within the cone take @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] save.

Blight Bomb (Lesser).name: 枯萎炸弹（次级）
Blight Bomb (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

枯萎炸弹含有会腐蚀血肉的挥发性有毒化学物质。枯萎炸弹造成1d4点毒素伤害、1d4点持续性毒素伤害，以及1点毒素飞溅伤害。

Activate A Strike

Blight bombs contain volatile toxic chemicals that rot flesh. A blight bomb deals 1d4 poison damage, 1d4 persistent poison damage, and 1 poison splash damage.

Bottled Lightning (Lesser).name: 瓶装闪电（次级）
Bottled Lightning (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电装有挥发性试剂，在暴露于空气时会产生一阵电爆。瓶装闪电造成 1d6 点电击伤害和 1 点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你的下个回合开始。

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 1d6 electricity damage and 1 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn.

Frost Vial (Lesser).name: 霜冻小瓶（次级）
Frost Vial (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

这个小瓶中的亮蓝色液态试剂在暴露于空气中时会迅速吸收热量。霜冻小瓶造成 1d6 点寒冷伤害和 1 点寒冷溅射伤害。若命中，目标的速度在其下个回合结束前承受 -5 足状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{效果：霜冻小瓶}

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 1d6 cold damage and 1 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a -5-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Blasting Stone (Lesser).name: 爆裂石（次级）
Blasting Stone (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

当这枚卵石击中一个生物或坚硬表面时，它会伴随着震耳欲聋的巨响爆炸。爆裂石造成1d4点音波伤害和1点音波溅射伤害，且石块爆炸所在空间10尺内的每个生物都必须以所列难度等级成功进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:17|name:Lesser Blasting Stone|showDC:all] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态，直到其下个回合结束。

Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals 1d4 sonic damage and 1 sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17|name:Lesser Blasting Stone|showDC:all] saving throw with the listed DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn.

Blight Bomb (Moderate).name: 枯萎炸弹（中级）
Blight Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

枯萎炸弹内含会腐蚀血肉的挥发性有毒化学物质。枯萎炸弹造成 2d4 毒素伤害、2d4 持续性毒素伤害，以及 2 点毒素溅射伤害。你获得攻击掷骰的 +1 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Blight bombs contain volatile toxic chemicals that rot flesh. A blight bomb deals 2d4 poison damage, 2d4 persistent poison damage, and 2 poison splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Bottled Lightning (Moderate).name: 瓶装闪电（中级）
Bottled Lightning (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电中装有不稳定的试剂，暴露在空气中时会产生一阵电流爆炸。瓶装闪电造成 2d6 点电击伤害和 2 点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你的下个回合开始。你获得攻击掷骰的 +1 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 2d6 electricity damage and 2 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Frost Vial (Moderate).name: 霜冻小瓶（中级）
Frost Vial (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

这瓶小瓶中的亮蓝色液态试剂在暴露于空气时会迅速吸收热量。霜冻小瓶造成 2d6 点寒冷伤害和 2 点寒冷溅射伤害。若命中，目标的速度在其下个回合结束前承受 -10 足的状态减值。你获得攻击掷骰的 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{效果：霜冻小瓶}

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 2d6 cold damage and 2 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Blasting Stone (Moderate).name: 爆裂石（中级）
Blasting Stone (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

当这枚卵石击中一个生物或坚硬表面时，它会伴随着震耳欲聋的巨响爆炸。爆裂石造成 2d4 点音波伤害和 2 点音波溅射伤害，且石头爆炸所在空间 10 尺内的每个生物都必须以所列难度等级成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20|name:Moderate Blasting Stone|showDC:all] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}，直到其下个回合结束。你在攻击掷骰上获得 +1 物品加值。

Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals 2d4 sonic damage and 2 sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20|name:Moderate Blasting Stone|showDC:all] saving throw with the listed DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Crystal Shards (Moderate).name: 水晶碎片（中等）
Crystal Shards (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这个烧瓶内装有一种加压的红棕色气体，其中夹杂着些许升华晶体碎屑。你在攻击掷骰上获得+1物品加值。当这枚炸弹爆炸时，它会造成 @Damage[2d4[piercing]] 伤害和 @Damage[(4[splash])[piercing]]{4点穿刺溅射伤害}，因为混合物会突然变成以高速飞射的固体晶体。

命中时，目标会因嵌入其血肉中的晶体而受到 @Damage[1[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。只要该流血伤害持续，目标的速度还会承受–5尺减值。目标可以花费一个交互动作来移除这些晶体，从而降低停止流血的难度等级。

Activate A Strike

This flask holds a pressurized red-brown gas flecked with bits of sublimated crystal. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls. When the bomb explodes, it deals @Damage[2d4[piercing]] damage and @Damage[(4[splash])[piercing]]{4 piercing splash damage} as the mixture suddenly turns into solid crystals flying at high speeds.

On a hit, the target takes @Damage[1[persistent,bleed]] damage from the crystals embedded in its flesh. As long as the bleed damage persists, the target also takes a –5-foot penalty to its speed. The target can spend an Interact action to remove the crystals, reducing the DC to stop the bleeding.

Torch.name: 火把 Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把会在20尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它也可以作为一件临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Chain Shirt.name: 链衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这件护甲有时被称为锁子甲衫，是一件由与锁子甲相同金属环制成的长衫。不过，它比锁子甲轻得多，而且只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chain mail. However, it is much lighter than chain mail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮甲用金属饰钉加固，有时还会镶嵌小块金属板，在提供皮甲大部分灵活性的同时，还能提供更坚实的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Scale Mail.name: 鳞甲 Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多金属鳞片缝制在加固的皮革衬底上构成，通常呈长衫的形式，可保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Chain Mail.name: 锁子甲 Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description:
一套锁子甲由数件由细小金属环相互连接而成、编织成防护网状的护甲部件组成。它通常包括一件链衫、护腿、一对臂甲和一顶锁子头巾，共同保护身体的大部分部位。

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

Crossbow.name: 弩 Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这种远程武器在一个带握柄的框架上装有类似弓的结构，这个框架称为弩臂槽。弩臂槽上有一种机构，可将弓弦锁定在位，并连接到一个触发机构上，释放张力并发射一支弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这种带刃的小型武器可单手持用，用于在近身战斗中刺击生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Javelin.name: 标枪 Javelin
Javelin.description:
这把细长的矛在投掷时平衡性良好，但并非为近战使用而设计。

This thin spear is well balanced for throwing but is not designed for melee use.

Hand Crossbow.name: 手弩 Hand Crossbow
Hand Crossbow.description:
这种小型弩有时会被游荡者或恶棍称为“巷战弓”，发射小型弩矢，有时会用来向目标输送毒素。它小到可以单手射击，但装填时仍需要双手。

Sometimes referred to as an alley bow by rogues or ruffians, this small crossbow fires small bolts that are sometimes used to deliver poison to the target. It's small enough to be shot one-handed, but it still requires two hands to load.

Heavy Crossbow.name: 重型弩 Heavy Crossbow
Heavy Crossbow.description:
这把大型弩比普通弩更难装填，也更加沉重结实，但威力更大。

This large crossbow is harder to load and more substantial than a regular crossbow, but it packs a greater punch.

Longspear.name: 长矛 Longspear
Longspear.description:
这种非常长的矛有时也被称为长枪，纯粹用于刺击而非投掷。许多士兵和城市卫兵都会使用它来进行人群控制，并防御冲锋而来的敌人；它必须用双手挥舞。

This very long spear, sometimes called a pike, is purely for thrusting rather than throwing. Used by many soldiers and city watch for crowd control and defense against charging enemies, it must be wielded with two hands.

Sickle.name: 镰刀 Sickle
Sickle.description:
这种单手武器原本是用于收割谷物的农业工具，带有一根短木柄，末端是一片弯曲的刀刃，有时两侧都开锋。

Originally a farming tool used for reaping grain, this one-handed weapon has a short wooden handle ending in a curved blade, sometimes sharpened on both sides.

Battle Axe.name: 战斧 Battle Axe
Battle Axe.description:
这些斧头被明确设计为武器，而非工具。它们通常更轻，斧柄以金属箍或螺栓加固，斧刃也更锋利，使其更适合砍断肢体而非劈木。

These axes are designed explicitly as weapons, rather than tools. They typically weigh less, with a shaft reinforced with metal bands or bolts, and have a sharper blade, making them ideal for chopping limbs rather than wood.

Glaive.name: 长柄刀 Glaive
Glaive.description:
这种长柄武器由一根 7 足 长杆末端安装的一片细长单刃刀刃组成。它在远距离造成致命劈砍方面极为有效。

This polearm consists of a long, single-edged blade on the end of a 7-foot pole. It is extremely effective at delivering lethal cuts at a distance.

Greatpick.name: 大挑选 Greatpick
Greatpick.description:
这种镐的柄比普通镐更长，头也更宽。它太重了，无法单手挥舞。

This pick has a longer handle and broader head than a regular pick. It is too heavy to wield in one hand.

Hatchet.name: 短斧 Hatchet
Hatchet.description:
这把小斧可以用于近身战斗或投掷。

This small axe can be used in close combat or thrown.

Kama.name: 镰刃 Kama
Kama.description:
与镰刀相似，并在一些地区用于收割谷物，镰刃有着短而略微弯曲的刀刃和木制手柄。

Similar to a sickle and used in some regions to reap grain, a kama has a short, slightly curved blade and a wooden handle.

Katana.name: 武士刀 Katana
Katana.description:
武士刀是一种弯曲的单刃剑，以其锋利无比的刀刃而闻名。

A katana is a curved, single-edged sword known for its wickedly sharped blade.

Light Pick.name: 轻镐 Light Pick
Light Pick.description:
轻型鹤嘴锄是一种改造过的采矿工具，带有木制柄杆，末端是一个锄头，其设计更偏向于刺穿护甲和血肉，而非凿碎岩石。

A light pick is a modified mining implement with a wooden shaft ending in a pick head crafted more to pierce armor and flesh than chip rocks.

Nunchaku.name: 双节棍 Nunchaku
Nunchaku.description:
双节棍由两根木制或金属棒构成，并以一小段绳索或链条连接。

The nunchaku is constructed of two wooden or metal bars connected by a short length of rope or chain.

Pick.name: 镐 Pick
Pick.description:
一把专为战斗而设计的镐有着结实的木柄和沉重而尖锐的头，能造成毁灭性的打击。

A pick designed solely for combat has a sturdy wooden shaft and a heavy, pointed head to deliver devastating blows.

Sai.name: 十手 Sai
Sai.description:
这把穿刺匕首是一根金属尖刺，两侧有一对叉齿，可用于钳制敌人的武器。

This piercing dagger is a metal spike flanked by a pair of prongs that can be used to trap an enemy's weapon.

Scimitar.name: 弯刀 Scimitar
Scimitar.description:
这把单手弯刃的一侧开锋。

This one-handed curved blade is sharp on one side.

Scythe.name: 长柄镰刀 Scythe
Scythe.description:
这种武器源自一种用于割倒高大谷物和禾本科作物的农业工具，拥有一根带有突出握柄的长木杆，末端装有一片呈直角安装的弯曲刀刃。

Derived from a farming tool used to mow down long grains and cereals, this weapon has a long wooden shaft with protruding handles, capped with a curved blade set at a right angle.

Shield Spikes.name: 护盾尖刺 Shield Spikes
Shield Spikes.description:
这些金属尖刺被巧妙地安装在护盾的防御面上，使其能够在进行盾击时造成穿刺伤害。

These metal spikes are strategically placed on the defensive side of the shield to deal piercing damage with a shield bash.

Shield Boss.name: 盾牌凸饰 Shield Boss
Shield Boss.description:
盾牌凸饰通常是固定在护盾中央的一块厚重金属，形状多为圆形、凸面或圆锥形，它能提高盾击造成的钝击伤害。

Typically a round, convex, or conical piece of thick metal attached to the center of a shield, a shield boss increases the bludgeoning damage of a shield bash.

Shortsword.name: 短剑 Shortsword
Shortsword.description:
这些刀刃有着各种各样的形状和样式，但通常长 2 英尺。

These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Shuriken.name: 手里剑 Shuriken
Shuriken.description:
这种“飞镖”是一种带有锋利边缘的小型扁平金属片，设计用于手腕一抖将其掷出。

This "throwing star" is a small piece of flat metal with sharp edges, designed to be flung with a flick of the wrist.

Lance.name: 长枪 Lance
Lance.description:
这种矛状武器由骑乘中的生物使用，以造成大量伤害。

This spear-like weapon is used by a mounted creature to deal a great deal of damage.

Piton.name: 岩钉 Piton
Piton.description:
这些小钉刺可以作为锚点，使攀爬更容易。要固定一个岩钉，你必须用一只手拿着它，并用另一只手用锤子将其敲入。你可以把绳索系在敲入的岩钉上，这样在攀爬时大失败时，你就不会一路摔到地面。

These small spikes can be used as anchors to make climbing easier. To affix a piton, you must hold it in one hand and use a hammer to drive it in with your other hand. You can attach a rope to the hammered piton so that you don't fall all the way to the ground on a critical failure while Climbing.

Sack.name: 麻袋 Sack
Sack.description:
一个麻袋最多可容纳价值 8 负载的物品。装有 2 负载或更少物品的麻袋可以佩戴在身体上，通常是塞在腰带里。你可以用一只手携带麻袋，但必须用双手将物品放入和取出。

A sack can hold up to 8 Bulk worth of items. A sack containing 2 Bulk or less can be worn on the body, usually tucked into a belt. You can carry a sack with one hand, but must use two hands to transfer items in and out.

Backpack.name: 背包 Backpack
Backpack.description:
背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是提着或收纳这个背包，而不是把它背在背上，它的负载为轻而非可忽略不计。

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Folding Ladder.name: 折叠梯 Folding Ladder
Folding Ladder.description:
负载 1（展开时为 3）

这把带有多个铰链、长 10 英尺的梯子适合向上攀爬或跨越危险的深坑。你可以用总计两个交互动作将梯子折叠或展开，这两个动作不需要连续进行。

Bulk 1 (3 unfolded)

This multi-hinged, 10-foot ladder is useful for climbing upward or across dangerous pits. You can fold or unfold the ladder with two total Interact actions, which don't need to consecutive.

Signal Whistle.name: 信号哨子 Signal Whistle
Signal Whistle.description:
吹响时，信号哨子在开阔地形中最远可于半英里外被清晰听见。

When sounded, a signal whistle can be heard clearly up to half a mile away across open terrain.

Earplugs.name: 耳塞 Earplugs
Earplugs.description:
这些由布料和填充物制成的小物件经过精心制作，能够显著减弱声音，并轻松滑入或滑出类人生物的耳道。你可以用单手通过一个交互动作，将耳塞插入或取出自己或一个自愿生物的耳朵。它们会使其所有基于听觉的察觉检定受到 -2 环境减值，但也会使其对抗听觉效果的豁免骰获得 +2 环境加值。

These small pieces of cloth and stuffing have been crafted to dramatically muffle sound and easily slide into and out of the ear canals of humanoid creatures. You can insert or remove earplugs from your ears or a willing creature's ears with a single Interact action using one hand. They take a -2 circumstance penalty to all auditory Perception checks but also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against auditory effects.

Powder.name: 火药 Powder
Powder.description:
一袋粉末内装有粉笔粉、面粉或类似的材料。除了粉末的其他用途外，它在冒险时也很方便，可帮助定位隐形生物。你可以用一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{交互}动作，将粉末撒到相邻的一个方格中。如果该方格内有生物，它会暂时变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{察觉到}，直到你的回合结束，不过该生物仍因隐形而具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。粉末会迅速脱落或自身也变得隐形，因而无法让你无限期追踪该生物。

A bag of powder contains powdered chalk, flour, or similar materials. In addition to other uses for powder, it can be handy while adventuring to help pinpoint invisible creatures. You can throw the powder into an adjacent square as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} action. If there's a creature in that square, it becomes temporarily @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} until the end of your turn, though the creature still has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} due to invisibility.
