The powder quickly falls away or becomes invisible itself, preventing you from tracking the creature indefinitely.

Marbles.name: 弹珠 Marbles
Marbles.description:
这些微小的圆球由抛光石料和彩色玻璃制成，每袋有200颗。你可以用一个交互动作将弹珠倾倒在与你相邻的一个空方格中。第一个移动进入该方格的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[acrobatics|dc:13] 检定或 @Check[reflex|dc:13] 豁免（由其选择），否则会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。一旦有生物进入带有弹珠的空间，就会有足够多的弹珠散落开来，因此其他移动进入该空间的生物无需进行掷骰来避免坠落。

These tiny round balls are made of polished stone and colorful glass, and come in a bag of 200. You can pour marbles in an empty square adjacent to you with an Interact action. The first creature that moves into that square must succeed at a @Check[acrobatics|dc:13] check or @Check[reflex|dc:13] save (its choice) or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Once a creature enters a space with marbles, enough marbles are scattered that other creatures moving into that space don't need to attempt a roll to avoid falling.

Caltrops.name: 蒺藜钉 Caltrops
Caltrops.description:
这些四尖金属刺会对生物的足造成伤害。你可以用一个交互动作将蒺藜钉撒在与你相邻的一个空方格内。第一个移动进入该方格的生物必须成功通过一次@Check[acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops]检定，否则受到1d4点穿刺伤害和@Damage[1[bleed]]伤害。生物因蒺藜钉受到持续性流血伤害时，其速度承受-5足减值。花费一个交互动作将蒺藜钉拔出可降低停止流血的难度等级。一旦有生物因蒺藜钉受到伤害，就会有足够多的蒺藜钉被毁坏，使其他移动进入该方格的生物处于安全状态。若没有生物因已部署的蒺藜钉受到伤害，则可以将其回收并重复使用。否则，会有足够多的蒺藜钉被毁坏，以至于无法回收。

These four-pronged metal spikes can cause damage to a creature's feet. You can scatter caltrops in an empty square adjacent to you with an Interact action. The first creature that moves into that square must succeed at a @Check[acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops] check or take 1d4 piercing damage and @Damage[1[bleed]] damage. A creature taking persistent bleed damage from caltrops takes a -5-foot penalty to its Speed. Spending an Interact action to pluck the caltrops free reduces the DC to stop the bleeding. Once a creature takes damage from caltrops, enough caltrops are ruined that other creatures moving into the square are safe. Deployed caltrops can be salvaged and reused if no creatures took damage from them. Otherwise, enough caltrops are ruined that they can't be salvaged.

Parrying Scabbard.name: 招架鞘 Parrying Scabbard
Parrying Scabbard.description:
你可以在拔出其所容纳的武器时，使用同一个交互动作一并抽出这个加固鞘，此时一手持握该武器，另一手持握剑鞘。招架剑鞘可以像具有招架特征的武器一样用于防御：你可以花费一个动作将其置于防御姿态，使你的 AC 获得 +1 环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始。招架剑鞘可用于任何能够单手持握的剑。

You can draw this reinforced sheath during the same Interact action you use to draw the weapon it holds, wielding the weapon in one hand and the scabbard in your other. A parrying scabbard can be used for your defense much like a weapon with the parry trait: you can spend an action to position it defensively, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. Parrying scabbards are available for any sword that can be wielded in one hand.

Ruler.name: 统治者 Ruler
Ruler.description:
尺子是带有直边的物体，用于精确测量短距离和绘制直线。

A ruler is a straight-edged object used for measuring small distances accurately and drawing straight lines.

Waffle Iron.name: 华夫饼烤模 Waffle Iron
Waffle Iron.description:
这套带铰链的金属板内侧每块板上都有凸钉，能为你用它烹制的糕点增添纹理。你把面糊倒在金属板上，合上这件器具，然后将其放在火上或炉灶上烹饪。

This set of hinged metal plates features studs on the inside of each plate to provide a texture for the pastry cakes you cook with it. You pour batter on the plates, close the device, and place it on a fire or stove to cook.

Chest.name: 箱子 Chest
Chest.description:
一个木制箱子最多可容纳 8 负载的物品。

A wooden chest can hold up to 8 Bulk of items.

Lantern (Hooded).name: 提灯（有罩） Lantern (Hooded)
Lantern (Hooded).description:
提灯发出明亮光照，并且每工作6小时需要1品脱油。带罩提灯在30足半径内发出光（并在接下来的30足内提供昏暗光照），并配有遮光板，你可以将其关闭以遮挡光线。关闭或打开遮光板需要一个交互动作。

A lantern sheds bright light and requires 1 pint of oil to function for 6 hours. A hooded lantern sheds light in a 30-foot radius (and dim light in the next 30 feet) and is equipped with shutters, which you can close to block the light. Closing or opening the shutters takes an Interact action.

Lantern (Bull's Eye).name: 提灯（牛眼式） Lantern (Bull's Eye)
Lantern (Bull's Eye).description:
提灯发出明亮光照，需要1品脱油才能运作6小时。牛眼提灯以60足锥形区域发出其光照（并在接下来的60足内发出昏暗光照）。

A lantern sheds bright light and requires 1 pint of oil to function for 6 hours. A bull's-eye lantern emits its light in a 60-foot cone (and dim light in the next 60 feet).

Concealment Coin.name: 隐蔽硬币 Concealment Coin
Concealment Coin.description:
这个中空的小物件看起来像一枚普通硬币，内部有足够的空间藏匿写在小纸片上的简短信息。你可以用一个交互动作旋开或合上这枚硬币。若成功通过 @Check[perception|dc:20] 检定，你就能辨认出一枚无人看管的隐匿硬币的真实自然。在有人把玩这枚硬币时，要判断其自然会更加困难，通常需要以察觉检定对抗持有这枚硬币者的巧手难度等级。

This hollow piece resembles a typical coin and features enough space inside to hide brief messages written on small pieces of paper. You can unscrew or close the coin with an Interact action. You can determine an unattended concealment coin's true nature with a successful @Check[perception|dc:20] check. Determining the coin's nature while it's being handled is more difficult and typically requires a successful Perception check against the Thievery DC of the person holding the coin.

Concealed Sheath.name: 隐蔽鞘 Concealed Sheath
Concealed Sheath.description:
这个皮制鞘套足够大，可以容纳一件负载至多为轻的物品，通常用于放置匕首、魔杖、盗贼工具及类似物体。

你可以将它固定在靴子内侧、护腕或袖子下面，或其他不显眼的位置，以获得对将其中物品躲藏或隐藏起来的隐秘检定和 DC 的 +1 物品加值。

This leather sheath is large enough to hold an item of up to light Bulk and is typically used for daggers, wands, thieves' tools, and similar objects.

You can affix it to the inside of a boot, under a bracer or sleeve, or in other inconspicuous locations to gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks and DCs to hide or conceal the item within.

Snare Kit.name: 陷阱工具包 Snare Kit
Snare Kit.description:
这套工具包包含用于制作陷阱的工具和材料。陷阱工具包允许你使用手艺（技能）来制作陷阱。

This kit contains tools and materials for creating snares. A snare kit allows you to Craft snares using the Crafting skill.

Periscope.name: 潜望镜 Periscope
Periscope.description:
这是一个2足长的管子，两端各有一面倾斜的镜子。当镜子正确对齐时，你可以在保持掩蔽的同时观察障碍物另一侧的情况。它无法提供足够的效果线，让你以角落另一侧的生物为目标。

This is a 2-foot-long tube with two angled mirrors, one at each end. When the mirrors are aligned correctly, you can look around obstacles while remaining behind cover. This doesn't provide a sufficient line of effect to target creatures around corners.

Smoked Goggles.name: 熏烟护目镜 Smoked Goggles
Smoked Goggles.description:
这副护目镜使用烟熏玻璃制成的镜片，以防护具有凝视攻击的生物。佩戴烟熏护目镜时，你始终视为正在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UWdRX1VelipCzrCg]{Averting Your Gaze}，但所有生物对你都拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment}。

护目镜会遮蔽生物这一点，正是赋予佩戴者该物品收益的一部分原因。如果你有办法消除烟熏护目镜带来的遮蔽，你也将不再获得其益处。

These goggles use lenses made out of smoked glass to protect against creatures with gaze attacks. While wearing smoked goggles, you're always considered to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UWdRX1VelipCzrCg]{Averting Your Gaze}, but all creatures have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} from you.

The fact that the goggles conceal creatures is part of what grants the wearer the item's benefits. If you have a way to negate the concealment from the smoked goggles, you no longer gain the benefit, either.

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
尽管被称为胸甲，这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用于保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时也包括髋部和小腿。它在提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Half Plate.name: 半身板甲 Half Plate
Half Plate.description:
半身板甲由全身板甲所用的大部分上半身板片构成，手臂和腿部则采用较轻或较少的钢板防护。这使其在提供部分全身板甲防护的同时，拥有更高的灵活性和速度。一套这种护甲包含一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲}内衬和一对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Half plate consists of most of the upper body plates used in full plate, with lighter or sparser steel plate protection for the arms and legs. This provides some of the protection of full plate with greater flexibility and speed. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Splint Mail.name: 板条甲 Splint Mail
Splint Mail.description:
这种护甲是用灵活、互锁的金属板加固的锁子甲，通常覆盖穿戴者的躯干、上臂和腿部。一套这种护甲配有一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲} 和一双 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{护手}。

This type of armor is chain mail reinforced with flexible, interlocking metal plates, typically located on the wearer's torso, upper arms, and legs. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Clockwork Goggles.name: 发条护目镜 Clockwork Goggles
Clockwork Goggles.description:
启动 2（操作）

这副沉重的机械护目镜内含多种适用于不同情境的镜片，包括可过滤不同强度与频率光线的镜片，甚至还有一些能够捕捉热量及其他刺激的镜片。发条机构能够在需要时迅速切换这些镜片。然而，这些镜片中的许多只能捕捉单一刺激一次，之后便会被其永久蚀刻，因此不适合长期使用。

启动时，护目镜上的发条机构会在不同镜片间快速切换，使你获得微光视觉，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oaR6YGiZKg8a2971]{效果：发条护目镜}

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This heavy set of mechanical goggles contains a variety of different lenses for different situations, including lenses that filter light at different intensities and frequencies and even some that capture heat and other stimuli. Clockwork mechanisms can swap between the lenses rapidly as needed. However, many of these lenses can only capture a single stimulus once and then are forever etched with it, making them unsuitable for long-term use.

When activated, the clockwork mechanism on the goggles rapidly switches between the different lenses, granting you low-light vision for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oaR6YGiZKg8a2971]{Effect: Clockwork Goggles}

Clockwork Goggles (Greater).name: 发条护目镜（高阶）
Clockwork Goggles (Greater).description:
启动 2（操作）

这副沉重的机械护目镜包含多种适用于不同情境的镜片，其中包括能过滤不同强度与频率光线的镜片，甚至还有一些能够捕捉热量及其他刺激的镜片。发条机构可以根据需要快速切换这些镜片。然而，这些镜片中的许多只能捕捉单一刺激一次，随后便会永久蚀刻其上，因此不适合长期使用。

启动后，护目镜上的发条机构会在不同镜片之间快速切换，赋予你微光视觉和黑暗视觉，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oaR6YGiZKg8a2971]{效果：发条护目镜}

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This heavy set of mechanical goggles contains a variety of different lenses for different situations, including lenses that filter light at different intensities and frequencies and even some that capture heat and other stimuli. Clockwork mechanisms can swap between the lenses rapidly as needed. However, many of these lenses can only capture a single stimulus once and then are forever etched with it, making them unsuitable for long-term use.

When activated, the clockwork mechanism on the goggles rapidly switches between the different lenses, granting you low-light vision and darkvision for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.oaR6YGiZKg8a2971]{Effect: Clockwork Goggles}

Alchemist's Toolkit.name: 炼金术师工具包 Alchemist's Toolkit
Alchemist's Toolkit.description:
这套便携式小瓶和化学品可用于简单的炼金任务。如果你穿戴着你的炼金术师工具包，你可以在使用它的动作中将其抽出并收回。

This mobile collection of vials and chemicals can be used for simple alchemical tasks. If you wear your alchemist's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Artisan's Toolkit.name: 工匠工具包 Artisan's Toolkit
Artisan's Toolkit.description:
你需要这些工具，才能用制作技能将原材料制成物品。不同的工作需要不同的工具组，由游戏主持决定；例如，铁匠的工具包与木工的工具包不同。如果你穿戴着你的工匠工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分拔出并收起。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Artisan's Toolkit (Sterling).name: 专家级工匠工具包
Artisan's Toolkit (Sterling).description:
你需要这些工具，才能用制作技能将原材料制成物品。专家级工匠工具在该检定上给予你+1物品加值。

不同的工作需要不同的工具包，由游戏主持决定；例如，铁匠的工具包与木工的工具包不同。如果你穿戴着你的工匠工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分拔出并收起。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Sterling artisan's tools give you a +1 item bonus to the check.

Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Basic Crafter's Book.name: 基础工匠手册 Basic Crafter's Book
Basic Crafter's Book.description:
本书包含用于制作《开拓者玩家核心》第6章中0级通用物品的配方。

This book contains the formulas for Crafting the 0-level common items in Chapter 6 of the Pathfinder Player Core.

Brass Ear.name: 黄铜耳环 Brass Ear
Brass Ear.description:
黄铜听筒是一种短而外张的管子，其中一端足够狭窄，可以舒适地贴合耳道。使用中黄铜听筒隔着门、窗、薄墙或类似障碍物聆听时，如果该障碍物通常会提高你察觉检定以听见另一侧声音的难度等级，那么该难度等级的提高幅度只有正常的一半。它不适合用来全面提升你的听力；这一作用更适合由助听器承担。

A brass ear is a short, flared tube with one end narrow enough to comfortably fit against the ear canal. When using a brass ear to listen through a door, window, thin wall, or similar barrier, if the barrier would normally increase the DC of your Perception check to hear sounds on the other side, the DC increases by only half as much as normal. It's not suitable for improving your hearing in general, a role better served by a hearing aid.

Chain (10 feet).name: 链条（10英尺）
Chain (10 feet).description:
10英尺长的链条。

10 feet of chain.

Climbing Kit.name: 攀爬工具包 Climbing Kit
Climbing Kit.description:
这个挎包内含50英尺长的绳索、滑轮、十二枚岩钉、一把锤子、一个抓钩，以及一套冰爪。攀爬工具包允许你将自己固定在正在攀爬的墙面上，使你的移动速度变为通常的一半（最低5英尺），但让你在重度失败时可以尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以防止坠落。单套工具包的材料只够一名攀爬者使用；每名攀爬者都需要各自的一套。如果你穿戴着你的攀爬工具包，你可以作为攀爬动作的一部分许可使用它。

This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall. A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit. If you wear your climbing kit, you can access it as part of a Climb action.

Climbing Kit (Extreme).name: 攀爬工具包（特制）
Climbing Kit (Extreme).description:
这个背包包含50英尺长的绳索、滑轮、12枚岩钉、一把锤子、一个抓钩，以及一套冰爪。攀爬工具包让你能够将自己固定在正在攀爬的墙面上，移动速度变为通常的一半（最低5英尺），但会让你在重度失败时可以进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以避免坠落。

当使用极限攀爬工具包时，你进行攀爬的运动检定获得+1物品加值。单套工具包的材料只够一名攀爬者使用；每名攀爬者都需要自己的工具包。如果你穿戴着你的攀爬工具包，你可以将其作为攀爬动作的一部分来取用。

This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall.

You gain a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb while using an extreme climbing kit. A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit. If you wear your climbing kit, you can access it as part of a Climb action.

Compass.name: 罗盘 Compass
Compass.description:
指南针能帮助你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{辨别方向}或导航，前提是你处于磁场均匀的地点。没有指南针时，你在这些检定上承受 -2 物品减值（类似于使用中粗制物品）。

A compass helps you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{Sense Direction} or navigate, provided you're in a location with uniform magnetic fields. Without a compass, you take a -2 item penalty to these checks (similar to using a shoddy item).

Compass (Lensatic).name: 指南针（透镜式）
Compass (Lensatic).description:
指南针能帮助你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{辨别方向}或导航，前提是你处于磁场均匀的地点。没有指南针时，你在这些检定上承受-2物品减值（类似于使用粗制物品）。

透镜式指南针使你在这些检定上获得+1物品加值。

A compass helps you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{Sense Direction} or navigate, provided you're in a location with uniform magnetic fields. Without a compass, you take a -2 item penalty to these checks (similar to using a shoddy item).

A lensatic compass gives you a +1 item bonus to these checks.

Crafter's Eyepiece.name: 工匠目镜 Crafter's Eyepiece
Crafter's Eyepiece.description:
这件粗犷的金属目镜刻有方形纹样，设计为佩戴在单眼上。转动镜片时，会显现出你打算制造或修理的物品的淡淡立体轮廓，并以乐于助人的标签标示其组成部件。

你在制作检定上获得+1物品加值。当你修理一件物品时，在成功时恢复的生命值提高为10 + 每个熟练度等级10，或在大成功时提高为15 + 每个熟练度等级15。

This rugged metal eyepiece etched with square patterns is designed to be worn over a single eye. Twisting the lens reveals a faint three-dimensional outline of an item you plan to build or repair, with helpful labels on the component parts.

You gain a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks. When you Repair an item, increase the Hit Points restored to 10 + 10 per proficiency rank on a success or 15 + 15 per proficiency rank on a critical success.

Crowbar.name: 撬棍 Crowbar
Crowbar.description:
当对一个不易抓握的物体进行强行打开时，撬棍能让你更容易获得所需的杠杆力。没有撬棍时，撬开某物进行强行打开所进行的运动检定会承受 -2 物品减值。

When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage. Without a crowbar, prying something open takes a -2 item penalty to the Athletics check to Force Open.

Crowbar (Levered).name: 撬棍（杠杆式）
Crowbar (Levered).description:
当你对一个没有容易抓握处的物体进行强行打开时，撬棍会让你更容易获得所需的杠杆力。没有撬棍时，撬开某物会使你进行强行打开所需的运动检定承受 -2 物品减值。

杠杆式撬棍会使你对任何能够被撬开的东西进行强行打开的运动检定获得 +1 物品加值。

When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage. Without a crowbar, prying something open takes a -2 item penalty to the Athletics check to Force Open.

A levered crowbar grants you a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Force Open anything that can be pried open.

Disguise Kit.name: 化装工具包 Disguise Kit
Disguise Kit.description:
这个小木箱里装有化妆品、假胡须、假发胶和几顶简单的假发。你通常需要化装工具包来准备伪装，以便使用欺骗（技能）进行乔装。如果你制作了大量伪装，你可以用适合你的化装工具包类型的替换化妆品来补充你的化妆品储备。你可以在使用它的动作中一并取出并更换一套已穿用的化装工具包。

This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs. You usually need a disguise kit to set up a disguise in order to Impersonate someone using the Deception skill. If you've crafted a large number of disguises, you can replenish your cosmetics supply with replacement cosmetics suitable for the type of your disguise kit. You can draw and replace a worn disguise kit as part of the action that uses it.

Disguise Kit (Replacement Cosmetics).name: 化装工具包（替换化妆品）
Disguise Kit (Replacement Cosmetics).description:
这个小木箱装有化妆品、假胡须、假发胶和几顶简单的假发。你通常需要化装工具包来准备伪装，以便使用欺骗（技能）进行乔装。如果你已经制作了大量伪装，你可以用适合你的化装工具包类型的替换化妆品来补充你的化妆品储备。

This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs. You usually need a disguise kit to set up a disguise in order to Impersonate someone using the Deception skill. If you've crafted a large number of disguises, you can replenish your cosmetics supply with replacement cosmetics suitable for the type of your disguise kit.

Formula Book (Blank).name: 配方簿（空白）
Formula Book (Blank).description:
配方簿保存着制作《探路者玩家核心》中通用装备以外物品所需的配方；炼金术士（职业）的角色通常会免费获得一本。每本配方簿最多可以收录 100 种不同物品的配方。配方也可以记录在羊皮纸、泥板和几乎任何其他媒介上；只要你能将它们随身保存以供查阅，就没有必要把它们誊写进某一本特定的书中。

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from Pathfinder Player Core; characters of the alchemist class typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

Grappling Hook.name: 抓钩 Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以投掷一枚系着绳索的抓钩，让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，使用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗由目标决定的难度等级，通常至少为 DC 20。此次攻击具有隐秘特征。成功时，你的抓钩会牢牢固定；但在大失败时，抓钩看起来似乎能固定住，实际上会在你爬到一半时掉落。

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Net.name: 网 Net
Net.description:
你可以单独使用网，也可以将其系在绳索上使用。系在绳索上时，你可以使用网对 10 足内的一个中型或更小的生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒拿}（而非仅限相邻的生物）。只要目标仍在 10 足内且你持续握持这张网，你就可以继续擒拿以维持对目标的控制。被抓住的生物进行挣脱时获得 +2 环境加值，除非你与其相邻；此外，它还可以尝试一次@Check[athletics|dc:16|traits:action:force-open]检定来强行打开这张网。目标一旦不再被抓住，这张网在用一个需要双手且具有专注（特征）的交互动作重新折好之前都很难使用；若未重新折好就已使用，则用这张网进行的擒拿检定承受 -2 减值。

当网未系在绳索上时，你可以对 20 足内一个中型或更小的生物，使用你的简易武器熟练度尝试一次远程攻击掷骰。命中时，目标陷入措手不及，且其速度承受 -10 足环境减值，直到它逃脱；若大成功命中，它还会陷入禁足，直到它逃脱。挣脱难度等级为 16（[[/act escape dc=16]]）。与目标相邻的一个生物可以通过交互来移除这张网。

You can use a net either on its own or attached to a rope. When attached to a rope, you can use the net to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} a Medium or smaller creature up to 10 feet away (instead of only adjacent creatures). You can continue to Grapple to keep your hold on the target so long as the target remains within 10 feet and you continue to hold the net. The grabbed creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Escape unless you are adjacent to them, and it can attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:16|traits:action:force-open] check to Force Open the net entirely. Once the target is no longer grabbed, the net is unwieldy until refolded with an Interact action with the concentrate trait that requires two hands; if used without being refolded, Grapple checks made with the net take a -2 penalty.

When the net is unattached, you can attempt a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a Medium or smaller creature within 20 feet. On a hit, the target is off-guard and takes a -10- foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it Escapes, and on a critical hit, it's also immobilized until it Escapes. The Escape DC is 16 ([[/act escape dc=16]]). A creature adjacent to the target can Interact to remove the net.

Repair Toolkit.name: 修理工具包 Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
修理工具包让你能够在旅行时进行简单修理。它包含一个便携铁砧、钳子、木工工具、一块磨刀石，以及用于养护皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理工具包，运用手艺（技能）来修理物品。你可以将已穿用的修理工具包作为使用它的动作的一部分取出并收起。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Repair Toolkit (Superb).name: 修理工具包（卓越）
Repair Toolkit (Superb).description:
修理工具包让你能够在旅行途中进行简单修理。它包含便携铁砧、铁钳、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油料。你可以使用修理工具包，借助手艺（技能）来修理物品。卓越修理工具包使你在该检定中获得 +1 物品加值。你可以将已穿戴的修理工具包作为使用它的动作的一部分取出并收回。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. A superb repair kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Rope.name: 绳索 Rope
Rope.description:
50 尺长的绳索。

50 feet of rope.

Spyglass.name: 望远镜 Spyglass
Spyglass.description:
一具普通的单筒望远镜能让你看清比平常远八倍的距离。

A typical spyglass lets you see eight times farther than normal.

Spyglass (Fine).name: 望远镜（精制） Spyglass (Fine)
Spyglass (Fine).description:
普通的望远镜让你看见的距离是正常的八倍。精制望远镜在远距离注意细节的察觉检定上提供 +1 物品加值。

A typical spyglass lets you see eight times farther than normal. A fine spyglass adds a +1 item bonus to Perception checks to notice details at a distance.

Tack.name: 挽具 Tack
Tack.description:
挽具包括为骑乘动物配备所需的全部道具，包括鞍、衔铁和缰绳，以及在必要时配备的马镫。特别大或体型奇特的动物可能需要专用鞍具。这些鞍具可能更昂贵或更难找到，具体由游戏主持决定。给出的负载值适用于由生物穿戴的挽具。若是携带，则负载增加至2。

Tack includes all the gear required to outfit a riding animal, including a saddle, bit and bridle, and stirrups if necessary. Especially large or oddly shaped animals might require specialty saddles. These can be more expensive or hard to find, as determined by the GM. The Bulk value given is for tack worn by a creature. If carried, the Bulk increases to 2.

Ten-Foot Pole.name: 十尺长杆 Ten-Foot Pole
Ten-Foot Pole.description:
当挥舞这根长杆时，你可以使用搜索来搜索最远 10 尺外的一个方格。这根杆子不够结实，无法作为武器使用。

When wielding this long pole, you can use Seek to search a square up to 10 feet away. The pole is not sturdy enough to use as a weapon.

Tent (Pup).name: 帐篷（双人轻便帐篷） Tent (Pup)

Thieves' Toolkit.name: 盗贼工具包 Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套贼活工具包，才能以巧手技能进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的贼活工具包已破损，你可以用适用于你的工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器}更换锁镐来修复它；这不需要使用修理动作。如果你穿戴着你的贼活工具包，你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分将其取出并收回。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).name: 贼活工具包（替换撬锁器）
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).description:
这些是用于替换一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{贼活工具包}的撬锁器。

These are replacement picks for a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{Thieves' Toolkit}.

Tool (Long).name: 工具（长） Tool (Long)
Tool (Long).description:
此条目是用于涵盖那些没有特定冒险用途的基础手工具。一把锄头、铲子或大锤属于长工具，而手钻、冰钩或泥铲属于短工具。工具通常可以当作临时武器使用，造成 1d6 伤害。游戏主持决定合适的伤害类型，或在必要时调整伤害。

This entry is a catchall for basic hand tools that don't have a specific adventuring purpose. A hoe, shovel, or sledgehammer is a long tool, and a hand drill, ice hook, or trowel is a short tool. A tool can usually be used as an improvised weapon, dealing 1d6 damage. The GM determines the damage type that's appropriate or adjusts the damage if needed.

Tool (Short).name: 工具（短） Tool (Short)
Tool (Short).description:
本条目统称那些没有特定冒险用途的基础手工具。锄头、铁锹或大锤属于长工具，而手钻、冰钩或泥铲属于短工具。工具通常可以作为临时武器使用，造成 1d4 伤害。游戏主持决定适用的伤害类型，或在需要时调整伤害。

This entry is a catchall for basic hand tools that don't have a specific adventuring purpose. A hoe, shovel, or sledgehammer is a long tool, and a hand drill, ice hook, or trowel is a short tool. A tool can usually be used as an improvised weapon, dealing 1d4 damage. The GM determines the damage type that's appropriate or adjusts the damage if needed.

Acid Flask (Lesser).name: 强酸瓶（次等） Acid Flask (Lesser)
Acid Flask (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这个装满腐蚀性酸液的瓶子造成1点酸液伤害、1d6持续性酸液伤害，以及1点酸液飞溅伤害。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 1d6 persistent acid damage, and 1 acid splash damage.

Acid Flask (Moderate).name: 强效酸液瓶 Acid Flask (Moderate)
Acid Flask (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这只装满腐蚀性酸液的瓶子造成1点酸液伤害、2d6持续性酸液伤害，以及2点酸液飞溅伤害。你获得攻击掷骰的+1物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 2d6 persistent acid damage, and 2 acid splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).name: 炼金术师之火（次级） Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)
Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

炼金术师之火是多种挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时会点燃。炼金术师之火造成1d8点火焰伤害、1点持续性火焰伤害，以及1点火焰飞溅伤害。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 1d8 fire damage, 1 persistent fire damage, and 1 fire splash damage.

Alchemist's Fire (Moderate).name: 炼金术师之火（中等） Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)
Alchemist's Fire (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

炼金术师之火是多种挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时会点燃。炼金术师之火造成2d8点火焰伤害、2点持续性火焰伤害，以及2点火焰飞溅伤害。你获得攻击掷骰的+1物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 2d8 fire damage, 2 persistent fire damage, and 2 fire splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Bottled Sunlight (Lesser).name: 瓶装阳光（次级） Bottled Sunlight (Lesser)
Bottled Sunlight (Lesser).description:
启动 1 交互

这个镜面瓶中装有溶解在两种互不相溶溶剂中的各种化学物质。摇晃瓶子会引发化学反应，使其发光。持续1小时，该瓶会在20足半径内散发明亮光照（并在之后的40足范围内提供昏暗光照）。

在这1小时内，它可以像炸弹一样被投掷。这需要用一个单动作来以打击启动，和其他炸弹一样，并造成如下伤害。如果在首次启动后1小时内未被投出，它会无害地失效并被消耗。

该炸弹造成1d4点活力伤害和1点活力飞溅伤害，以及额外1d4点火焰伤害。通常，活力伤害只会伤害不死生物和其他具有虚空治疗的生物。对阳光具有特定弱点的不死生物（例如吸血鬼（特征）或缚灵（特征））会受到最大值的活力伤害（@Damage[4[vitality]]而不是1d4）。对于任何取决于瓶装阳光具有多少武器骰的能力，只计算活力伤害骰。

Activate 1 Interact

This mirrored bottle contains various chemicals dissolved in two immiscible solvents. Shaking the bottle induces chemical reactions that cause it to glow. For 1 hour, the bottle sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 40 feet).

During this hour, it can be thrown like a bomb. This requires a single action to Activate with a Strike, like other bombs, and deals the damage below. If it's not thrown within an hour of the first activation, it defuses harmlessly and is consumed.

The bomb deals 1d4 vitality damage and 1 vitality splash damage, as well as 1d4 additional fire damage. As normal, vitality damage harms only undead and other creatures with void healing. Undead with a particular vulnerability to sunlight (such as vampires or wraiths) take the maximum amount of vitality damage from bottled sunlight (@Damage[4[vitality]] instead of 1d4). For any ability that depends on the number of weapon dice bottled sunlight has, count only the vitality damage dice.

Bottled Sunlight (Moderate).name: 瓶装阳光（中等） Bottled Sunlight (Moderate)
Bottled Sunlight (Moderate).description:
启动 1 交互

这个镜面瓶中装有溶解在两种互不相溶溶剂中的多种化学物质。摇晃瓶子会引发化学反应，使其发光。持续1小时，瓶子会在20足半径内散发明亮光照（并在之后40足范围内提供昏暗光照）。

在这1小时内，它可以像炸弹一样被投掷。这需要用一个单动作来以打击启动，和其他炸弹一样，并造成下述伤害。如果在首次启动后1小时内未被投出，它会无害地失效并被消耗。

该炸弹造成2d4点活力伤害和2点活力溅射伤害，以及额外2d4点火焰伤害。通常来说，活力伤害只会伤害不死生物和其他具有虚空治疗的生物。对阳光具有特定弱点的不死生物（例如吸血鬼（特征）或缚灵（特征））会受到最大值的活力伤害（@Damage[8[vitality]]而不是2d4）。对于任何取决于瓶装阳光具有多少武器骰的能力，只计算活力伤害骰。

Activate 1 Interact

This mirrored bottle contains various chemicals dissolved in two immiscible solvents. Shaking the bottle induces chemical reactions that cause it to glow. For 1 hour, the bottle sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 40 feet).

During this hour, it can be thrown like a bomb. This requires a single action to Activate with a Strike, like other bombs, and deals the damage below. If it's not thrown within an hour of the first activation, it defuses harmlessly and is consumed.

The bomb deals 2d4 vitality damage and 2 vitality splash damage, as well as 2d4 additional fire damage. As normal, vitality damage harms only undead and other creatures with void healing. Undead with a particular vulnerability to sunlight (such as vampires or wraiths) take the maximum amount of vitality damage from bottled sunlight (@Damage[8[vitality]] instead of 2d4). For any ability that depends on the number of weapon dice bottled sunlight has, count only the vitality damage dice.

Dread Ampoule (Lesser).name: 恐惧安瓿（次等） Dread Ampoule (Lesser)
Dread Ampoule (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这个烧瓶中装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰正常的大脑活动。恐惧安瓿造成 1d6 心灵伤害和 1 点心灵溅射伤害。

命中时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 1}，若大成功命中则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 2}。许多种类还会给予攻击掷骰物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 1d6 mental damage and 1 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

Dread Ampoule (Moderate).name: 恐惧安瓿（中阶） Dread Ampoule (Moderate)
Dread Ampoule (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这个烧瓶中装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰正常的大脑活动。恐惧安瓿造成 2d6 心灵伤害和 2 点心灵溅射伤害。

命中时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 1}，若为大成功命中则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 2}。许多种类还会给予攻击掷骰物品加值。

你获得攻击掷骰 +1 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 2d6 mental damage and 2 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Ghost Charge (Lesser).name: 幽灵充能瓶（次级） Ghost Charge (Lesser)
Ghost Charge (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这些弹簧驱动的金属罐中装有化学物质与盐类的混合物，能够汲取并瓦解附近的不死生物。

一瓶幽灵充能瓶造成1d8点活力伤害和1点活力溅射伤害，不过如同活力伤害的通常规则一样，这种伤害只会伤害不死生物和具有虚空治疗的生物。受到幽灵充能瓶伤害的主要目标会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}，直到你的下个回合开始。

幽灵充能瓶被设计成即使接触到灵体物质也会爆炸，因此非常适合用来伤害虚体不死生物。

Activate A Strike

These spring-loaded metal canisters contain a mixture of chemicals and salts that drain and disintegrate nearby undead creatures.

A ghost charge deals 1d8 vitality damage and 1 vitality splash damage, though as usual for vitality damage, this damage harms only undead and creatures with void healing. A primary target that takes damage from a ghost charge becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Ghost charges are designed to explode even on contact with a spiritual substance, making them ideal for damaging incorporeal undead.

Ghost Charge (Moderate).name: 幽灵充能瓶（中阶） Ghost Charge (Moderate)
Ghost Charge (Moderate).description:
启动 A 打击

这些弹簧加载的金属罐中装有化学药剂和盐类的混合物，能够汲取并瓦解附近的不死生物。

一瓶幽灵充能瓶给予攻击掷骰+1物品加值，造成2d8活力伤害和2点活力溅射伤害。不过，和活力伤害通常的规则一样，这种伤害只会伤害不死生物和具有虚空治疗的生物。受到幽灵充能瓶伤害的主要目标会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}，直到你的下个回合开始。

幽灵充能瓶被设计成即使接触到灵体物质也会爆炸，因此非常适合对虚体不死生物造成伤害。

Activate A Strike

These spring-loaded metal canisters contain a mixture of chemicals and salts that drain and disintegrate nearby undead creatures.

A ghost charge gives a +1 item bonus to attack rolls, deals 2d8 vitality damage and 2 vitality splash damage, though as usual for vitality damage, this damage harms only undead and creatures with void healing. A primary target that takes damage from a ghost charge becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Ghost charges are designed to explode even on contact with a spiritual substance, making them ideal for damaging incorporeal undead.

Greataxe.name: 巨斧 Greataxe
Greataxe.description:
这把巨大的战斧过于沉重，无法仅用一只手挥舞。许多巨斧有两个斧刃，而且它们通常带有“胡须”，在底部有一个钩状结构，以增强其劈砍力量。

This large battle axe is too heavy to wield with only one hand. Many greataxes incorporate two blades, and they are often "bearded," having a hook at the bottom to increase the strength of their chopping power.

Holy Water.name: 圣水 Holy Water
Holy Water.description:
启动 A 打击

这个小瓶中装有受一位仁善神祇祝福过的水。你可以通过将一瓶圣水作为一次打击投掷出去来启动它。它是一种简易投掷武器，射程增量为20尺。

圣水造成1d6点精魂伤害和1点精魂溅射伤害。圣水只能对具有邪秽（特征）的生物造成伤害。

Activate A Strike

This vial contains water blessed by a benevolent deity. You activate a vial of holy water by throwing it as a Strike. It's a simple thrown weapon with a range increment of 20 feet.

Holy water deals 1d6 spirit damage and 1 spirit splash damage. Holy water can damage only creatures with the unholy trait.

Spear.name: 矛 Spear
Spear.description:
一根长长的金属杆末端带有金属尖刺，矛可以单手作为近战武器使用，也可以投掷。

A long metal shaft ending with a metal spike, a spear can be used one-handed as a melee weapon and can be thrown.

Spiked Gauntlet.name: 带刺铁手套 Spiked Gauntlet
Spiked Gauntlet.description:
这款武器提供了与标准臂铠相同的防御功能，但在指节处伸出了一排尖刺。

Providing the same defensive function as a standard gauntlet, this version has a group of spikes protruding from the knuckles.

Glue Bomb (Lesser).name: 胶水炸弹（次级） Glue Bomb (Lesser)
Glue Bomb (Lesser).description:
启动 1 打击

胶水炸弹是一种无害的爆炸装置，会迸发出黏性物质。当你用胶水炸弹命中一个生物时，该生物的速度在1分钟内承受–10足的状态减值。其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{A:脱身} 难度等级为 [[/act escape dc=17]]{17}。

若大成功命中，接触坚固表面的生物会被黏在该表面上，并在1轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足}；而通过翼飞行的生物则会双翼缠结，安全地坠落到地面，并在1轮内无法再次飞行。胶水炸弹对处于水中的生物无效。

目标可以通过A:脱身，或总共花费3个交互动作小心移除这些黏性物质，来结束任何效果。这些交互动作不必连续，其他生物也可以提供这些动作。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sgQknR94qDt5ILBx]{效果：胶水炸弹}

Activate 1 Strike

A glue bomb is a harmless explosive mechanism bursting with sticky substances. When you hit a creature with a glue bomb, that creature takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute. The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC is [[/act escape dc=17]]{17}.

On a critical hit, a creature in contact with a solid surface becomes stuck to the surface and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round, and a creature flying via wings has its wings tangled, causing it to fall safely to the ground and become unable to Fly again for 1 round. Glue bombs are not effective when used on a creature that is in water.

The target can end any effects by Escaping or spending a total of 3 Interact actions to carefully remove the sticky substances. These Interact actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sgQknR94qDt5ILBx]{Effect: Glue Bomb}

Glue Bomb (Moderate).name: 黏胶炸弹（中阶） Glue Bomb (Moderate)
Glue Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

胶水炸弹是一种无害的爆炸装置，爆裂时会喷出黏性物质。当你用胶水炸弹命中一个生物时，该生物的所有速度在1分钟内承受 –15足的状态减值。你获得攻击掷骰的+1物品加值，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} 难度等级为 [[/act escape dc=19]]{19}。

若大成功命中，接触坚固表面的生物会被黏在该表面上并在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足}；而通过翼飞行的生物则会因其翼被缠住而安全落到地面，并在1轮内无法再次飞行。胶水炸弹对处于水中的生物无效。

目标可以通过挣脱，或总共花费3个交互动作小心移除这些黏性物质，来结束任何效果。这些交互动作不必连续，其他生物也可以提供这些动作。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sgQknR94qDt5ILBx]{效果：胶水炸弹}

Activate 1 Strike

A glue bomb is a harmless explosive mechanism bursting with sticky substances. When you hit a creature with a glue bomb, that creature takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls, and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC is [[/act escape dc=19]]{19}.

On a critical hit, a creature in contact with a solid surface becomes stuck to the surface and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round, and a creature flying via wings has its wings tangled, causing it to fall safely to the ground and become unable to Fly again for 1 round. Glue bombs are not effective when used on a creature that is in water.

The target can end any effects by Escaping or spending a total of 3 Interact actions to carefully remove the sticky substances. These Interact actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sgQknR94qDt5ILBx]{Effect: Glue Bomb}

Sukgung.name: 速弓궁 Sukgung
Sukgung.description:
速弓是一种效率极高的弩，最常见于花国。它能够在惊人的距离外射出致命一击，而且平衡性极佳，足以单手发射。

The sukgung is an extremely efficient crossbow most common in the nation of Hwanggot. Capable of lethal shots at remarkable distances, the sukgung is well-balanced enough to be fired with one hand.

Handwraps of Mighty Blows.name: 强力打击缠手 Handwraps of Mighty Blows
Handwraps of Mighty Blows.description:
当你为这些绣花布条进行灌注时，你必须冥想，并缓慢地将它们缠绕在双手上。这些缠手上蚀刻有武器符文，使你的徒手攻击获得这些符文的益处，让你的徒手攻击如同魔法武器一般运作。例如，+1强击强力打击缠手会使你用徒手攻击进行攻击掷骰时获得+1物品加值，并将你徒手攻击的伤害从一个武器伤害骰提升为两个（通常是从1d4变为2d4，但如果你的拳头使用不同的武器伤害骰，或你拥有其他徒手攻击，则改为使用两个该骰面大小的骰子）。

你可以像对武器那样升级、添加和转移这些缠手上的符文，也可以将护符附着在缠手上。为这些用途，将缠手视为属于搏斗组、具有轻负载的近战武器。属性符文仅在其适用于你当前使用的徒手攻击时才会生效。例如，某个必须附加于挥砍武器上的属性，在你用拳头攻击时不会起作用；但如果你以爪击或其他挥砍类徒手攻击进行攻击，你就会获得其益处。

As you invest these embroidered strips of cloth, you must meditate and slowly wrap them around your hands. These handwraps have weapon runes etched into them to give your unarmed attacks the benefits of those runes, making your unarmed attacks work like magic weapons. For example, +1 striking handwraps of mighty blows would give you a +1 item bonus to attack rolls with your unarmed attacks and increase the damage of your unarmed attacks from one weapon die to two (normally 2d4 instead of 1d4, but if your fists have a different weapon damage die or you have other unarmed attacks, use two of that die size instead).

You can upgrade, add, and transfer runes to and from the handwraps just as you would for a weapon, and you can attach talismans to the handwraps. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons of the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes. Property runes apply only when they would be applicable to the unarmed attack you're using. For example, a property that must be applied to a slashing weapon wouldn't function when you attacked with a fist, but you would gain its benefits if you attacked with a claw or some other slashing unarmed attack.

Exquisite Sword Cane.name: 精制剑杖 Exquisite Sword Cane
Exquisite Sword Cane.description:
精制剑杖是一把藏在中空手杖中的剑，而手杖本身无论剑是否收在其中，都可以当作棍棒武器使用。

An exquisite sword cane is a sword sheathed inside a hollow cane, which itself can be used as a clubbing weapon with or without the sword sheathed inside.

Infiltrator's Accessory.name: 潜入者的饰品 Infiltrator's Accessory
Infiltrator's Accessory.description:
这把优雅的+1强击剑杖既是时髦的配饰，也是适合用于上流社会场合的藏匿武器——在那类场合中，武器通常不被允许携带。

启动—躲藏魔法 A (操作)

效果 你扭动剑杖的剑柄，以魔法将剑刃融入手杖之中。当剑刃处于融合状态时，它无法被拔出，并获得一个3环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PRrZ7anETWPm90YY]{Disguise Magic}法术的增益，使其显得并非魔法物品。被动观察者无法尝试检定来注意到这根手杖不只是普通——尽管极为精美——的时尚配饰。那些仔细检查它的人可以辨认出这根手杖并不像表面看起来那样简单，但要做到这一点极其困难（@Check[perception|dc:30|traits:action:seek]）。再次启动剑杖会释放剑刃，使其能够像通常那样拔出。

This elegant +1 striking sword cane serves equally well as a fashionable accessory and hidden weapon suitable for high-society events where weapons aren't typically permitted.

Activate-Hide Magic A (manipulate)

Effect You twist the sword cane's hilt, magically merging the blade into the cane. While the blade is merged, it can't be drawn and gains the benefits of a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PRrZ7anETWPm90YY]{Disguise Magic} spell to appear non-magical. Passive observers can't attempt a check to notice the cane is anything more than a mundane, if superb, fashion accessory. Those carefully examining it can discern the cane is more than it appears, but doing so is extremely difficult (@Check[perception|dc:30|traits:action:seek]). Activating the sword cane again releases the blade, allowing it to be drawn normally.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。虽然比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Sturdy Shield (Minor).name: 坚固护盾术（下等） Sturdy Shield (Minor)
Sturdy Shield (Minor).description:
凭借更优良的设计与精湛的工艺，这面钢盾比其非魔法同类拥有更高的硬度，因此更难被打破和摧毁。

这面钢盾的硬度为 8，HP 为 64，BT 为 32。

With a superior design and excellent craftsmanship, this steel shield has higher Hardness than its non-magical counterparts, making it harder to break and destroy.

The shield has Hardness 8, HP 64, and BT 32.

Saddlebags.name: 鞍囊 Saddlebags
Saddlebags.description:
鞍囊成对出现。每个鞍囊最多可容纳 3 负载的物品，并且每个鞍囊中的前 1 负载物品不计入你的坐骑的负载上限。给出的负载值适用于由坐骑佩戴的鞍囊。如果你正在携带或收纳鞍囊，则它们按 1 负载计算，而非光负载。

Saddlebags come in a pair. Each can hold up to 3 Bulk of items, and the first 1 Bulk of items in each doesn't count against your mount's Bulk limit. The Bulk value given is for saddlebags worn by a mount. If you are carrying or stowing saddlebags, they count as 1 Bulk instead of light Bulk.

Light Barding.name: 轻型坐骑护甲 Light Barding

Heavy Barding (Small or Medium).name: 重型坐骑护甲（小型或中型）

War Saddle.name: 战马鞍 War Saddle
War Saddle.description:
每个战马鞍都是专门依照坐骑的身体类型配装的，并带有许多可以将你固定在坐骑上的皮带。即使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，你仍会保持骑乘状态，直到你或其他人使用一个交互动作解开鞍上的皮带为止。生物或效果可以通过用力拉扯并扯断皮带来将你与坐骑分开，但要做到这一点，该效果的难度等级、攻击掷骰或技能检定必须超过20。

Each war saddle is specifically fitted to a mount's body type and has numerous straps that can secure you on your mount. You remain mounted even if you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until either you or someone else uses an Interact action to unfasten the straps on the saddle. A creature or effect can separate you from your mount by pulling so hard it tears the straps, but to do so, the effect's DC, attack roll, or skill check must exceed 20.

Guard Dog (per day).name: 护卫犬（每天） Guard Dog (per day)

Pack Horse (Per Day).name: 驮马（每天） Pack Horse (Per Day)

Riding Dog (per day).name: 骑乘犬（每天） Riding Dog (per day)

Handcrafted Oar.name: 手工打造的船桨 Handcrafted Oar
Handcrafted Oar.description:
这些船桨使你在使用划艇进行载具操作检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

These oars grant a +1 item bonus to Piloting checks with rowboats.

Extravagant Suite, For 6.name: 豪华套房，可容纳 6 人 Extravagant Suite, For 6

Private Room, For 2.name: 双人包间 Private Room, For 2

Pot of Coffee or Tea.name: 一壶咖啡或茶 Pot of Coffee or Tea

Bottle of Wine.name: 一瓶葡萄酒 Bottle of Wine

Bottle of Fine Wine.name: 一瓶佳酿 Bottle of Fine Wine

Keg of Ale.name: 一桶麦酒 Keg of Ale

Mug of Ale.name: 一杯艾尔啤酒 Mug of Ale

Fisher's Farms and Docks.name: 渔场和码头 Fisher's Farms and Docks
Fisher's Farms and Docks.tokenName: 渔场和码头 Fisher's Farms and Docks

Fishing Tackle.name: 捕鱼工具 Fishing Tackle
Fishing Tackle.description:
这套工具包括一根可折叠的捕鱼竿、鱼钩、鱼线、鱼饵和一张渔网。

This kit include a collapsible fishing pole, fishhooks, line, lures, and a fishing net.

Fishing Tackle (Professional).name: 捕鱼工具（专业）
Fishing Tackle (Professional).description:
这套工具包括一根可折叠的捕鱼竿、鱼钩、鱼线、鱼饵和一张渔网。专业捕鱼渔具在捕鱼时进行的检定获得+1物品加值。

This kit include a collapsible fishing pole, fishhooks, line, lures, and a fishing net. Professional fishing tackle grants a +1 item bonus to checks to fish.

Fisher's Farms and Docks.prototypeToken: 渔场和码头 Fisher's Farms and Docks

Snare Kit.name: 陷阱工具包 Snare Kit
Snare Kit.description:
这套工具包包含用于制作陷阱的工具和材料。陷阱工具包允许你使用手艺（技能）来制作陷阱。

This kit contains tools and materials for creating snares. A snare kit allows you to Craft snares using the Crafting skill.

Alarm Snare.name: 警报陷阱 Alarm Snare
Alarm Snare.description:
你通过将一个或多个会发出噪音的物体连接到绊线上或压力板上，来制作一个警报陷阱。创建警报陷阱时，你指定一个100到500英尺的射程，在该射程内可以听到它的声音。当一个小型或更大的生物进入该方格时，该陷阱会发出足够响亮的声音，使你所指定射程内的所有生物都能听到。

You create an alarm snare by rigging one or more noisy objects to a trip wire or pressure plate. When you create an alarm snare, you designate a range between 100 to 500 feet at which it can be heard. When a Small or larger creature enters the square, the snare makes a noise loud enough that it can be heard by all creatures in the range you designated.

Caltrop Snare.name: 蒺藜陷阱 Caltrop Snare
Caltrop Snare.description:
这个陷阱由一个藏匿的、装有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7fSnvJ2xoSfa6JXD]{蒺藜}的罐子和一根绊线组成。陷阱被触发时，会将蒺藜抛撒到陷阱所在的格子内，或与陷阱相邻的一个格子内。你在布置陷阱时选择具体是哪个格子。

如果蒺藜散落到与某个生物相同的格子内，该生物必须立刻尝试进行特技检定。

制作需求 提供一容器的蒺藜。

This snare consists of a hidden canister of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7fSnvJ2xoSfa6JXD]{Caltrops} attached to a trip wire. When the snare is triggered, it flings the caltrops into either the snare's square or a square adjacent to the snare. You choose which square when you set up the snare.

If the caltrops scatter into the same square as a creature, that creature must attempt the Acrobatics check immediately.

Craft Requirements Supply a container of caltrops.

Hampering Snare.name: 妨碍陷阱 Hampering Snare
Hampering Snare.description:
你布置荆棘、铁丝、黏胶或其他材料，以妨碍生物的移动。带有此陷阱的方格以及与其相邻的三个方格（构成一个@Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot-by-10-foot区域}），会在第一个生物进入该陷阱所在方格时变为困难地形。该困难地形会立刻影响该生物的移动，包括其进入触发方格的移动，并会在陷阱被触发后持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。生物可以使用一个交互动作，提前清除单个方格中的困难地形。

You arrange brambles, wires, sticky goo, or other materials to interfere with a creature's movement. The square with this snare, as well as three adjacent squares (to form a @Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot-by-10-foot area}), become difficult terrain when the first creature enters the snare's square. The difficult terrain affects the creature's movement right away, including its movement into the triggering square, and it lasts for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} after the snare is triggered. A creature can use an Interact action to clear the difficult terrain out of a single square early.

Marking Snare.name: 标记陷阱 Marking Snare
Marking Snare.description:
这个陷阱常用于给入侵者做标记，以便之后进行追踪或识别。制作这个陷阱时，你必须决定将其制作为染料标记或气味标记。任一种标记都会使对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪} 获得+2环境加值，持续最多24小时，或直到染料或气味被洗掉为止（需要至少1加仑的水和10分钟的擦洗）。进入该陷阱所在方格的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:17] 反射豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该陷阱给该生物做上标记。

大失败 该陷阱给该生物做上标记，且该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，直到其下个回合结束。

This snare is often used to mark intruders for later tracking or identification. When you create this snare, you must decide whether to make it a dye or a scent marker. Either type of marking grants a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the creature for up to 24 hours or until the dye or scent is washed off (requiring at least a gallon of water and 10 minutes of scrubbing). A creature that enters a square of the snare must attempt a @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:17] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The snare marks the creature.

Critical Failure The snare marks the creature, and the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of its next turn.

Signaling Snare.name: 示警陷阱 Signaling Snare
Signaling Snare.description:
一种用于狩猎或追踪的隐蔽陷阱，信号陷阱通常由精心处理过的泥土、堆起的沙土或石块、特定布置的植被等构成。当一个生物进入信号陷阱所在的方格时，不会对该生物发生任何事；相反，它会在地形上造成一种细微且不显眼的扰动，使陷阱的制作者或另一位知道该观察什么的生物能够判断是否有符合适当体型的生物进入了该方格。

A subtle snare used in hunting or tracking, a signaling snare often consists of carefully prepared earth, piled sand or stones, specific arrangements of vegetation, and so forth. When a creature enters a square of a signaling snare, nothing happens to the creature, but instead it causes a small, unobtrusive disruption to the terrain that allows the snare's creator or another creature who knows what to look for to determine whether a creature of the appropriate size entered the square.

Spike Snare.name: 尖刺陷阱 Spike Snare
Spike Snare.description:
这个基础陷阱由藏匿的尖刺构成，依靠生物的冲势在其进入陷阱所在方格时将其割伤，甚至可能将其刺穿，造成 @Damage[2d8[piercing]] 伤害。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:17|basic] 豁免。

This basic snare consists of hidden spikes that rely on a creature's momentum to lacerate or potentially impale it as it enters the snare's square, dealing @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage. The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:17|basic] saving throw.

Snare Kit (Specialist).name: 陷阱工具包（专家）
Snare Kit (Specialist).description:
这套工具包包含用于制作陷阱的工具和材料。陷阱工具包允许你使用手艺（技能）来制作陷阱。专家陷阱工具包使你在该检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

This kit contains tools and materials for creating snares. A snare kit allows you to Craft snares using the Crafting skill. A specialist snare kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check.

Biting Snare.name: 撕咬陷阱 Biting Snare
Biting Snare.description:
这个捕索会夹住生物的腿。该捕索对第一个进入其方格的生物造成 @Damage[5d6[piercing]] 伤害；该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:21] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，且其速度受到 -10-足状态减值，直到其恢复至少 1 点生命值。

This snare closes shut on the leg of a creature. The snare deals @Damage[5d6[piercing]] damage to the first creature that enters its square; that creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:21] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speed until it recovers at least 1 Hit Point.

Trip Snare.name: 绊摔陷阱 Trip Snare
Trip Snare.description:
你设置了一根狡猾的绊线来绊倒一个生物。进入该陷阱方格的中型或更小生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:21] 豁免。

如果你想制作一个能够绊倒更大生物的绊摔陷阱，你必须制作一组连续的陷阱，其长度等于该更大生物空间的边长，并且该生物必须正在移动，以至于它会移动进入整组陷阱。例如，一排呈15足直线的三个绊摔陷阱可以绊倒一个沿走廊冲入这排陷阱的巨型生物。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到其下个回合开始。

失败 该生物倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物倒地并受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

You set a cunning wire to trip a creature. A Medium or smaller creature that enters this snare's square must attempt a @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:21] save.

If you want to create a trip snare to trip a larger creature, you must create a group of contiguous snares of a length equal to the edge of that larger creature's space, and the creature must be moving such that it moves into the full set of snares. For example, three trip snares in a 15-foot-line can trip a Huge creature coming down a corridor into the line of snares.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of its next turn.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The creature falls prone and takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Warning Snare.name: 警示陷阱 Warning Snare
Warning Snare.description:
使用中该区域特有的材料，你将发声部件连接到绊线或压力板上。这个陷阱类似于警报陷阱，但其细微的声音会融入环境噪音之中。只要你位于陷阱1000英尺内，且未被阻止听到它，你就可以侦测到这种声音。该区域内其他处于搜寻中的生物，若其察觉检定结果达到或超过你的制作难度等级，也可能注意到这种声音。

Using materials specific to the area, you connect a sound-making component to a trip wire or a pressure plate. This snare is like an alarm snare, but its subtle sound blends into ambient noise. You can detect this sound as long as you're within 1,000 feet of the snare and aren't prevented from hearing it. Other creatures in that area who are searching might notice the sound if their Perception check result meets or exceeds your Craft DC.

Flare Snare.name: 耀光陷阱 Flare Snare
Flare Snare.description:
使用中生物发光物质或炼金试剂，你将一个短效信号焰火安装在绊线上或压力板上。当一个小型或更大的生物进入该方格时，这个信号焰火会射向天空。对于那些能够清楚看到天空的生物，这个信号焰火在晴朗的白天最远可在2英里外可见，而在晴朗的夜晚最远可在5英里外可见。

Using bioluminescent matter or alchemical reagents, you rig a short-lived flare to a trip wire or pressure plate. When a Small or larger creature enters the square, this flare shoots into the sky. To creatures with a clear view of the sky, this flare is visible from up to 2 miles away on a clear day or up to 5 miles away on a clear night.

Dust Pods.name: 尘荚 Dust Pods
Dust Pods.description:
你藏起脆弱的花粉囊或其他会附着的粉末，使其进入首个进入陷阱所在方格的生物眼中。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|dc:17] 豁免。被花粉导致目眩的生物可以使用一个交互动作，尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以移除该状态。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物目眩，持续1轮。

失败 该生物目眩，持续10分钟。

大失败 该生物失明1轮，之后目眩10分钟。

You hide fragile pods of pollen or other clinging powder that get in the eyes of the first creature that enters the snare's square. The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:17] saving throw. A creature dazzled by the pollen can use an Interact action to attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] to remove the condition.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is dazzled for 1 round.

Failure The creature is dazzled for 10 minutes.

Critical Failure The creature is blinded for 1 round and dazzled for 10 minutes after.

Smoke Screen Snare (Lesser).name: 烟幕陷阱（次级）
Smoke Screen Snare (Lesser).description:
你制作一个陷阱；当有生物进入该方格时，它会释放出一团浓密的烟雾，充满指定区域。该区域内的所有生物都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，而所有其他生物对它们而言也是隐蔽的。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风驱散。

烟雾充满陷阱所在的方格及所有相邻方格。

制作需求 提供一根@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MoBlVd36uD9xVvZC]{次级烟棒}。

You create a snare that releases a dense cloud of smoke when a creature enters the square, filling a specified area. All creatures within that area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind.

The smoke fills the snare's square and all adjacent squares.

Craft Requirements Supply a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MoBlVd36uD9xVvZC]{Lesser Smokestick}.

Deadweight Snare.name: 拖累陷阱 Deadweight Snare
Deadweight Snare.description:
这个陷阱由磁化配重和粗重绳索制成，并连接在绊线上或压力板上。当一个生物进入该方格时，磁铁和绳索会启动，压住该生物的武器和四肢。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:18] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的攻击掷骰获得 -1 状态减值，持续1轮或直到它 [[/act escape show-dc=all dc=18]]{脱身}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.NYOi1F9cW3axHrdc]{效果：拖累陷阱（成功）}

失败 该生物的攻击掷骰获得 -2 状态减值，持续1分钟或直到它脱身（DC 18）。

大失败 同失败，但该生物会掉落它手持的所有金属物品。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Gj6u2Za5okFlsTvT]{效果：拖累陷阱（失败/大失败）}

This snare is made of magnetized weights and heavy ropes rigged to a trip wire or pressure plate. When a creature enters the square, the magnets and ropes deploy, weighing down the creature's weapons and limbs. The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a -1 status penalty to attack rolls for 1 round or until it [[/act escape show-dc=all dc=18]]{Escapes}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.NYOi1F9cW3axHrdc]{Effect: Deadweight Snare (Success)}

Failure The creature takes a -2 status penalty to attack rolls for 1 minute or until it Escapes (DC 18).

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature drops any metallic items it's holding.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Gj6u2Za5okFlsTvT]{Effect: Deadweight Snare (Failure/Critical Failure)}

Spirit Trap.name: 精魂陷阱 Spirit Trap
Spirit Trap.description:
一个精魂陷阱由一张浸过水、并以神圣草药浸泡过以更好对抗魅影的网构成。这个陷阱的组件在未架设时可作为一张网使用。你将这个陷阱架设在一个10足×10足的区域内。第一个踏入该区域、具有精魂（特征）的生物必须尝试进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:16]强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足}，持续1轮。

大失败 该生物陷入禁足，直到它逃脱。

A spirit trap consists of a net dipped in water that has been steeped with sacred herbs to better combat phantoms. This snare's components function as a net when not set up. You set this snare up in a 10-foot-by-10-foot area. The first creature with the spirit trait that steps into the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:16] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is immobilized until it Escapes (DC 16).

Noisemaker Snare.name: 噪音陷阱 Noisemaker Snare
Noisemaker Snare.description:
当一个生物进入这个陷阱的方格时，它会触发一个极其响亮的发条装置，该装置会轰然爆炸，200英尺外都能听见，并造成 @Damage[1d8[fire]] 伤害。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|dc:18] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态1轮。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态1分钟。

When a creature enters this snare's square, it triggers an extremely loud clockwork device, which explodes with a bang that can be heard from 200 feet away and deals @Damage[1d8[fire]] damage. The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute.

Branch of the Great Sugi.name: 大杉枝 Branch of the Great Sugi
Branch of the Great Sugi.description:
这根大型树枝尽管已经从它曾所属的大杉树上采下，却依然活着。这根细长、柔韧而灵活的分支是一把+1强击长鞭。当用于打击时，这根分支会发出如裂空鞭响般的声音，但同时也会让撞击点周围的空气充满新近砍下杉树的宜人气味，并让地面洒落些许落叶。

启动 3 构想，交互

频率 每天一次

效果 你将大杉枝放在一具邪恶生物的尸体上，然后使这根分支突然生长成一棵杉树，高达25英尺，树干宽2英尺。它在生长时会释放出一阵抚慰性的能量脉冲，使@Template[burst|distance:10]内所有生物恢复 @Damage[(3d8+8)[healing]] 生命值。角色可以通过成功的@Check[athletics|dc:10]检定攀爬这棵树，而它的树枝可以毫不费力地支撑任何中型或更小生物的重量。除非你在此之前将其变回原状，否则这棵杉树会在1小时后恢复为长鞭形态。

启动 1 交互

你将大杉枝从树木形态变回长鞭形态。

This large tree branch is alive, despite having been harvested from the sugi tree it once belonged to. This long, flexible, and limber branch is a +1 striking whip. When used to Strike, the branch snaps with the sound of a cracking whip but fills the air surrounding the point of impact with the pleasant scent of freshly cut cedar and a sprinkling of fallen leaves on the ground.

Activate 3 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You place the branch of the great sugi on the corpse of an evil creature, then cause the branch to suddenly grow into a sugi tree, up to 25 feet tall with a 2-foot-wide trunk. As it grows, it emits a pulse of soothing energy, restoring @Damage[(3d8+8)[healing]] Hit Points to all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10]. A character can Climb the tree with a successful @Check[athletics|dc:10] check, and its branches effortlessly support the weight of any Medium or smaller creature. The sugi tree reverts to its whip form after 1 hour unless you transform it back before then.

Activate 1 Interact

You transform the branch of the great sugi from its tree form back into its whip form.

Ghost Scarf.name: 幽魂围巾 Ghost Scarf
Ghost Scarf.description:
这条6尺长的围巾在穿戴时会闪烁着灵魂之河的银色光辉，提供相当于蜡烛的照明。你可以用一个交互动作关闭或启动这道辉光。幽魂围巾垂下的部分会在作祟出现时轻柔飘动，使穿戴者在用于发现作祟，或在作祟触发时进行先攻的所有察觉检定和察觉DC上获得+1物品加值。

启动 1 构想

频率 每天一次

效果 围巾伸出银色丝线，缠绕你持有的一把武器，使该武器获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽冥}属性符文的效果，持续5分钟。若该武器已带有幽冥符文，则你改为在对抗来自虚体亡灵的效果时，强韧豁免获得+1物品加值，持续5分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vOwZlSNCS35GULgL]{效果：幽魂围巾}

This 6-foot-long scarf shimmers with the silvery light of the River of Souls while worn, providing illumination equivalent to that of a candle. You can deactivate or activate this radiance as an Interact action. The dangling lengths of a ghost scarf softly billow in the presence of haunts, granting the wearer a +1 item bonus to all Perception checks and Perception DCs to resolve discovering a haunt or rolling initiative when a haunt triggers.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect The scarf extends silvery threads that wrap around a weapon you carry, granting the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune to that weapon for 5 minutes. If the weapon already bears a ghost touch rune, you instead gain a +1 item bonus to Fortitude saves against effects from incorporeal undead for 5 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vOwZlSNCS35GULgL]{Effect: Ghost Scarf}

Hairpin of Blooming Flowers.name: 繁花发簪 Hairpin of Blooming Flowers
Hairpin of Blooming Flowers.description:
这枚发簪上装饰着一朵盛开的莲花，花朵颜色各异；在该物品被启动后，会在一天后重新长出。无论发簪上的花是否盛开，只要你佩戴它且已灌注，它就会给予交涉检定 +1 物品加值。

启动 2 构想，交互

频率 每天一次

效果 你从发簪上摘下花朵并撒出花瓣，在以你为中心的 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内制造出一阵色彩纷飞。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，持续 1 分钟或直到你离开当前位置。当你启动该物品时，位于该 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内的任何生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:23] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，直到其下个回合结束（若大失败，则改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，直到其下个回合结束）。花朵会在次日再次盛开。

The flower that adorns this hairpin is a blooming lotus flower that varies in color; it regrows in a day after the item is activated. Whether or not the hairpin's flower is in bloom, as long as you wear it and it's invested, it grants a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You pluck the flower from the hairpin and scatter the petals, creating a flurry of color in a @Template[burst|distance:10] centered on you. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 1 minute or until you move from your current location. Any creature within the @Template[burst|distance:10] when you Activate the Item must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:23] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of its next turn on a critical failure). The flower blooms again the next day.

Red Thread Knot.name: 红线结 Red Thread Knot
Red Thread Knot.description:
这小段红线打了六个结，两端各有一个环，因此既可以作为手镯或脚镯佩戴，也可以挂在带子上。

启动 r 构想

触发 你的豁免大成功或大失败

效果 它会解开六个结中的一个，并在此过程中改变你的命运。将你的豁免检定视为失败而非大成功或大失败。这是一个幸运效果。第六个结解开后，它会变成一段非魔法的红线。

This small length of red thread is knotted six times, with a loop at each end so it can either be worn as a bracelet or anklet, or hung from a strap.

Activate r envision

Trigger You critically fail a save

Effect The knot unties one of its six knots, altering your fate in the process. Treat your saving throw as if you failed the check rather than critically failed the check. This is a fortune effect. Once the sixth knot unties, it becomes a non-magical red thread.

Resolute Mind Wrap.name: 坚心头巾 Resolute Mind Wrap
Resolute Mind Wrap.description:
丹杉寺的追随者明白，保护心智免受暴力与愤怒侵扰的价值，并将他们的信念灌注进这条绿褐相间的条纹布带中。缠绕在头上时，这些条纹几乎会让人联想到盘绕在佩戴者骷髅上的杉枝纹样。坚心头巾使你获得对心灵伤害5点抗力。

启动 r 想象

频率 每天一次

触发 你尝试进行一次对抗心灵效果的意志豁免

效果 坚心头巾更紧地贴附在你的头上，使你此次意志豁免获得+1物品加值。若你此次豁免成功，坚心头巾所赋予的对心灵伤害的抗力提高至10点，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sbxGrVdEsYZ5KiCj]{Effect: Resolute Mind Wrap}

The followers of the Tan Sugi monastery understood the value of protecting the mind from the intrusion of violence and anger and infused this strip of striped green and brown cloth with their beliefs. Wrapped around the head, the stripes almost evoke the patterns of sugi branches coiled around the wearer's skull. The resolute mind wrap grants you resistance 5 against mental damage.

Activate r envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You attempt a Will saving throw against a mental effect

Effect The resolute mind wrap clings more tightly to your head, granting you a +1 item bonus to your Will saving throw. If you succeed at this saving throw, the resistance to mental damage granted by the resolute mind wrap increases to 10 for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.sbxGrVdEsYZ5KiCj]{Effect: Resolute Mind Wrap}

Root Boots.name: 根靴 Root Boots
Root Boots.description:
这双朴素皮靴的鞋底看起来像一圈圈压扁的根系。尽管做工结实，这双靴子仍让足部能够完全灵活活动，并散发出淡淡的常青树气味。穿着并灌注后，你的脚步声听起来像沙沙作响的落叶，使你在森林或林地区域中的隐秘检定获得 +1 物品加值。

启动 1 构想

频率 每天一次

效果 从这双靴子鞋底延伸出的根系让你能够在木质表面上自由轻松地移动。持续 10 分钟，你在树木和其他木质表面上获得 20 尺攀爬速度，且你攀爬时不需要使用双手。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.T2eCVO5lN8cNMzyq]{效果：根靴}

启动 r 构想

频率 每天一次

触发 你正站在地面上，且某物试图违背你的意愿移动你

效果 根系从你的靴子中伸出并抓紧地面，使你对抗试图移动你的效果时，你的强韧豁免难度等级获得 +4 物品加值，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 或拉拽。

The soles of these plain leather boots look like coils of flattened roots. The boots allow for full-foot flexibility despite their sturdy make and smell faintly of evergreen trees. While worn and invested, your footsteps sound like rustling leaves, granting you a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks in a forest or wooded area.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect The small roots extending from the soles of these boots allow you to move freely and easily across wood. For 10 minutes, you gain a 20-foot climb Speed on trees and other wooden surfaces, and you don't need to use your hands to climb.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.T2eCVO5lN8cNMzyq]{Effect: Root Boots}

Activate r envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're standing on earth, and something attempts to move you against your will

Effect The roots extend from your boots to grip the ground, granting you a +4 item bonus to your Fortitude DC against effects that attempt to move you, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or Pull.

Spirit Fan.name: 灵扇 Spirit Fan
Spirit Fan.description:
这把优雅的黑色、金边的+1强击铁扇饰有三片金色叶片的图案和一条红色流苏。如果一个生物被灵扇打至0生命值，扇上的金色叶片会亮起，提供等同于火把的照明，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2SzLumWCqZQAetcx]{效果：灵扇}

启动 2 构想

需求 灵扇的叶片已被点亮

频率 每小时一次

效果 你将灵扇朝30尺内一个你看得见的单一目标挥扫，释放出一道金色光芒形成的生命能量流。灵扇随即熄灭。如果目标是活着的生物，该能量恢复其@Damage[(3d8+8)[healing]]生命值。如果目标为亡灵，它会受到@Damage[(2d8+8)[vitality]]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic]强韧豁免）。

This elegant black, gold-tipped +1 striking fighting fan is adorned with images of three golden leaves and a red rope tassel. If a creature is reduced to 0 Hit Points by a spirit fan, the golden leaves on the fan light up, providing illumination equal to that of a torch for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2SzLumWCqZQAetcx]{Effect: Spirit Fan}

Activate 2 envision

Requirements The spirit fan's leaves are illuminated

Frequency once per hour

Effect You sweep the spirit fan in the direction of a single target you can see within 30 feet, releasing the life energy in the form of a streak of golden light. The spirit fan goes dark. If the target is a living creature, the energy restores @Damage[(3d8+8)[healing]] Hit Points. If the target is undead, it takes @Damage[(2d8+8)[vitality]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save).

Noppera-Bo Hood.name: 无面鬼面罩 Noppera-Bo Hood
Noppera-Bo Hood.description:
这顶外观令人不快的面罩看起来像是一个完全光滑、圆润的皮肤囊袋，摸上去有种诡异的温热感。当你佩戴这顶面罩并为其灌注后，它会与你的头和脸融合，作为一件穿戴物品几乎无法被察觉，除非近距离仔细观察，才会发现你的面部特征带着一层轻微的油亮光泽。佩戴无面鬼面罩时，你可以让自己的面部特征发生下等的偏移与变化；这视为你拥有一套 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Jvp0x2Sc82WVpExT]{化装工具包}，可用于对任何与你属于同一族裔的生物进行乔装。

启动 2 构想（变化）

频率 每天一次

效果 你专注于这顶面罩的魔法，随后获得1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{幻象伪装} 的效果，但这是一种变化效果而非幻术。

This unpleasant-looking hood appears to be a completely smooth, round sack of skin that feels uncannily warm to the touch. When you wear this hood and invest it, it merges with your head and face, becoming imperceptible as a worn item except on close examination, which reveals a slight oily sheen to your facial features. You can cause minor shifts and changes to your features while wearing a noppera-bo hood; this counts as having a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Jvp0x2Sc82WVpExT]{Disguise Kit} to Impersonate any creature that is the same ancestry as you.

Activate 2 envision (transmutation)

Frequency once per day

Effect You focus on the hood's magic, and then gain the effects of 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}, though it's a transmutation effect rather than an illusion.

Cape of Justice.name: 正义披风 Cape of Justice
Cape of Justice.description:
虽然夜神令人畏惧，且鲜少被公开崇拜，但天夏的一些地区将他视为必要之恶的神祇，以及他们获得正义的唯一希望。这件服饰常由赏金猎人或虽然夜神的祭司穿戴，不过，一些并不崇拜这位严苛正义之神的人有时也会穿戴这件物品，而不必担心宗教迫害。这件红色披风在阴影中看起来几乎是黑色，其上带有较浅红色的曼荼罗图案，形似手里剑。

当你灌注正义披风时，你必须指定一个生物作为你的冒犯者。你必须先前见过该生物，或者该生物应当拥有一个为公众所熟知的身份（例如，某个强盗的绰号，即使不是通缉海报上所展示的脸）。你对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气}时获得+1物品加值。如果你在灌注正义披风时没有指定一个生物作为你的冒犯者，或者如果过去了24小时而你既没有杀死也没有捕获你的冒犯者，你的思绪将变得忧虑而分散，并在接下来的24小时内对察觉检定承受–1物品减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.wdN3sa1Qs2rEdiDC]{效果：正义披风（分心）}

启动 1 命令术，交互（力场）

频率 每小时一次

效果 你用一只空手抓住披风边缘并快速一抖，使一道红色、手里剑形状的力场弩矢射向60尺内一个你看得见的目标。手里剑自动命中，并造成@Damage[(1d4+1)[force]]伤害；若目标是你指定的冒犯者，则改为造成@Damage[(2d4+2)[force]]伤害。如果目标位于30尺内，则在手里剑打击该目标后，你可以以自由动作（）尝试对该目标进行挫败士气。

启动 2 命令术，交互（失能）

频率 每天一次

效果 你从披风中变出镣铐，然后将其掷向30尺内一个中型或小型的双足目标。目标必须尝试一次@Check[reflex|dc:18|traits:incapacitation]豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，且镣铐消失。

成功 镣铐击中目标的腿部，但未能正确扣住。目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你下个回合开始，届时镣铐消失。

失败 镣铐锁在目标腿上，使目标的速度在1分钟内承受–15尺环境减值，或直到其挣脱，或被他人使用开锁（DC 18）解开为止，之后镣铐消失。

大失败 如同失败，但只要镣铐仍在原位，目标便会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足}。

While Yaezhing is feared and seldom worshipped in the open, some regions of Tian Xia see him as a god of necessary evil and their only hope for justice. This garment is often worn by bounty hunters or priests of Yaezhing, yet non-worshippers of the god of harsh justice sometimes wear this item without fear of religious persecution. The red cape appears almost black while in the shadows, with a lighter red mandala pattern on it that resembles a shuriken.

When you invest a cape of justice, you must designate a single creature as your offender. You must have met the creature before, or the creature should have a persona well known to the public (for instance, a bandit's epithet, if not their face as shown on a wanted poster). You gain a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} this creature. If you don't designate a creature as your offender when you invest the cape of justice, or if 24 hours pass without you either slaying or capturing your offender, your thoughts become worried and distracted and you take a –1 item penalty to Perception checks for the next 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.wdN3sa1Qs2rEdiDC]{Effect: Cape of Justice (Distracted)}

Activate 1 command, Interact (force)

Frequency once per hour

Effect By using a free hand to grab the edge of your cape and give it a quick flourish, you cause a red, shuriken-shaped bolt of force to fire at a target within 60 feet that you can see. The shuriken hits automatically and deals @Damage[(1d4+1)[force]] damage, or @Damage[(2d4+2)[force]] damage if the target is your designated offender. If the target is within 30 feet, you can attempt to Demoralize the target as a free action after the shuriken strikes them.

Activate 2 command, Interact (incapacitation)

Frequency once per day

Effect You produce manacles from the cape and then fling them at a Medium or Small bipedal target within 30 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:18|traits:incapacitation] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected, and the manacles vanish.

Success The manacles strike the target's legs but fail to latch properly. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn, at which point the manacles vanish.

Failure The manacles lock on the target's legs, causing the target to take a –15-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute, or until it Escapes or is freed by someone using Pick a Lock (DC 18), after which the manacles vanish.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for as long as the manacles remain in place.

The Hand of Spring.name: 春之手 The Hand of Spring
The Hand of Spring.tokenName: 春之手 The Hand of Spring

Emetic Paste (Lesser).name: 催吐膏（次级） Emetic Paste (Lesser)
Emetic Paste (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）}的生物难以吞咽，因此你可以通过将催吐膏涂抹在自己身上，或触及范围内一名恶心（状态）生物的皮肤上（通常是喉咙部位）来启动它。该药膏让恶心（状态）生物更容易呕吐排空，使其立即进行一次强韧豁免，以减少其恶心（状态）。该药膏使目标在此次豁免，以及此后1小时内所有用于减少恶心（状态）的豁免骰上，获得+2物品加值。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} creatures have difficulty swallowing, so you can Activate emetic paste by applying it to your skin or that of a sickened creature within reach, typically on the throat. The paste makes it easy for the sickened creature to purge, granting it an immediate Fortitude save to reduce its sickened condition. The paste grants the target a +2 item bonus to that save and to all saving throws to reduce the sickened condition for 1 hour.

Bottled Catharsis (Lesser).name: 瓶装宣泄（次等） Bottled Catharsis (Lesser)
Bottled Catharsis (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

这份饮品会释放出情绪的洪流，帮助重置你的心灵状态。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，该灵药会以2环尝试反制你身上的每个具有情绪（特征）或正在对你施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}的效果，使用所列的反制环阶和调整值，其反制调整值为[[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 2nd-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8} counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.

Surging Serum (Lesser).name: 澎涌血清（次等） Surging Serum (Lesser)
Surging Serum (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

当它恢复饮用者正常的肌肉控制时，非自主的抽搐与能量激涌会穿过饮用者的身体。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，它会尝试反制施加于你身上的每个导致你陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态）}的效果，使用2环反制和[[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8反制调整值}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control. When you drink this elixir, it attempts to counteract each effect that's inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled} condition on you, using a 2nd-rank counteract and a [[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8 counteract modifier}.

Soothing Tonic (Lesser).name: 舒缓滋补剂（次级） Soothing Tonic (Lesser)
Soothing Tonic (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

舒缓补剂是一种味道宜人的咸香调合饮品，能够加快你的自然治疗，使你的伤口随着时间更快恢复。你获得快速治疗1，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.p5KpVsJVzhoJ4OrS]{效果：舒缓补剂}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Soothing tonic is a pleasantly savory concoction that speeds your natural healing, so your wounds recover faster over time. You gain fast healing 1 for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.p5KpVsJVzhoJ4OrS]{Effect: Soothing Tonic}

Bottled Catharsis (Moderate).name: 瓶装宣泄（中阶） Bottled Catharsis (Moderate)
Bottled Catharsis (Moderate).description:
启动 1（操作）

这份饮品会释放出情绪的洪流，帮助重置你的心灵状态。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，该灵药会以4环尝试反制你身上的每个具有情绪（特征）或正在对你施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}的效果，使用所列的反制环阶和调整值，其反制调整值为[[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 4th-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14} counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.

Surging Serum (Moderate).name: 奔涌血清（中等） Surging Serum (Moderate)
Surging Serum (Moderate).description:
启动 1（操作）

当它恢复饮用者正常的肌肉控制时，不由自主的抽搐与能量激涌会穿过饮用者的身体。当你饮用这瓶灵药时，它会尝试反制施加于你身上的每个导致@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态）}的效果，使用4环反制和[[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14反制调整值}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control. When you drink this elixir, it attempts to counteract each effect that's inflicting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled} condition on you, using a 4th-rank counteract and a [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14 counteract modifier}.

Soothing Powder (Lesser).name: 舒缓粉末（次级） Soothing Powder (Lesser)
Soothing Powder (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

舒缓粉末是用于阻止特定类型持续性伤害的疗法。每种伤害类型都需要不同的配方，其中最常见的是流血舒缓粉末、毒素舒缓粉末、火焰舒缓粉末和强酸舒缓粉末。你可以通过将舒缓粉末撒在自己身上或触及范围内的另一生物身上来启动它。目标可以立即重新进行一次纯骰检定，以移除这种粉末所针对的持续性伤害。如此一来，该纯骰检定的难度等级会降低至10，这与特别合适的协助类型的通常规则相同。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Soothing powders are remedies made to stop a particular type of persistent damage. Each damage type requires a different formula, with the most popular being bleed soothing powder, poison soothing powder, fire soothing powder, and acid soothing powder. You Activate soothing powder by sprinkling it on yourself or another creature within reach. The target can immediately attempt a new flat check to remove persistent damage the powder works against. This powder lowers the DC to 10, as normal for a particularly appropriate type of help.

Soothing Tonic (Moderate).name: 舒缓补剂（中等） Soothing Tonic (Moderate)
Soothing Tonic (Moderate).description:
启动 1（操作）

舒缓补剂是一种令人愉悦、带有鲜味的调合饮品，能够加快你的自然治疗，让你的伤口随着时间推移恢复得更快。你获得快速治疗3，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.p5KpVsJVzhoJ4OrS]{效果：舒缓补剂}

Activate 1 (manipulate)
