Soothing tonic is a pleasantly savory concoction that speeds your natural healing, so your wounds recover faster over time. You gain fast healing 3 for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.p5KpVsJVzhoJ4OrS]{Effect: Soothing Tonic}

Soothing Toddy.name: 舒缓热托迪酒 Soothing Toddy
Soothing Toddy.description:
启动 1（操作）

带有令人舒适的花香的热茶，舒缓热托迪使你获得对抗情绪效果以及对抗在制作时混入茶中的酒所决定的一种特征的效果的豁免骰+1物品加值。这些益处持续1小时。

  • 杏仁甜酒 听觉
  • 柠檬甜酒 嗅觉
  • 威士忌 视觉

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kIzYHyIN6xzbocuh]{效果：舒缓热托迪}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Hot tea with a comforting, flowery aroma, a soothing toddy grants you a +1 item bonus to saving throws against emotion effects and against effects with a trait determined by the liquor mixed into the tea when it's created. These benefits last for 1 hour.

  • Amaretto Auditory
  • Limoncello Olfactory
  • Whiskey Visual

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kIzYHyIN6xzbocuh]{Effect: Soothing Toddy}

Living Leaf Weave.name: 活叶编织 Living Leaf Weave
Living Leaf Weave.description:
这套叶织护甲经过特殊改造，能够代谢医疗化合物中的炼金加速剂。护甲中的一个特殊容器可以容纳一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{生命灵药}，安装它需要 3 个交互动作。

启动 1（操作）

需求 护甲中已安装一瓶生命灵药

效果 滑行的藤蔓从护甲中生长出来，使你进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒拿}的运动检定获得物品加值；你抵抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒拿}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}尝试的强韧难度等级获得物品加值；你抵抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}尝试的反射难度等级获得物品加值。该加值等于灵药的物品加值，并持续 3 轮。此次启动会耗尽该灵药，并且在安装新的灵药之前，护甲不能再次启动。

This suit of leaf weave armor is specially modified to metabolize the alchemical accelerants in medicinal compounds. A special receptacle in the armor can hold an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hDLbR56Id2OtU318]{Elixir of Life}, which takes 3 Interact actions to install.

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Requirements An elixir of life is installed in the armor

Effect Slithering vines grow from the armor, granting an item bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, to your Fortitude DC to resist Grapple, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} attempts, and to your Reflex DC to resist @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} attempts. The bonus is equal to the elixir's item bonus, and lasts for 3 rounds. The activation uses up the elixir, and the armor can't be activated again until a new one is installed.

Antidote (Lesser).name: 解毒剂（下等）
Antidote (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂会保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在对抗毒素的强韧豁免骰上获得 +2 物品加值，持续 6 小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Antidote (Moderate).name: 解毒剂（中等）
Antidote (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂能保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在 6 小时内对抗毒药的强韧豁免骰获得 +3 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Antiplague (Lesser).name: 抗疫药剂（下等）
Antiplague (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

抗疫药剂可以强化身体对疾病的防御。饮用抗疫药剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免骰获得+2物品加值；这也适用于你针对疾病进展进行的每日豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫药剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Antiplague (Moderate).name: 抗疫药剂（中等）
Antiplague (Moderate).description:
启动 A （操作）

抗疫药剂可以强化身体对疾病的防御。饮用抗疫药剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免骰获得+3物品加值；这也适用于你对抗疾病进展的每日豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫药剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Blood Booster (Lesser).name: 血液增益剂（下等）
Blood Booster (Lesser).description:
启动 1（操作）

这种灵药会增强你身体的天然防御，以及抵御那些经由血液传播或影响血液的疾患的能力。持续10分钟，你获得对持续性流血和持续性毒素伤害 5 抗力，并且你为结束持续性流血或持续性毒素伤害所进行的任何纯骰检定的难度等级降低，如同你获得了特别恰当的协助。

由游戏主持酌情决定，血液增益灵药还可以自动反制那些明确依赖于使饮用者血液变稀的非魔法效果，例如剥颅者的抗凝剂。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LfhCO3rP5ImzPyNY]{效果：血液增益}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This elixir bolsters your body's natural defenses and ability to resist maladies that travel through or affect blood. For 10 minutes you receive resistance 5 to persistent bleed and persistent poison damage, and you lower the DC for any flat checks to end persistent bleed or persistent poison damage as if you received particularly appropriate aid.

At the GM's discretion, blood booster elixirs can also automatically counteract non-magical effects that specifically rely on thinning the drinker's blood, such as a skull peeler's anticoagulant.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LfhCO3rP5ImzPyNY]{Effect: Blood Booster}

Elixir of Life (Lesser).name: 生命灵药（下等）
Elixir of Life (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程和免疫系统。饮用这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对疾病和毒素的豁免骰获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Elixir of Life (Minor).name: 生命灵药（下等） Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程和免疫系统。饮用这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对疾病和毒素的豁免骰获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Life Shot (Lesser).name: 生命射击（次等） Life Shot (Lesser)
Life Shot (Lesser).description:
弹药 轮

启动 1（操作）

生命弹是一种特殊弹药，内含少量生命灵药。被已启动的生命弹命中的生物不会因这次成功的攻击受到伤害，转而获得 @Damage[(3d4+3)[healing]] 治疗，并在1分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免骰获得+1物品加值。若为大成功，掷骰两次所获得的治疗并取较佳结果（这是一个幸运效果）。愿意被此次攻击命中的目标对此次攻击视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{效果：生命弹}

Ammunition round

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Life shot is a special cartridge that carries a small dose of elixir of life. A creature hit by activated life shot takes no damage from the successful attack, instead receiving @Damage[(3d4+3)[healing]] healing and gaining a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 1 minute. On a critical hit, roll the healing received twice and take the better result (this is a fortune effect). A target willing to be hit by this attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{Effect: Life Shot}

Life Shot (Minor).name: 生命弹（下等）
Life Shot (Minor).description:
弹药 轮

启动 1（操作）

生命弹是一种特殊弹药，内含少量生命灵药。被已启动的生命弹命中的生物不会因这次成功的攻击受到伤害，而是改为获得 @Damage[1d4[healing]] 治疗，并在1分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免骰获得+1物品加值。若为大成功，掷骰两次所获得的治疗并取较佳结果（这是一个幸运效果）。愿意被此次攻击命中的目标对此次攻击视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{效果：生命弹}

Ammunition round

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Life shot is a special cartridge that carries a small dose of elixir of life. A creature hit by activated life shot takes no damage from the successful attack, instead receiving @Damage[1d4[healing]] healing and gaining a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 1 minute. On a critical hit, roll the healing received twice and take the better result (this is a fortune effect). A target willing to be hit by this attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GPWMktaOERQIx83M]{Effect: Life Shot}

Healer's Toolkit.name: 医者工具包 Healer's Toolkit
Healer's Toolkit.description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医药检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施行急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所必需的。若你穿戴着你的医者工具包，你可以在使用这些工具的动作中将其作为该动作的一部分抽出并收回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace its tools as part of the action that uses them.

Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).name: 医者工具包（扩展）
Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医药检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施行急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所必需的。扩展版医者工具包为此类检定提供+1物品加值。如果你穿戴着你的医者工具包，你可以在使用这些工具的动作中将其作为该动作的一部分抽出并收回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Expanded healer's toolkits provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace its tools as part of the action that uses them.

The Hand of Spring.prototypeToken: 春之手 The Hand of Spring

Carved wooden game set.name: 雕刻木制游戏套装 Carved wooden game set

Wooden Breastplate.name: 木制胸甲 Wooden Breastplate
Wooden Breastplate.description:
一套经过雕刻和硬化处理的木制胸甲，在形状和功能上都类似于金属胸甲。这类胸甲可以由大块木材雕刻而成，但更常见的是通过魔法从特殊树木中引导出木材制成，无论是由德鲁伊、精灵、妖精，还是像树人或莱西这样的植物生物所为。

A suit of carved and tempered wood, a wooden breastplate resembles a metal breastplate in shape and function. Such suits can be carved from large pieces of wood, but they most often come from wood coaxed magically from special trees, whether by druids, elves, fey, or plant creatures such as arboreals or leshies.

Wooden Taws.name: 木陀螺 Wooden Taws
Wooden Taws.description:
可由陶斯发射器发射的木制陀螺。

Wooden Taws to be fired from a Taw launcher.

Quality painting by an unknown.name: 佚名的高质量绘画 Quality painting by an unknown

Animal-Turning Fulu.name: 驱兽符 Animal-Turning Fulu
Animal-Turning Fulu.description:
启动 R（专注）

触发 一个具有动物特征的生物成功对你进行打击。

这张符箓上描绘着惊惧的动物，它们从一个中心人物身边向四面八方逃窜（传统上这一人物表现为一名人类猎人，但有时也会被描绘成一名骷髅不死生物，甚至是一个有着细长破损手臂的邪魔）。你启动这张符箓，获得对抗此次触发打击的 AC +2 物品加值。如果这使该打击未命中，则直到你下个回合开始前，你对该触发生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Activate R (concentrate)

Trigger A creature with the animal trait successfully Strikes you.

Frightened animals depicted on this fulu flee in all directions from a central figure (traditionally represented by a human hunter, but sometimes depicted as a skeletal undead creature or even a fiend with long, broken arms). You activate this fulu, gaining a +2 item bonus to AC against the triggering Strike. If this causes the Strike to miss, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from the triggering creature until the start of your next turn.

Firecracker Fulu.name: 鞭炮符箓 Firecracker Fulu
Firecracker Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你使用所贴附的武器进行攻击掷骰时大成功。

符箓爆炸，向区域洒落明亮的火花。被击中的生物额外受到 @Damage[1d4[sonic]] 伤害，并且必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:15] 强韧豁免中成功，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮（若大失败则目眩1分钟）。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon.

The fulu explodes and showers the area with bright sparks. The struck creature takes an additional @Damage[1d4[sonic]] damage and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (or dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure).

Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).name: 隐私结界符（走廊）
Privacy Ward Fulu (Hallway).description:
这张符箓旨在让盗贼、间谍以及不受欢迎的注意力远离一个房间。符箓中央绘有一把锁，周围环绕着一圈圈破损的钥匙。将其贴在房间内部的墙上时，房间内的所有生物在对抗房间外生物的隐秘检定上获得物品加值。

隐私结界符可以护一个最多10平方英尺的房间，提供+1物品加值，且持续时间为1小时。

This fulu seeks to keep thieves, spies, and unwanted attention away from a room. A depiction of a lock appears in the center of this fulu, which is in turn surrounded by circles of broken keys. When applied to a wall inside a room, all creatures within the room gain an item bonus to Stealth checks against creatures outside the room.

The privacy ward fulu can shield a room of up to 10 square feet, grants a +1 item bonus, and has a duration of 1 hour.

Traveler's Fulu.name: 行旅符 Traveler's Fulu
Traveler's Fulu.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你尝试进行辨别方向

需求 你在求生上受过训练。

这张符箓上绘有一系列星座与箭矢，描绘出夜晚天空中天体的运行轨迹。当你启动行旅符时，魔法会将似曾相识的感觉注入你的心智，仿佛你以前曾来过这片区域。你这次尝试进行辨别方向时，视为拥有一个罗盘，并且你使用的结果视为比你为辨别方向进行的求生检定结果高一个成功等级；如果你在求生上达到大师，则高两个成功等级。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You attempt to Sense Direction

Requirements You're trained in Survival.

This fulu shows a series of constellations and arrows depicting astronomical movements through the night sky. When you activate a traveler's fulu, the magic infuses your mind with sensations of deja vu, as if you'd been in this region before. Your attempt to Sense Direction functions as if you have a compass, and you use the outcome one degree of success better than the result of your Survival check to Sense Direction, or by two degrees of success if you're a master in Survival.

Fulu of Fire Suppression.name: 灭火符箓 Fulu of Fire Suppression
Fulu of Fire Suppression.description:
这张黑纸符箓上的银墨时隐时现，尤其是在你眼角余光捕捉到它时更是如此。它通常被放置在厨房中，这张符箓能使30尺半径内火势的蔓延速度减半。

如果符箓本身着火了，那么在其燃烧时，它会释放出一阵 @Template[cone|distance:30] 的水流，自动扑灭这一区域内的非魔法火焰，并以+7反制调整值和2环阶尝试反制任何魔法火焰效果；发生这种情况时，符箓的持续时间会提前结束。

The silver ink on this black paper charm ebbs in and out of sight, especially when caught out of the corner of your eye. Usually placed in the kitchen, this fulu slows the spread of fire in a 30-foot radius by half.

If the fulu itself catches fire, as it burns, it releases a shower of water in a @Template[cone|distance:30], automatically putting out non-magical fires in this area and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects with a +7 counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 2; when this happens, the fulu's duration ends early

Fulu of Flood Suppression.name: 镇洪符箓 Fulu of Flood Suppression
Fulu of Flood Suppression.description:
这张蓝色符箓上绘有深色墨迹，墨迹会缓缓盘旋扭动，随着潮汐在一整天中于纸上扩张与收缩。这张符箓在建筑物最低处，或靠近最有价值或最不防水的物品时最为有效。随着雨季临近，人们常能见到它，而在一场特别大型的风暴来袭前，其需求往往会激增。

这张符箓会将 30 足半径内洪水蔓延的速度减半，并将其余的水向外排斥。如果符箓被完全浸没，随着墨迹在水中溶解，它会在 @Template[emanation|distance:10] 内释放出一股热浪，将该区域内的非魔法水无害地汽化为蒸汽，并以 +7 反制调整值和 2 环阶级尝试反制任何魔法水效果；当这种情况发生时，这张符箓的持续时间会提前结束。

This blue fulu bears dark ink that slowly swirls and twists about itself, expanding and contracting on the paper over the course of the day in time with the tides. This fulu is most effective in the lowest area of a building, or near the most valuable or least-waterproof items. They're often seen as the rainy season approaches, with demand spiking just before a particularly large storm hits.

The fulu slows the spread of flooding water in a 30-foot radius by half, repelling the remaining water away. If the fulu becomes submersed, as the ink dissolves in the water, it releases a rush of heat in a @Template[emanation|distance:10], harmlessly vaporizing non-magical water in this area into steam and attempting to counteract any magical water effects with a +7 counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 2; when this happens, the fulu's duration ends early.

Matchmaker Fulu.name: 姻缘符箓 Matchmaker Fulu
Matchmaker Fulu.description:
用法 贴附于护甲

启动 f 想象

触发 你尝试进行一次用于留下印象的交涉检定。

这张红色符箓中蕴含着美与爱情女神希琳对人际关系的祝福。你在此次交涉检定上获得+2状态加值，且如果你在该检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate f envision

Trigger You attempt a Diplomacy check to Make an Impression.

This red fulu contains blessings for one's relationship from Shelyn, goddess of beauty and love. You get a +2 status bonus to the Diplomacy check, and if you roll a critical failure on the check, you get a failure instead.

Venomous Cure Fulu.name: 剧毒疗愈符箓 Venomous Cure Fulu
Venomous Cure Fulu.description:
用法 贴附于护甲

启动 f 想象

触发 你尝试对一种注入型毒素进行一次豁免检定。

这张绿色符箓描绘了有毒的生物与害虫。启动后，符箓中的毒液会与您体内的毒液相抗，使你在此次触发的豁免检定上获得+2状态加值。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate f envision

Trigger You attempt a saving throw against an injected poison.

This green fulu depicts venomous creatures and vermin. When activated, the venom from the fulu fights against the venom in your system, granting you a +2 status bonus to the triggering saving throw.

Magical Lock Fulu.name: 魔法锁符箓 Magical Lock Fulu
Magical Lock Fulu.description:
用法 贴附于门、窗或容器上

持续时间 1小时

这张符箓上的符号描绘了一把锁和盘绕的锁链。将这张符箓贴在目标的接缝或边框上即可将其锁住，即使它没有门闩或现有的锁也可以。最多可以将九张符箓贴在同一个目标上。一张符箓相当于一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PBlxTrEyr3qXFBqq]{劣质锁}（DC 15），三张相当于一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JZXCTwoIWoGKjMX6]{简易锁}（DC 20），九张相当于一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.q2TYVAMaK6UfenbV]{普通锁}（DC 25）。

Usage affixed to a door, window, or container

Duration 1 hour

The symbols on this fulu depict a lock and winding chains. Affixing this fulu over the seam or frame of the target locks it, even if it has no latch or existing lock. As many as nine fulus can be applied to the same target. One fulu equates a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PBlxTrEyr3qXFBqq]{Poor Lock} (DC 15), three a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JZXCTwoIWoGKjMX6]{Simple Lock} (DC 20), and nine an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.q2TYVAMaK6UfenbV]{Average Lock} (DC 25).

Privacy Ward Fulu (Room).name: 隐私结界符（房间）
Privacy Ward Fulu (Room).description:
这个符箓旨在让盗贼、间谍和不受欢迎的关注远离一个房间。符箓中央绘有一把锁，周围环绕着一圈圈破损的钥匙。当它被贴在房间内侧的墙上时，房间内的所有生物在对抗房间外生物的隐秘检定上获得物品加值。

该符箓可以护持一个至多30平方英尺的房间，提供+1物品加值，持续时间为8小时。如果你在房间内变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{藏匿}，则你会自动对等级等于或低于该符箓等级的生物变为无踪。

This fulu seeks to keep thieves, spies, and unwanted attention away from a room. A depiction of a lock appears in the center of this fulu, which is in turn surrounded by circles of broken keys. When applied to a wall inside a room, all creatures within the room gain an item bonus to Stealth checks against creatures outside the room.

The fulu can shield a room of up to 30 square feet, grants a +1 item bonus, and has a duration of 8 hours. If you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} within the room, you automatically become undetected to creatures of the fulu's level or lower.

Apotropaic Fulu.name: 辟邪符箓 Apotropaic Fulu
Apotropaic Fulu.description:
用法 贴在入口上方

这张不起眼的黄纸贴在门或门上方，在光下微微闪烁。选择一个阵营特征：混乱、善良、守序或邪恶。当具有与该符箓相反阵营特征的生物（邪恶符箓对应善良，以此类推）穿过入口时，它必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:17] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；无论成功与否，该生物都会获得持续1天的暂时免疫。

Usage affixed over an entrance

This unassuming yellow paper, affixed above a door or gate, flickers in the light. Pick an alignment trait: chaotic, good, lawful, or evil. When a creature with the opposing alignment trait of the fulu (good for an evil fulu, and so on) passes through the entrance, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}; regardless of whether they succeed, the creature becomes temporarily immune for 1 day.

Fulu of the Drunken Monkey.name: 醉猴符箓 Fulu of the Drunken Monkey
Fulu of the Drunken Monkey.description:
用法 贴附于护甲

启动 f 想象

触发 你尝试对一种摄入性毒素进行强韧豁免。

这张符箓上的猴子坐在护甲上方、恰好位于穿戴者胃部上方的位置，开心地饮下任何流下来的致醉之物。当你启动这张符箓时，你在此次触发的强韧豁免上获得+2状态加值，并在接下来1分钟内，对抗同一种毒素的强韧豁免也获得该加值。如果触发的毒素是普通的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UMAXLDpI6YLSfYX1]{酒精}，则你此次触发的豁免改为自动成功，并在1分钟内对抗酒精的豁免获得+4状态加值。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate f envision

Trigger You attempt a Fortitude save against an ingested poison.

The monkey on this fulu sits on the point of the armor just over the bearer's stomach, happily drinking any intoxicants that come flowing down. When you activate the fulu, you gain a +2 status bonus on the triggering Fortitude save and on Fortitude saves against the same poison for the next minute. If the triggering poison was normal @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UMAXLDpI6YLSfYX1]{Alcohol}, you instead automatically succeed at the triggering save and gain a +4 status bonus on saves against alcohol for 1 minute.

Fulu of the Stoic Ox.name: 坚毅公牛符箓 Fulu of the Stoic Ox
Fulu of the Stoic Ox.description:
用法 贴附于护甲上

启动 f 默想

触发 你尝试进行一次对抗疾病的强韧豁免。

这张符箓上的公牛警觉地伏在护甲上正对佩戴者心脏的位置，保护佩戴者免受疾病侵害并守护其健康。当你启动该符箓时，你在此次由触发引发的强韧豁免上获得+2状态加值，并且在接下来1分钟内，对抗同一疾病的所有强韧豁免也获得该加值。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate f envision

Trigger You attempt a Fortitude save against a disease.

The ox on this fulu rests vigilantly on the point of the armor right over the bearer's heart, protecting the bearer against diseases and safeguarding their health. When you activate the fulu, you gain a +2 status bonus on the triggering Fortitude save and on all Fortitude saves against the same disease for the next minute.

Tracking Fulu.name: 追踪符箓 Tracking Fulu
Tracking Fulu.description:
用法 贴附于生物或物体

启动 f تصور

这对符箓常被刺客和间谍秘密使用，制作完成时会彼此黏在一起，但也能轻易分开。在启动其中一张之前，先将另一张符箓贴附到目标上。启动后，未贴附的符箓会以每轮30尺的速度飘向已贴附的那张，最多持续1小时；距离其成对符箓越近，飘动得越快。未贴附的符箓总是沿直线朝已贴附的符箓移动；它无法穿越迷宫，也无法在蜿蜒的道中找到路线。

Usage affixed to creature or object

Activate f envision

Used covertly by assassins and spies, this pair of fulus stick to one another when created but can be easily separated. Affix one fulu to a target before activating its pair. When activated, the unaffixed fulu flutters toward the affixed one at a speed of 30 feet per round, traveling for up to 1 hour and fluttering more rapidly the closer it comes to its pair. The unaffixed fulu always moves in a straight line towards the affixed fulu; it can't solve mazes or find its way through winding paths

Demolition Fulu (Lesser).name: 爆破符箓（次等）
Demolition Fulu (Lesser).description:
爆破符箓使破坏者或挖掘者能够在爆破发生时远离现场。该符箓会在5分钟到8小时内崩解成灰烬，具体时间由你在放置符箓时决定。一旦持续时间结束，符箓会使其所附着物体的硬度降低一个等于该符箓等级的数值，然后对该物体造成@Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]]。爆破符箓作为一种危害，拥有用于侦测它的@Check[perception|dc:17]检定，以及根据其类型用于解除它的@Check[thievery|dc:17]检定。

A demolition fulu allows a saboteur or excavator to be far away from the scene when demolition happens. The fulu crumbles to ash over 5 minutes to 8 hours, as you determine when you place the fulu. Once the duration ends, the fulu lowers the Hardness of the object it's affixed to by an amount equal to the fulu's level and then deals @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] to the object. A demolition fulu serves as a hazard with a @Check[perception|dc:17] check to detect it and @Check[thievery|dc:17] check to disable it according to its type.

Discord Fulu.name: Discord 符箓 Discord Fulu
Discord Fulu.description:
持续时间 1小时

在书写时加入绿色颜料的离间符箓，是一种常见但不道德的工具，常被用在情敌身上以阻挠其追求。只要符箓贴附在其身上，该生物对其他生物的态度就会被视为比实际情况差一级。该生物还会在交涉检定中承受–1状态减值。该生物在交涉检定中首次掷出的失败改为大失败，随后符箓化为灰烬，其效果结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.b1y4mJG0CeNIuhc0]{效果：离间符箓}

Duration 1 hour

Incorporating green in its writing, a discord fulu is a popular but unethical tool often deployed on romantic rivals to foil their advances. While the fulu is affixed to it, a creature treats its attitude toward other creatures as one step worse than it is. The creature also takes a –1 status penalty to Diplomacy checks. The first failure the creature rolls on a Diplomacy check becomes a critical failure instead, and the fulu turns to ash, ending its effect.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.b1y4mJG0CeNIuhc0]{Effect: Discord Fulu}

Poracha Fulu.name: 波拉查符箓 Poracha Fulu
Poracha Fulu.description:
精魂森林附近的民间传说讲述了poracha符箓的起源。曾经，一名旅人救下了一只八足猫科动物，而它竟然是一位 poracha 王子。作为回报，王子给了旅人一张符箓，后来这张符箓阻止了一种发作迅速的毒素将其杀死。传统上，人们会佩戴最多九张poracha符箓串成的一串，视为一件护符。每当你受到持续性伤害时，附着在你身上的一张poracha符箓都会抵消该伤害并化为尘土。这个反应是自动发生的，但你可以使用自由动作（观想）来阻止你的符箓作出反应。若你如此做，附着在你身上的任何poracha符箓都不会对那次持续性伤害作出反应。

Folklore from near the Forest of Spirits tells of the origin of the poracha fulu. Once, a traveler saved an eight-legged feline who turned out to be a poracha prince. In return, the prince gave the traveler a fulu that later prevented a fast-acting poison from slaying them. Traditionally, one wears a string of up to nine poracha fulus, which counts as one talisman. Each time you take persistent damage, one poracha fulu affixed to you negates the damage and crumbles to dust. This response is automatic, but you can use a free action (envision) to prevent your fulus from responding. If you do, any poracha fulus affixed to you never respond to that persistent damage.

Sentry Fulu.name: 哨卫符箓 Sentry Fulu
Sentry Fulu.description:
启动 3（专注，操作）

一个哨卫符箓描绘着一名全副武装的守卫。当你启动该符箓时，它会化为一个由纸制成的微型类人生物守卫，并在一个20足爆发的区域内警戒。该守卫拥有20的察觉DC，以及精确视觉感官和不精确听觉与振动感官，用以侦测其区域内移动的生物，包括穿过空中的生物。你指定守卫是在其区域内保持静止还是进行巡逻；若为后者，你还要决定守卫行进的路径，其速度为25尺。你还要设定一个其他人必须告知守卫的口令以绕过它。若有生物未说出口令便进入该区域，哨卫会发出可听见的警报或精神警报。可听见的警报具有如同人类呼喊般的声音与音量，并具有听觉（特征），使每个能听见它的生物若在睡眠中都可尝试进行一次@Check[perception|dc:15]检定以醒来。若你位于已启动守卫的60尺内，则精神警报会传达到你（见下文）。守卫会持续启动8小时，之后该符箓被消耗。

如果你拥有不止一个哨卫符箓，你可以布置数个使其作为一个整体运作，前提是它们的区域彼此接触或重叠。当其中一个发出警报时，警报会传递至所有符箓，因此你只需位于其中一个的射程内便能听见它或接收到精神警报。对一个整体中的某个哨卫符箓说出正确口令的生物，无需再向其他哨卫符箓重复该口令。一个整体中由符箓创造的某个守卫若被摧毁，会触发相连区域内其他守卫的警报。

Activate 3 (concentrate, manipulate)

A sentry fulu depicts an armed guard. When you activate the fulu, it takes the shape of a Tiny humanoid guard made of paper and keeps watch over an area in a 20-foot burst. The guard has a Perception DC of 20, along with precise visual senses and imprecise hearing and vibrational sense to detect creatures moving in its area, including through the air. You dictate whether the guard remains still in its area or patrols it; if the latter, you also determine the path the guard takes, at a Speed of 25 feet. You also determine a password others must give the guard to bypass it. If a creature enters the area without giving the password, the sentry creates either an audible or mental alarm. An audible alarm has the sound and volume of a human shouting, as well as the auditory trait, allowing each creature that can hear it to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up if they're asleep. The mental alert reaches you if you're within 60 feet of the active guard (see below). The guard remains active for 8 hours, and then the fulu is consumed.

If you have more than one sentry fulu, you can set up several that function as a unit, provided their areas touch or overlap. When one sounds its alarm, the alarm passes through all of them, so you must be within range of only one to hear it or receive the mental alert. Creatures that give the correct password to one sentry fulu in a unit need not give that password again to the others. The destruction of one fulu-created guard in a unit sets off the alarm in others in connected areas.

Spirit-Sealing Fulu.name: 缚尸符箓 Spirit-Sealing Fulu
Spirit-Sealing Fulu.description:
用法 贴附于一个亡灵上

持续时间 1 轮

这种经典的符箓会封住亡灵体内的虚空能量，使其当场冻结不动。贴附后，目标亡灵必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:17|name:spirit-sealing fulu|showDC:all] 意志豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 1 轮。

Usage affixed to one undead creature

Duration 1 round

This classic fulu seals the void energy within an undead, freezing it in its tracks. Upon affixing, the target undead must attempt a @Check[will|dc:17|name:spirit-sealing fulu|showDC:all] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Stumbling Fulu.name: 蹒跚符箓 Stumbling Fulu
Stumbling Fulu.description:
持续时间 1小时

最先创造出蹒跚符箓的狐人建议使用者将符箓塞到目标的腰带下面，以获得最佳效果。当附着符箓的生物完成一次行走动作时，该生物必须尝试一次@Check[reflex|dc:17]豁免。若失败，符箓所附着的护甲上的某个部分会松脱，使穿戴者陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}。若大失败，目标会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}。笨拙（状态）会持续，直到目标总共花费1个交互动作，外加每高于1点笨拙值再额外花费1个交互动作，才能把衣装重新整理妥当。符箓一旦启动，便会燃烧殆尽；它的魔法只会持续到其施加的状态结束为止。

Duration 1 hour

The kitsune who first created a stumbling fulu advised the user to tuck the fulu under the target's belt for maximum effect. When the creature to which the fulu is affixed completes a Stride action, the creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:17] save. On a failure, some element of the armor the fulu is affixed to comes undone, making the wearer @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}. On a critical failure, the target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}. The clumsy condition remains until the target takes a total of 1 Interact action, plus 1 additional Interact action per value of the clumsy condition above 1, to properly reclothe itself. Once the fulu activates, it burns up, its magic lasting only as long as the conditions it has imposed.

Thousand-Pains Fulu (Stone).name: 千痛符箓（石） Thousand-Pains Fulu (Stone)
Thousand-Pains Fulu (Stone).description:
持续时间 1分钟

由一位为追求无尽生命而抛弃道德的外科师所创造，千痛符箓会阻断身体内元素的自然流动。被贴附此符箓的生物必须进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:19|basic]。失败或大失败会使目标预备承受由某个特定状态触发的持续性伤害，且该状态必须在符箓的持续时间内满足。

这张符箓的黄色纸面摸起来满是灰尘且僵硬。符箓会造成@Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]]，因为肌肉会肿胀并挤压关节与骨骼。若失败或大失败，则当目标受到电击伤害时，它还会受到@Damage[1d6[persistent,bludgeoning]]。

Duration 1 minute

Created by a chirurgeon who threw away morality in search of endless life, a thousand-pains fulu blocks the natural flow of elements in the body. A creature to which the fulu is affixed must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:19|basic]. Failure or critical failure primes the target for persistent damage triggered by a specific condition that must be met within the fulu's duration.

This fulu's yellow parchment feels dusty and stiff. The fulu deals @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] as muscles swell to crush joints and bones. On a failure or critical failure, if the target takes electricity damage, it takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] as well.

Artisan's Toolkit.name: 工匠工具包 Artisan's Toolkit
Artisan's Toolkit.description:
你需要这些工具，才能使用制作技能以原始材料制造物品。不同的工作需要不同的工具组，具体由游戏主持裁定；例如，铁匠的工具包与木工的工具包不同。如果你将你的工匠工具包穿戴在身上，你可以将其作为使用它的那个动作的一部分拔出并收回。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Artisan's Toolkit (Sterling).name: 工匠工具包（专家级）
Artisan's Toolkit (Sterling).description:
你需要这些工具，才能用制作技能将原始材料制成物品。专家级工匠工具让你在该检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

不同的工作需要不同的工具组，具体由游戏主持决定；例如，铁匠的工具包与木工的工具包就不相同。如果你穿戴着你的工匠工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分取出并收回。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Sterling artisan's tools give you a +1 item bonus to the check.

Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Religious Symbol (Wooden).name: 宗教圣徽（木制） Religious Symbol (Wooden)
Religious Symbol (Wooden).description:
这块木质或银质物品上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。某些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来使用某些能力并施放某些法术。圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身体上，也可以持握。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Wooden Shield.name: 木制盾牌 Wooden Shield
Wooden Shield.description:
尽管木制盾牌有各种各样的形状和体型，但它们所提供的防护来自其材料的坚固。木制盾牌虽然比钢盾便宜，但也更容易损坏。

硬度HPBT
3126

Though they come in a variety of shapes and sizes, the protection offered by wooden shields comes from the stoutness of their materials. While wooden shields are less expensive than steel shields, they break more easily.

HardnessHPBT
3126

Peachwood Talisman.name: 桃木护符 Peachwood Talisman
Peachwood Talisman.description:
许可 天夏起源

启动 1（专注）

这块薄而方的木牌上刻有象征吉运与幸运的符号。它因其上所施加的祝福而散发着檀香气息。启动后，在接下来1分钟内，你可以感知来自亡灵的攻击。对于等级等于或低于你的藏匿、无踪或夹击的亡灵，或等级等于或低于你且使用突袭攻击的亡灵，你不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态。不过，它们仍然可以协助其盟友形成夹击。

Access Tian Xia origin

Activate 1 (concentrate)

Symbols of good fortune and luck are carved on this thin, square wooden plaque. It smells of sandalwood from the blessings placed upon it. After activation, for the next minute, you can sense attacks from undead. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, or flanking undead of your level or lower, or undead of your level or lower using surprise attack. However, they can still help their allies flank.

Alcohol.name: 酒精 Alcohol
Alcohol.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，种类繁多，令人眼花缭乱。一剂酒精的价格取决于具体的饮品种类。当你处于酒精影响下时，无法从酒精导致的恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免骰中失败，且不是初始豁免，则该苦难的阶段不会增加；提高酒精苦难阶段的唯一方式是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，对抗恐惧效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}、措手不及、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 笨拙 2、恶心 2，且呆滞 2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Waterskin.name: 水囊 Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，水囊大约可供一个小型或中型生物饮用 1 天所需的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Glasses of Sociability.name: 社交眼镜 Glasses of Sociability
Glasses of Sociability.description:
这些带有大型圆形镜片的金属丝框眼镜被发明出来，唯一目的就是避免在社交聚会中遭遇尴尬的对峙。它们使你在交涉上获得 +1 物品加值。

启动 1 想象

效果 你凝视另一个生物，如果你曾与其见过面并互通姓名，便会立刻想起对方的名字。眼镜依赖于你潜在的记忆，因此如果该生物正在伪装身份，眼镜就无法看穿伪装。如果一个卓柏卡布拉伪装成你见过的旅店老板，眼镜会给出那位旅店老板的名字；而如果一位你先前见过的贵族伪装成戴面具的义警，眼镜则不会揭示他们的名字。

These wire-rim glasses with large, circular lenses were invented for the sole purpose of avoiding awkward confrontations at social gatherings. They grant you a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy.

Activate 1 envision

Effect You stare at another creature and instantly remember their name if you've met and exchanged names. The glasses rely on your latent memories, so if the creature is disguising their identity, the glasses don't penetrate the disguise. If a doppelganger was disguised as an innkeeper you met, the glasses would give you the innkeeper's name, and if a noble you met before was in disguise as a masked vigilante, the glasses wouldn't reveal their name.

Merciful Balm.name: 仁慈香膏 Merciful Balm
Merciful Balm.description:
启动 1（操作）

仁慈香膏散发着浓郁的草药与松脂气味，是一种浓稠黏滑的膏状物，可用于涂抹在武器上，使该武器获得非致命（特征）持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.ycKxoeZwg7g9Ivh5]{效果：仁慈香膏}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Smelling strongly of herbs and pine resin, merciful balm is a thick, sticky paste that can be used to anoint a weapon, granting the weapon the nonlethal trait for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.ycKxoeZwg7g9Ivh5]{Effect: Merciful Balm}

Anticorrosion Oil.name: 防蚀油 Anticorrosion Oil
Anticorrosion Oil.description:
启动 1（操作）

你可以将防蚀油涂覆在负载为6或以下的物体上。持续24小时，该物体受到的酸性伤害，以及所有明确使其生锈或腐蚀的效果（例如接触矿虱的唾液）造成的伤害减半。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

You can coat objects of 6 Bulk or less with anticorrosion oil. For 24 hours, the object takes half damage from acid and from all effects that specifically cause it to rust or corrode, such as contact with an ore louse's saliva.

Shielding Salve.name: 护盾药膏 Shielding Salve
Shielding Salve.description:
启动 1 交互

这种闪烁的油膏具有许多与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{护盾术}法术相似的特性。当你把它涂抹在一个生物或物体上时，目标的 AC 获得 +1 环境加值，持续 1 轮。在该轮内，第一次有实体攻击或力场弹幕命中目标时，此油膏会防止该次攻击或法术造成的 5 点伤害，然后此油膏的效果结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.16tOZk4qy329s2aK]{效果：护盾油膏}

Activate 1 Interact

This shimmering paste has many properties of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{Shield} spell. When you slather it onto a creature or object, the target gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC for 1 round. The first time a physical attack or a force barrage hits the target during that round, the oil prevents 5 damage from that attack or spell, and then the oil's effect ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.16tOZk4qy329s2aK]{Effect: Shielding Salve}

Alcohol.name: 酒精 Alcohol
Alcohol.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，且种类繁多、令人惊叹。一剂酒精的价格取决于具体的饮品种类。当你受到酒精影响时，你无法从酒精导致的恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免骰中失败，且该次并非初始豁免，则该苦难的阶段不会提升；提升酒精苦难阶段的唯一方式是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，对抗恐惧效果的豁免骰获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}、措手不及、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 笨拙2、恶心2和呆滞2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Bravo's Brew (Lesser).name: 勇者的酿饮（次等） Bravo's Brew (Lesser)
Bravo's Brew (Lesser).description:
启动 A (操作)

这瓶泡沫啤酒能够赋予勇气。饮用这瓶灵药后的接下来1小时内，你的意志豁免获得 +1 物品加值；若是尝试对抗恐惧的意志豁免，则改为获得 +2。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{Effect: Bravo's Brew}

Activate A (manipulate)

This flask of foaming beer grants courage. For the next hour after drinking this elixir, you gain a +1 item bonus to Will saves, or +2 when attempting Will saves against fear.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.eh7EqmDBDW30ShCu]{Effect: Bravo's Brew}

Nectar of Purification.name: 净化灵蜜 Nectar of Purification
Nectar of Purification.description:
启动 A（操作）

净化甘露是一种闪烁微光的液体，通常储存在与装醋所用瓶子相似的瓶中。将这种油倒在任何食物或饮品上时，它会对其施放一个 1 环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qXTB7Ec9yYh5JPPV]{净化料理}法术。净化甘露在其效果生效时会蒸发，不会改变食物或饮品的味道与质地。

Activate A (manipulate)

A shimmering liquid, nectar of purification is often stored in bottles similar to those used for vinegar. This oil casts a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qXTB7Ec9yYh5JPPV]{Cleanse Cuisine} spell over any food or drink onto which it's poured. The nectar evaporates as it takes effect, leaving the taste and texture of the food or drink unaltered.

Oil of Potency.name: 潜能油 Oil of Potency
Oil of Potency.description:
启动 1（操作）

当你将这种浓稠黏滞的油涂抹到一件武器或一套护甲上时，该物品立刻获得魔法潜能。如果该物品是武器，它暂时成为+1强效符文强击武器；如果是护甲，它暂时成为+1坚韧护甲。此效果持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1OLlwExJz7ii2Lu2]{效果：潜能油}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

When you apply this thick, viscous oil to a weapon or suit of armor, that item immediately becomes magically potent. If the item is a weapon, it temporarily becomes a +1 striking weapon, or, if it's armor, it temporarily becomes +1 resilient armor. This lasts for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1OLlwExJz7ii2Lu2]{Effect: Oil of Potency}

Oil of Weightlessness.name: 失重油 Oil of Weightlessness
Oil of Weightlessness.description:
启动 1 （操作）

你可以将这种闪烁的油涂抹在一件1负载或以下的物品上，使其感觉轻若无物。该物品在1小时内的负载可忽略不计。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

You can spread this shimmering oil on an item of 1 Bulk or less to make it feel weightless. It has negligible Bulk for 1 hour.

Magnifying Glass.name: 放大镜 Magnifying Glass
Magnifying Glass.description:
这枚优质手持透镜使你在察觉检定中获得 +1 物品加值，以发现文件、织物等中的细微细节。

This quality handheld lens gives you a +1 item bonus to Perception checks to notice minute details of documents, fabric, and the like.

Eternal Blaze Ironworks.name: 永焰铁工坊 Eternal Blaze Ironworks
Eternal Blaze Ironworks.tokenName: 永焰铁工坊 Eternal Blaze Ironworks

Chain Mail.name: 锁子甲 Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description:
一套锁子甲由数件由小金属环相互连接成防护网的护甲部件组成。它通常包括一件链衫、护腿、一对臂甲和一顶锁子头巾，共同保护身体的大部分。

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

Scale Mail.name: 鳞甲 Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多缝在加固皮革衬底上的金属鳞片组成，通常制成长衫的形式，用于保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Lamellar Breastplate.name: 札甲胸甲 Lamellar Breastplate
Lamellar Breastplate.description:
由皮革或丝绳系在一起的上漆钢片或其他金属片构成了大多数札甲胸甲。上漆可以防止金属腐蚀。

Slats of lacquered steel or other metal held together with cord, whether leather or silk, make up most lamellar breastplates. The lacquering prevents the metal from corroding.

Katana.name: 武士刀 Katana
Katana.description:
武士刀是一种弯曲的单刃剑，以其锋利无比的刀刃而闻名。

A katana is a curved, single-edged sword known for its wickedly sharped blade.

Kama.name: 镰刃 Kama
Kama.description:
镰刃与镰刀相似，并在某些地区用于收割谷物，具有短而略微弯曲的刀刃和木制握柄。

Similar to a sickle and used in some regions to reap grain, a kama has a short, slightly curved blade and a wooden handle.

Nunchaku.name: 双节棍 Nunchaku
Nunchaku.description:
双节棍由两根木制或金属棒构成，并由一小段绳索或链条连接。

The nunchaku is constructed of two wooden or metal bars connected by a short length of rope or chain.

Sai.name: 十手 Sai
Sai.description:
这把刺击匕首是一根金属尖刺，两侧有一对叉齿，可以用来卡住敌人的武器。

This piercing dagger is a metal spike flanked by a pair of prongs that can be used to trap an enemy's weapon.

Shuriken.name: 手里剑 Shuriken
Shuriken.description:
这种“投掷星”是一种小巧的扁平金属片，边缘锋利，设计成只需手腕轻轻一抖就能掷出。

This "throwing star" is a small piece of flat metal with sharp edges, designed to be flung with a flick of the wrist.

Tengu Gale Blade.name: 天狗烈风刃 Tengu Gale Blade
Tengu Gale Blade.description:
这把由天狗铁匠设计的扇形剑有五片宽阔的剑刃，在剑柄处汇合。天狗水手把它们当作临时的天气风向标来使用，因为当松松地高举着它时，剑会随着风的方向旋转。

This fan-shaped sword designed by tengu smiths has five broad blades that join at its hilt. Tengu sailors use them as makeshift weather vanes, for the sword spins in the wind's direction when loosely held aloft.

Wakizashi.name: 胁差 Wakizashi
Wakizashi.description:
这把短刃单锋的剑通常与一把 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Y1dkRsRd1Z7Jf2y6]{武士刀} 成对携带。

This short-bladed, single-edged sword is typically carried as part of a pair alongside a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Y1dkRsRd1Z7Jf2y6]{Katana}.

Hook Sword.name: 钩剑 Hook Sword
Hook Sword.description:
这把长剑在剑尖附近有一个钩子，使其能够轻易钩住对手或他们的武器。

This long sword has a hook near the tip, making it easy to snag an opponent or their weapons.

Kusarigama.name: 锁镰 Kusarigama
Kusarigama.description:
这种令人印象深刻但难以驾驭的武器由一个重锤通过一段链条连接在镰刃上构成，这有助于缴械对手或从远处发起攻击。

This impressive but demanding weapon consists of a weight attached to a kama via a length of chain, which aids with disarming an opponent or attacking from a distance.

Naginata.name: 薙刀 Naginata
Naginata.description:
这根 6 足长的法杖一端装有一片 2 足长、略微弯曲、形似剑刃的刀刃。长杆有助于让持用者避开剑和较短武器的触及范围。

This 6-foot staff has a 2-foot-long, slightly curved, swordlike blade attached at one end. The long pole helps keep the wielder out of reach of swords and shorter weapons.

Rope Dart.name: 绳镖 Rope Dart
Rope Dart.description:
这是一种看似简单的武器，由一段绳索连接着一枚带配重的锥形金属尖刺制成。绳镖可以高速挥舞与操控，以出人意料的方式和角度发动攻击。

A deceptively simple weapon made from a length of cord attached to a weighted, conical metal spike. A rope dart can be whirled and manipulated at great speeds to attack in unexpected ways and from unexpected angles.

Tekko-Kagi.name: 手甲钩 Tekko-Kagi
Tekko-Kagi.description:
四把弯曲的刀刃固定在一根结实的握柄上，使这件近战武器的持用者仿佛拥有从他们拳头延伸而出的爪击。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.zRmAXj7FSlrMfDeA]{Bastet}的追随者偏爱手甲钩，以便在敌人猝不及防时出手。

Four curved blades attached to a sturdy handlebar give the wielder of this close-combat weapon the illusion of having claws that extend from their fist. Adherents of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.zRmAXj7FSlrMfDeA]{Bastet} favor the tekko-kagi for catching their foes off guard.

Keymaking Tools.name: 制钥工具 Keymaking Tools
Keymaking Tools.description:
这些盗贼工具使其持有者在将锁留在原处的同时，拥有对该锁的持续控制能力。它们为用于开锁的巧手检定提供 +1 物品加值。当你使用这些工具通过撬锁将一把锁完全打开后，这些工具会为被撬开的锁生成一把临时复制的钥匙。这把魅影钥匙可以像原始钥匙一样上锁或开锁。该钥匙会通过一条细银链连接在盗贼工具盒上，并持续 12 小时，随后渐渐消失。以这种方式制造的钥匙，在同一套盗贼工具中同时只能存在一把。制造新钥匙会替代先前那把。

These thieves' tools provide their owner the ability to have continued control over a lock while leaving it in place. They grant a +1 item bonus to Thievery checks to Pick a Lock. Upon completely opening a lock by picking it with these tools, the tools produce a temporary copy of the key for the picked lock. This phantom key can lock or unlock the lock just like the original key. The key appears attached to the thieves' tools case by a fine silver chain and lasts for 12 hours before it fades into nothing. Only one key created this way can exist in the same set of thieves' tools. Creating a new key replaces the previous one.

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这种小型带刃武器单手持用，用于在近身战斗中刺击生物。它也可以投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Sickle.name: 镰刀 Sickle
Sickle.description:
这种单手武器原本是用于收割谷物的农业工具，带有一根短木柄，末端是一片弯曲的刀刃，有时两侧都开锋。

Originally a farming tool used for reaping grain, this one-handed weapon has a short wooden handle ending in a curved blade, sometimes sharpened on both sides.

Battle Axe.name: 战斧 Battle Axe
Battle Axe.description:
这些斧头被明确设计为武器，而非工具。它们通常更轻，斧柄以金属箍或弩矢加固，刃部也更加锋利，因此更适合砍断肢体而不是劈木头。

These axes are designed explicitly as weapons, rather than tools. They typically weigh less, with a shaft reinforced with metal bands or bolts, and have a sharper blade, making them ideal for chopping limbs rather than wood.

Greatpick.name: 大镐 Greatpick
Greatpick.description:
这种镐的柄比普通镐更长，头也更宽。它太重了，无法单手挥舞。

This pick has a longer handle and broader head than a regular pick. It is too heavy to wield in one hand.

Hatchet.name: 短斧 Hatchet
Hatchet.description:
这把小斧可以用于近身战斗或投掷。

This small axe can be used in close combat or thrown.

Adze.name: 铲斧 Adze
Adze.description:
锛子是一种常见的切削工具，外形类似斧头——但其刃口是水平的，而非垂直的。锛子的形状使它深受木工欢迎，而绊足奇建筑师也常用它来建造他们的树顶家园。由于挥舞它需要极大的力量，这种工具也能充当高效的武器。

A common cutting tool, an adze resembles an axe—but the cutting edge is horizontal, rather than vertical. The adze's shape makes it popular among woodworkers, and tripkee builders often use them to construct their treetop homes. The tool also serves as an effective weapon, due in part to the immense strength required to swing it.

Hand Adze.name: 手斧凿 Hand Adze
Hand Adze.description:
锛子的较小版本适合在狭小空间内进行精细木工。特里普基会将手锛用于制作，也把它当作近身武器。

The adze's smaller version is useful for delicate woodworking in cramped spaces. Tripkees use hand adzes for crafting and as close quarters weapons.

Light Pick.name: 轻镐 Light Pick
Light Pick.description:
轻型镐是一种改造过的采矿工具，带有木制柄杆，末端是镐头；其打造更偏向于刺穿护甲和血肉，而非凿碎岩石。

A light pick is a modified mining implement with a wooden shaft ending in a pick head crafted more to pierce armor and flesh than chip rocks.

Pick.name: 镐 Pick
Pick.description:
一种专为战斗而设计的镐，配有结实的木柄和沉重尖锐的头，能造成毁灭性的打击。

A pick designed solely for combat has a sturdy wooden shaft and a heavy, pointed head to deliver devastating blows.

Small cold iron cauldron with onyx.name: 镶嵌缟玛瑙的小型冷铁坩埚 Small cold iron cauldron with onyx

O-Yoroi.name: 胴丸甲胄 O-Yoroi
O-Yoroi.description:
更大的甲片与札甲部件结合，构成一套重型札甲。此套装通常为穿戴者量身定制，且常带有高度装饰性，覆盖身体的大部分。使整套装备完整的是一顶分层头盔和一副狰狞面具，往往描绘着邪魔或怪物般的生物。

Larger plates coupled with lamellar pieces to make up a suit of heavy lamellar. The custom-fitted and often highly decorative suit covers most of the body. Rounding out the suit are a tiered helmet and fearsome mask, often depicting a fiendish or monstrous creature.

Chain Shirt.name: 链衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这种长衫有时也被称为hauberk，由与锁子甲相同的金属环制成。不过，它比锁子甲轻得多，且只能保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chain mail. However, it is much lighter than chain mail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Splint Mail.name: 条板甲 Splint Mail
Splint Mail.description:
这种护甲是在锁子甲上加装了柔韧、相互咬合的金属板，通常覆盖穿戴者的躯干、上臂和腿部。这套护甲附带一件@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲}和一双@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{护手}。

This type of armor is chain mail reinforced with flexible, interlocking metal plates, typically located on the wearer's torso, upper arms, and legs. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Half Plate.name: 半身板甲 Half Plate
Half Plate.description:
半身板甲由全身板甲所使用的大部分上半身甲片构成，手臂和腿部则采用较轻或较少的钢板防护。这使其在提供部分全身板甲防护的同时，具备更高的灵活性和速度。一套这种护甲包含一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲} 和一双 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Half plate consists of most of the upper body plates used in full plate, with lighter or sparser steel plate protection for the arms and legs. This provides some of the protection of full plate with greater flexibility and speed. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
虽然被称为胸甲，但这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用以保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时还包括髋部和小腿。它在提供部分板甲防护的同时，也能带来更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Artisan's Toolkit.name: 工匠工具包 Artisan's Toolkit
Artisan's Toolkit.description:
你需要这些工具才能用制作技能将原材料制成物品。不同种类的工作需要不同的工具组，由游戏主持决定；例如，铁匠的工具包与木工的工具包不同。如果你佩戴着你的工匠工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分拔出并收回。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Flint and Steel.name: 燧石与钢 Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
如果你有时间等待火花引燃，燧石和钢在生火时很有用，尽管在遭遇中使用它们通常太过耗时而不切实际。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和钢点燃火焰也至少需要花费 3 个动作，而且往往还要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Lock (Average).name: 锁（普通） Lock (Average)
Lock (Average).description:
开一把普通锁需要四次成功的 @Check[thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true] 检定。

Picking an average lock requires four successful @Check[thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true] checks.

Lock (Poor).name: 锁（简陋） Lock (Poor)
Lock (Poor).description:
开一把简陋锁需要两次成功的 @Check[thievery|dc:15|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true] 检定。

Picking a poor lock requires two successful @Check[thievery|dc:15|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true] checks.

Lock (Simple).name: 锁（简易） Lock (Simple)
Lock (Simple).description:
开一把简易锁需要三次成功的@Check[thievery|dc:20|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true]检定。

Picking a simple lock requires three successful @Check[thievery|dc:20|traits:action:pick-a-lock|immutable:true] checks.

Repair Toolkit.name: 修理工具包 Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
修理工具包让你在旅行时也能进行简单修理。它内含便携铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于养护皮革和木材的油料。你可以使用修理工具包，使用手艺（技能）来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中，作为该动作的一部分，取出并收起一套穿戴中的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Thieves' Toolkit.name: 盗贼工具包 Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包，才能以贼活（技能）进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包已破损，你可以用适用于你的工具包的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器} 更换撬锁器来修理它；这不需要使用“修理”动作。如果你佩戴着盗贼工具包，你可以在使用它的动作中将其抽出并重新收起。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).name: 盗贼工具包（替换撬锁器） Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).description:
这些是用于更换一套@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{盗贼工具包}的替换撬锁器。

These are replacement picks for a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{Thieves' Toolkit}.

Tool (Long).name: 工具（长） Tool (Long)
Tool (Long).description:
此条目是对那些没有特定冒险用途的基础手工具的统称。锄头、铲子或大锤属于长工具，手钻、冰钩或泥铲属于短工具。工具通常可以作为临时武器使用，造成 1d6 伤害。游戏主持决定合适的伤害类型，或在必要时调整伤害。

This entry is a catchall for basic hand tools that don't have a specific adventuring purpose. A hoe, shovel, or sledgehammer is a long tool, and a hand drill, ice hook, or trowel is a short tool. A tool can usually be used as an improvised weapon, dealing 1d6 damage. The GM determines the damage type that's appropriate or adjusts the damage if needed.

Tool (Short).name: 工具（短） Tool (Short)
Tool (Short).description:
此条目统指那些没有特定冒险用途的基础手工具。锄头、铁锹或大锤属于长工具，手钻、冰钩或抹刀属于短工具。工具通常可以作为临时武器使用，造成 1d4 伤害。游戏主持决定适合的伤害类型，或在需要时调整伤害。

This entry is a catchall for basic hand tools that don't have a specific adventuring purpose. A hoe, shovel, or sledgehammer is a long tool, and a hand drill, ice hook, or trowel is a short tool. A tool can usually be used as an improvised weapon, dealing 1d4 damage. The GM determines the damage type that's appropriate or adjusts the damage if needed.

Frying Pan.name: 平底锅 Frying Pan
Frying Pan.description:
铸铁煎锅是冒险半身人、淘金者以及偏远酒馆老板的必备工具。拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2ebcYbg68pCZfAFQ]{半身人武器亲熟} 族裔专长的角色在煎锅上受过训练。

The cast-iron frying pan is an essential tool for adventuring halflings, gold panners, and remote tavern owners. Characters with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2ebcYbg68pCZfAFQ]{Halfling Weapon Familiarity} ancestry feat are trained in the frying pan.

Khakkhara.name: 锡杖 Khakkhara
Khakkhara.description:
这根法杖顶端是一个尖状金属圆环，其上悬挂着数个较小的环。移动法杖时，这些小环会叮当作响、铿锵有声，让你在行走时能够宣告自己的到来，并吓跑荒野动物。

This staff is topped by a pointed metal circle from which hang several smaller rings that jingle and clang noisily as the staff is moved, allowing you to announce your presence and scare off wild animals as you walk.

Temple Sword.name: 庙剑 Temple Sword
Temple Sword.description:
这种沉重的刀刃深受宗教场所守护者的青睐。它拥有独特的新月形刀刃，看起来像是镰刀与剑的混合体。刀刃或剑柄头上通常会钻有孔洞，以便将铃铛或其他神圣饰物固定在这件武器上。

This heavy blade is favored by guardians of religious sites. It has a distinctive, crescent-shaped blade that seems to be a mix of a sickle and sword. It often has holes drilled into the blade or the pommel so that bells or other holy trinkets can be affixed to the weapon.

Manacles (Poor).name: 镣铐（劣质） Manacles (Poor)
Manacles (Poor).description:
你可以将愿意配合的人，或以其他方式任你摆布的人戴上镣铐；这是一项探索行动，根据生物的体型以及你要施加多少副镣铐，需要10到30秒。一只双足生物如果双腿被束缚，其各项速度会承受-15足的环境减值；一只双手生物如果手腕被束缚，则每次使用带有操作特征的行动时，都必须成功通过一次@Check[flat|dc:5]，否则该行动失败。根据镣铐对双手限制得有多紧，这个难度等级可能会更高。被束缚在固定物体上的生物会陷入禁足状态。对于肢体更多或更少的生物，游戏主持决定镣铐是否会产生任何效果，以及会产生什么效果。将生物从劣质镣铐中解救出来需要两次成功的@Check[thievery|dc:17|traits:action:pick-a-lock]检定。

You can manacle someone who is willing or otherwise at your mercy as an exploration activity taking 10-30 seconds depending on the creature's size and how many manacles you apply. A two-legged creature with its legs bound takes a -15-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds, and a two-handed creature with its wrists bound has to succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] any time it uses a manipulate action or else that action fails. This DC may be higher depending on how tightly the manacles constrain the hands. A creature bound to a stationary object is immobilized. For creatures with more or fewer limbs, the GM determines what effect manacles have, if any. Freeing a creature from poor manacles requires two successful @Check[thievery|dc:17|traits:action:pick-a-lock] checks.

Manacles (Simple).name: 镣铐（简易） Manacles (Simple)
Manacles (Simple).description:
你可以将镣铐铐在自愿配合的人身上，或其他任你摆布的对象身上，这是一项探索行动，根据生物的体型以及你施加了多少副镣铐，需要10到30秒。一只有两条腿且双腿被束缚的生物，其各项速度获得-15足的环境减值；一只有两只手且双腕被束缚的生物，每次使用带有操作特征的行动时，都必须成功通过一次@Check[flat|dc:5]，否则该行动失败。根据镣铐对双手限制得有多紧，这个难度等级可能会更高。被铐在固定物体上的生物会陷入禁足。对于肢体更多或更少的生物，游戏主持决定镣铐是否会产生任何效果，以及会产生什么效果。将生物从简易镣铐中释放出来需要三次成功的@Check[thievery|dc:22|traits:action:pick-a-lock]检定。

You can manacle someone who is willing or otherwise at your mercy as an exploration activity taking 10-30 seconds depending on the creature's size and how many manacles you apply. A two-legged creature with its legs bound takes a -15-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds, and a two-handed creature with its wrists bound has to succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] any time it uses a manipulate action or else that action fails. This DC may be higher depending on how tightly the manacles constrain the hands. A creature bound to a stationary object is immobilized. For creatures with more or fewer limbs, the GM determines what effect manacles have, if any. Freeing a creature from simple manacles requires three successful @Check[thievery|dc:22|traits:action:pick-a-lock] checks.

Manacles (Average).name: 镣铐（普通） Manacles (Average)
Manacles (Average).description:
你可以将愿意配合的人，或以其他方式任你摆布的人上镣铐，这是一项耗时10到30秒的探索行动，具体取决于该生物的体型以及你要施加多少副镣铐。双足生物如果双腿被束缚，其各项速度会承受-15足的环境减值；双手生物如果手腕被束缚，则每次其使用一个操作行动时，都必须成功通过一次@Check[flat|dc:5]，否则该行动失败。这个难度等级可能会更高，取决于镣铐对双手的束缚有多紧。被拴在固定物体上的生物会陷入禁足状态。对于肢体更多或更少的生物，游戏主持决定镣铐会产生何种效果（如果有的话）。要将一个生物从普通镣铐中解救出来，需要4次成功的@Check[thievery|dc:27|traits:action:pick-a-lock]检定。

You can manacle someone who is willing or otherwise at your mercy as an exploration activity taking 10-30 seconds depending on the creature's size and how many manacles you apply. A two-legged creature with its legs bound takes a -15-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds, and a two-handed creature with its wrists bound has to succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] any time it uses a manipulate action or else that action fails. This DC may be higher depending on how tightly the manacles constrain the hands. A creature bound to a stationary object is immobilized. For creatures with more or fewer limbs, the GM determines what effect manacles have, if any. Freeing a creature from average manacles requires four successful @Check[thievery|dc:27|traits:action:pick-a-lock] checks.

Flail.name: 连枷 Flail
Flail.description:
这种武器由一根木制握柄构成，握柄通过链条、绳索或皮革带连接着一个带刺的球体或圆柱体。

This weapon consists of a wooden handle attached to a spiked ball or cylinder by a chain, rope, or strap of leather.

War Flail.name: 战争连枷 War Flail
War Flail.description:
这把大型连枷有一根长柄，连接着一段较短且结实的木制或金属部件，有时还镶有尖刺。

This large flail has a long shaft connected to a shorter piece of stout wood or metal that's sometimes inlaid with spikes.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌类似，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Buckler.name: 圆盾 Buckler
Buckler.description:
这种非常小巧的盾牌深受决斗家和敏捷、穿着轻甲的战士喜爱。它通常由钢制成，并绑在你的前臂上。只要你的那只手是空着的，或该手持有一个非武器的轻型物体，你就可以用你的圆盾 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{举起护盾}。

硬度HPBT
363

This very small shield is a favorite of duelists and quick, lightly armored warriors. It's typically made of steel and strapped to your forearm. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield} with your buckler as long as you have that hand free or are holding a light object that's not a weapon in that hand.

HardnessHPBT
363

Cold Iron Shield.name: 冷铁盾 Cold Iron Shield
Cold Iron Shield.description:
与木制盾牌类似，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Silver Shield.name: 银盾 Silver Shield
Silver Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Sturdy Shield (Minor).name: 坚固钢盾（下等）
Sturdy Shield (Minor).description:
凭借卓越的设计与精湛的工艺，这面钢盾比其非魔法的同类拥有更高的硬度，因此更难被打破和摧毁。

该钢盾具有硬度 8、HP 64，以及 BT 32。

With a superior design and excellent craftsmanship, this steel shield has higher Hardness than its non-magical counterparts, making it harder to break and destroy.

The shield has Hardness 8, HP 64, and BT 32.

Eternal Blaze Ironworks.prototypeToken: 永焰铁工坊 Eternal Blaze Ironworks
